body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106197253/540741518/-2113420158?refcode=EM_NBI_JP_20250420_FR_ResponsibleGovernance_0_6MO_JimmyPanetta_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2M5OTQ2Zi00OTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eAYTL7LeQmTV_HFz-sNZVP23tlA6jBolr1voDUN1k5U=&emci=5e275c69-491e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=03c9946f-491e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

clean_body: | Dear Fellow Conservative, As we stand together against the liberal agenda, I want to remind you that our fight for freedom and responsibility is far from over. Take, for instance, the recent passage of the SAVE Act in the House, which aims to require proof of citizenship to vote. But we know the truth - it's about ensuring the integrity of our electoral process. Now, more than ever, we need your support to push back against this radical agenda. | Official Donor File EMAIL: [[Email Protected]]() SUPPORTER ID: #[Redacted] DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $15 or more | | We can't let the Democrats and their liberal allies dictate the terms of our democracy. Together, we can achieve this. Sincerely, Matt Judge Executive Director, NCGOP

name: USAF/ANG Combat Veteran Troy Downing
subject: Veterans get scraps. Migrants get benefits.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Trump says it ends in 2025. Do you agree?

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyMV9DVC1aTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjkwNzgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjFfQ1QtWkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI5MDc4LTI4OTkifQ/ICse-u6KcH_nHO8GJwAB_Q)
---
Peter,

Joe Biden opened the floodgates at our southern border. Now, **taxpayer-funded benefits are going to illegal migrants** while American veterans are left behind.

Frankly, this is **UNACCEPTABLE.**

Thankfully, President Trump has a plan to flip the script in 2025. His America First agenda puts our citizens at the top, and terminates special perks, cash payouts, and free handouts for non-citizens.

The President’s Executive Order eliminating benefits for illegal aliens is a clear step in the right direction. But not everyone agrees. That’s why I’m reaching out to Patriots like you to get an answer so we can make sure our Congress follows through, step by step. **Will you answer my brief 1-question survey? **

**[**Do you support President Trump eliminating benefits for illegal immigrants?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyMV9DVC1aTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjkwNzgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjFfQ1QtWkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI5MDc4LTI4OTkifQ/AqclfSQAc0W6rW0s_WCFgA)**
---
[ **YES** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyMV9DVC1aTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjkwNzgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjFfQ1QtWkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI5MDc4LTI4OTkifQ/AnMbvZHJ_YzexQDn7rNl1g)
---
[ **NO** ](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyMV9DVC1aTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjkwNzgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjFfQ1QtWkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI5MDc4LTI4OTkifQ/AccqwhOHTNYNZygNHeHOBg)
---
No one who broke our laws to enter this country should ever get __**more**__ than our citizens, __**especially**__ those who risked their lives to defend it. If you agree, [**please respond in 5 minutes to help put America back on track.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyMV9DVC1aTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjkwNzgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjFfQ1QtWkwuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI5MDc4LTI4OTkifQ/XnDG44UXv-W-1UIY3JFQ5g) Thanks for your time and attention to this matter.Best regards,Troy Downing
_**Patriot in Congress**_

clean_body: Trump says it ends in 2025. Do you agree? | | | Peter, Joe Biden opened the floodgates at our southern border. Now, taxpayer-funded benefits are going to illegal migrants while American veterans are left behind. Frankly, this is UNACCEPTABLE. Thankfully, President Trump has a plan to flip the script in 2025. His America First agenda puts our citizens at the top, and terminates special perks, cash payouts, and free handouts for non-citizens. The President’s Executive Order eliminating benefits for illegal aliens is a clear step in the right direction. But not everyone agrees. That’s why I’m reaching out to Patriots like you to get an answer so we can make sure our Congress follows through, step by step. Will you answer my brief 1-question survey? No one who broke our laws to enter this country should ever get more than our citizens, especially those who risked their lives to defend it. If you agree, Thanks for your time and attention to this matter.Best regards,Troy Downing Patriot in Congress | | | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. subject: CHRIST IS LORD. HE IS RISEN.

body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250415-flex7299-w-eml-he-is-risen?utm_campaign=028000000039052&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837323939&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250415-flex7299-w-eml-he-is-risen?utm_campaign=028000000039052&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837323939&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

Christ is Risen. Christ is Lord.

_DO YOU BELIEVE THAT, PATRIOT?
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250415-flex7299-w-eml-he-is-risen?utm_campaign=028000000039052&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837323939&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]_

It’s Nancy Mace.

As we celebrate Easter, I’m thanking Jesus — not just for the
empty tomb, but for the fire in my soul to keep going.

“No weapon forged against you will prevail...” — Isaiah 54:17

LET ME REMIND YOU WHERE I COME FROM:

BEFORE CONGRESS, I WAS A WAFFLE HOUSE WAITRESS. HUSTLING TO SURVIVE.

I wasn’t born with a silver spoon. _But by the grace of God, I
became the first Republican woman ever elected to Congress from South
Carolina._

Now I’m using that seat to speak truth in a world full of lies:

👉 There are TWO genders.
👉 Women are being erased by the woke Left.
👉 And Christians are under attack from every angle.

FOR SAYING THOSE THINGS, I’VE FACED THREATS. BEEN SMEARED, MOCKED,
AND TARGETED.

But I will NEVER bow. Not to the mob. Not to the lies. Not to the
Left.

WE SERVE A GOD WHO PARTS SEAS, SHUTS THE MOUTHS OF LIONS, AND RAISES
UP WARRIORS IN THEIR DARKEST HOUR.

And I believe we are here for a time such as this.

_PATRIOT_, IF YOU’RE A PROUD CHRISTIAN WHO REFUSES TO BE SILENCED
— I NEED YOU STANDING BESIDE ME.

The Left wants to erase Christ from American life.

Not on my watch.

SAY IT WITH ME THIS EASTER: CHRIST IS LORD.
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250415-flex7299-w-eml-he-is-risen?utm_campaign=028000000039052&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837323939&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

_Can I count on you to chip in today and help me defend that truth in
Congress?_

🙏 And please — say a prayer for America. We need it now more
than ever.

— Nancy Mace

DEFEND TRUTH IN CONGRESS >>
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250415-flex7299-w-eml-he-is-risen?utm_campaign=028000000039052&utm_medium=email&xuno=464c455837323939&recurring=true&amount=25&utm_term=lrm-active]

name: The Flyover
subject: Pope's Surprise, Robot Race, and a Moose Named Helga
body:
Pope Francis made an Easter Sunday appearance at St. Peter’s Square, delivering the traditional _Urbi et Orbi_ blessing and delighting more than 35,000 faithful with a surprise ride in his popemobile. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0QwYBMXFNvQZdstLWyGmBU21kBi5e-fnF943UhzdXTP_feYHj7ltD__-g1ti2Xa8awZW0OajnJgrS86KFWkMpdGfkG_hwkE9FxoDnIKPuXPpLtgIyKg6tBKo3tQAgbdrdbch1EFH5cA4yLFOMvxbqCPRog5jKi6ZC-a0CClkFKoW1T9Xc-4GC-G0UTFtMCQWqHb_5L2tmLMn_JGui1l67JdWzsqU38YOAZu_xyltuvFwF1gBk7o783AnYVy4JciA3fp8Uh-X1LluCE9sfJYiKOvDYmfqa38Cm1lThl5Ky9i4Dqy4ThTzqkOhmnx3HzK3y7tVwO-LfwEAAD__9p5hLA).

# Monday, April 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 753 BC, Romulus founded the city of Rome after a legendary dispute with his twin brother Remus, marking the mythical birth of what would become one of the greatest empires in history. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D-OqzAQgPHTmC5oPLb5U7h4DV1ekWZLy4EheGUYZJsgbr_KXmEv8NOn7-vu7j7EsL3--5VsmdltdOZIpVByO--U85H2FDIlfnJJfiS_TQ4BzQ30DaWbfIiX09VkZyIkVZGVrTaoABtdLVaNIE3XdahH6LUxjfT9aHoJpseZsKuC_WigUUqQElQ9K9PpJ42th6ZvZyU00BQKp_qbw1YWmuPFb0r1yGsV7VLKnoX6J3AQOJznWZ-c4rSEXDhdNaeXwOHB6xGP7D7xD1qPLHCokp32M8QYctMKDa_Vh_iLlj-deFv8CQAA___lknKJ)) In a scene straight out of a sci-fi blooper reel, humanoid robots clanked and wobbled their way through [Beijing's first-ever robot half-marathon](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ_G7hzBgsEpKP4mXf72SmsNS7wnbCzgEuXtT84rXDkaaUbf93Wf78iJ98d_3Mi1mOedXjVRa1TmIx9U6085ClcqecmtoCfcwwwCxkHoAeQckNN71n1wkQhI9eSk1SMoAUb3qxMStdKoMCohvbceAVDGRV1tMD6Gnt25JjRIKaQU6hLVOOmFvEVhrjaqTgsK3HK5fGfe20oxvfOTysXnrU9ube2onfrXwa2DGx4nwFmdoTT2iTq4-ZV3HD4Mw4opDhsWbGveBzkqbyZQSzAwGRilMBTAgLGT1QFkX1w4XpwSV2M7LR4bcvpctz_5ejr4DQAA__9van0v), reminding everyone that, for now, the flesh still outruns the circuits. Read more below. Today's edition is shorter, as we gave our team time to celebrate Easter with their families. We're sponsored today by [BOXABL](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2OpCAUhZ8Gdxr-RFywmKTirmY7S4JyKZmgEMCy6-07Vnf6BXp7v5tzTr5_d303Pvj98ddsoKqLeoezBKgVsk4xQSlHTtkXyHGONZsFzG41xbRvMW8p0db48NK8scoBUGANKDLwnjJMBW9W5SwXfBwMdtKOUvTj0Evm5GjlYkeJRePVlYY5JQQTglnnWC_5DMtgsBgHxxDHYH2Nufsf_V5XcOEVn5C7JW5NUGutqSD2B9EJ0ek8z26OH2YOF0Z08vsTSkVsOuqmSzzyAojdYDM-ICqu4wbWHxtit2S8bZPJdYdcVp---WK2ZPxjf3_8QCJxy3qmvywQKjCmbJCjaLKy6fQh-CIGxPHjqnpvrb8S_FT0MwAA__9z348B), offering an investment opportunity in a groundbreaking construction technology.

## Pope Makes Surprise Easter Appearance
Pope Francis made an Easter Sunday appearance at St. Peter’s Square, delivering the traditional _Urbi et Orbi_ blessing and delighting more than 35,000 faithful with a surprise ride in his popemobile. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd0QwYBMXFNvQZdstLWyGmBU21kBi5e-fnF943UhzdXTP_feYHj7ltD__-g1ti2Xa8awZW0OajnJgrS86KFWkMpdGfkG_hwkE9FxoDnIKPuXPpLtgIyKg6tBKo3tQAgbdrdbch1EFH5cA4yLFOMvxbqCPRog5jKi6ZC-a0CClkFKoW1T9Xc-4GC-G0UTFtMCQWqHb_5L2tmLMn_JGui1l67JdWzsqU38YOAZu_xyltuvFwF1gBk7o783AnYVy4JciA3fp8Uh-X1LluCE9sfJYiKOvDYmfqa38Cm1lThl5Ky9i4Dqy4ThTzqkOhmnx3HzK3y7tVwO-LfwEAAD__9p5hLA). The 88-year-old pontiff, recovering from a life-threatening case of double pneumonia, appeared visibly stronger, greeting pilgrims and blessing babies in a 15-minute loop through the square. Watch a [video of Pope Francis’ Easter arrival](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L3unDAQBPCnMZ2RPxYIhYs0SCn-aVOixV64jXw2sX2c7u0j8gqpRxrNb359rV_IkdPxE5_k2p7XRO8aqTUq65lPqvVVzsKVSt5yK-gJU1iNMoNUII1eA3L8rNAFtxMZsh05PcFgrDIjdA83Eijvg57BjjjOAwTYR7uhDsbDME8du7tNgdFaaa1sv9vhG2zkJ1TjPO1WgKLALZf-d-bUHrTHT76o9D4_u-gerZ1V2O_CLMIsuPlb0B_5joVZfqRGJWHjnDAKs1wcKAuznPmShQOnQ9YmT2pUqqx_XlhI3nC5F0yeqySsjYrURs0zDDN0xYXzzTFyHScB6ngix39b2n8deDnzNwAA___7-YXa)**.** Earlier, he met briefly [with Vice President JD Vance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3u3CAUBPDT4A4LHviroIgUWUrxT5vSegsPmxULFhBv9vaRc4XUI43mN7--ti8MMaT9J77INJ-3RO8aqTUq25lPqvV3OUuoVPIjt4KWMLkNBAxcaA5ycxjiZ9OdM54ISHVk5KQHUAJG3R1GDIufLamZaPbL6CVqcIMcQM2Dn5XtgrnbhAYphZRC9V4Ns36QnVCMy-QV04JcaLn0zxxSO8jHT76o9Da_umiO1s7K1DcGK4MVH_YW9Hu-Ywbrj9SoJGwhJ4wM1hvFfcFkQ-X0xx6YdqqcsDYq_On4hckSv7AFi4nBWlsuH6bW4Jj6LkEs8yQUdMW48x1iDHWcmBb7C0P8t6j9142Xgb8BAAD__wPph1M), offering Easter gifts for his children. While Cardinal Angelo Comastri presided over Mass, Francis’ balcony appearance and improved voice marked his longest public outing since a five-week hospitalization that raised serious concerns about his health.
## Half-Marathon Goes Half-Human, Half-Robot
Beijing hosted the world’s first half-marathon for humanoid robots on Saturday, with 21 bipedal bots running a 13.1-mile course alongside human racers. [See photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ_G7hzBgsEpKP4mXf72SmsNS7wnbCzgEuXtT84rXDkaaUbf93Wf78iJ98d_3Mi1mOedXjVRa1TmIx9U6085ClcqecmtoCfcwwwCxkHoAeQckNN71n1wkQhI9eSk1SMoAUb3qxMStdKoMCohvbceAVDGRV1tMD6Gnt25JjRIKaQU6hLVOOmFvEVhrjaqTgsK3HK5fGfe20oxvfOTysXnrU9ube2onfrXwa2DGx4nwFmdoTT2iTq4-ZV3HD4Mw4opDhsWbGveBzkqbyZQSzAwGRilMBTAgLGT1QFkX1w4XpwSV2M7LR4bcvpctz_5ejr4DQAA__9van0v). The bots ran in separate lanes with human escorts and made pit stops for battery swaps—each costing a 10-minute penalty. Some teams even swapped entire robots mid-race. Watch a [video of robotic starts here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVuQfY6BZPBwdaNsadWlVSdkw3Fw5GBknwTx9hV9ha7fJ_2G_9e1v9oQw3x7sw8y7FM_01oiMVPul7RQKc-85FAoJ5c424HsPPYgoTlIfQDVjzbErdfVaDwREFZkVKcbQAmtriajTk3jEMnpDjRhe5JKSuuI3JHQel8Fs2tSg1JSKYm1x-aoHQ2dle2p8yi0pDFwyvU9hZkn8nFLL8r1kB5VNBPzUgT-E3ARcFnXtd7Sk5-O9n9fLA-TwMtL4NkdPr__v293230IaFngGXSpshmXNcQYStsJLW8PG-Ivzn8q8jLwEwAA__9tZHPX). Only four robots finished within the four-hour limit. Tiangong Ultra, also known as Sky Project Ultra, won the robot division in 2:40:42, running at about 5 mph and finishing on its third battery. Many bots wore human sneakers, and [mishaps were frequent](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb_G7saCASdxQbFNurftltZgBsMKgwXkWfn7Vd4vbHOrq6t7zp-v9Ytiinn_TQeb7sua-WqJe-e6nuXk1l71rLFxLbb0ShtTdisKnEFoQLk6ium96tEZz4ysRjbyrmdUAm96DIbF4harHvKBqJAk2ceCN-WtXZygWYzRfNaERimFlEJNXs0PbXm7k7gtd68GLdjFXur0t8TcA_v0Lt9cp60cYzKh97MN6teAzwGf13VNnHdyO_dPYcAnxU-AfeUtQPHwQ9KgUgaCQMnDQZV6KBkolby36BjC66DcgLKD2OGiBjFvlV206Q17Kf4NKGep9Ix6Cv1IYzXuvGJKsd3ugxb7QTH9XOz_5fXb4L8AAAD__zIBjeQ)—one lost its head, another crumbled, and some didn’t make it off the starting line. Awards went to endurance, gait, and innovation, but just staying upright might have felt like a win.

BOXABL’s currently preparing for Phase 2—combining modules into larger townhomes, single-family homes, and apartments. clean_body: Pope Francis made an Easter Sunday appearance at St. Peter’s Square, delivering the traditional Urbi et Orbi blessing and delighting more than 35,000 faithful with a surprise ride in his popemobile. . | | | | | | Monday, April 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 753 BC, Romulus founded the city of Rome after a legendary dispute with his twin brother Remus, marking the mythical birth of what would become one of the greatest empires in history. () In a scene straight out of a sci-fi blooper reel, humanoid robots clanked and wobbled their way through , reminding everyone that, for now, the flesh still outruns the circuits. Read more below. Today's edition is shorter, as we gave our team time to celebrate Easter with their families. We're sponsored today by , offering an investment opportunity in a groundbreaking construction technology. | Pope Makes Surprise Easter Appearance Pope Francis made an Easter Sunday appearance at St. Peter’s Square, delivering the traditional Urbi et Orbi blessing and delighting more than 35,000 faithful with a surprise ride in his popemobile. . The 88-year-old pontiff, recovering from a life-threatening case of double pneumonia, appeared visibly stronger, greeting pilgrims and blessing babies in a 15-minute loop through the square. Watch a . Earlier, he met briefly , offering Easter gifts for his children. While Cardinal Angelo Comastri presided over Mass, Francis’ balcony appearance and improved voice marked his longest public outing since a five-week hospitalization that raised serious concerns about his health. Half-Marathon Goes Half-Human, Half-Robot Beijing hosted the world’s first half-marathon for humanoid robots on Saturday, with 21 bipedal bots running a 13.1-mile course alongside human racers. . The bots ran in separate lanes with human escorts and made pit stops for battery swaps—each costing a 10-minute penalty. Some teams even swapped entire robots mid-race. Watch a . Only four robots finished within the four-hour limit. Tiangong Ultra, also known as Sky Project Ultra, won the robot division in 2:40:42, running at about 5 mph and finishing on its third battery. Many bots wore human sneakers, and —one lost its head, another crumbled, and some didn’t make it off the starting line. Awards went to endurance, gait, and innovation, but just staying upright might have felt like a win. How? By using assembly lines to condense homebuilding from 7+ months to hours, BOXABL ships readymade houses to their final destination. Then, they’re unfolded and immediately livable. They’ve already built and delivered 600+. But the real transformation is still coming. BOXABL’s currently preparing for Phase 2—combining modules into larger townhomes, single-family homes, and apartments. And They already fully maxed out a $75M investment campaign once. . | Today's Quick Hits section is brought to you by: ➤**The White House Easter Egg Roll returns today, keeping a 147-year-old tradition alive with 30,000 real eggs donated by farmers and sponsors like YouTube, Meta, and Amazon. () ➤ A helicopter rained down 15,000 marshmallows over Worden Park in Royal Oak, Michigan, on Friday, drawing cheers from hundreds of children during the annual Great Marshmallow Drop. () ➤ Developers spent $64 million transforming the former Lorton Reformatory in Virginia into Liberty Crest Apartments, a 165-unit complex that blends modern living with preserved prison history. () ➤ Speaking of real estate transformation, Dutch architects are converting a century-old church into a public pool and event space dubbed Holy Water , where an adjustable floor creates a shimmering layer across the nave, letting visitors appear to walk on water. () ➤ Researchers say they’ve uncovered a new color, dubbed olo , by using lasers to stimulate isolated retinal cells, producing a vivid blue-green hue that doesn’t occur in natural vision. () ➤ A Florida homeowner was startled to find two large alligators lingering on their front porch, one even standing on its hind legs and pressing its snout against the door, as caught on a Ring camera. name: History Facts
subject: This famous monument was disguised in WWII
body:
India’s Taj Mahal was built by Mughal Emperor Shah Jahan, in memory of his wife Mumtaz Mahal.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc69ofxwdtt1aur6zegfk5kt27psyv7torpskuuk9ajnsvuudwternesmsgno7wvvs6d97efo70s1ft0cjeghj3ez6c3iuvobarr8h3uavcay34eqo1jg4er6acin0deb4vyfpu5drzuyid6252&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The Taj Mahal was disguised during World War II. ](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I ndia’s Taj Mahal was built by Mughal Emperor Shah Jahan, in memory of his wife Mumtaz Mahal. Construction on the emperor’s vision started in 1632 CE and continued in phases until 1653. Ever since, the mausoleum has stood as an artistic and architectural marvel, its symmetrical design topped with the famous white marbled dome. The centerpiece feature is so distinct, in fact, that during World War II, it was disguised for security reasons.
---
In [1942](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), amid fear of potential air raids, the British army used bamboo to cover the Taj Mahal’s dome, attempting to make the onion-shaped design resemble nothing more than a [pile of vegetation.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Bamboo is known for its lightweight, durable, and flexible properties, and it happens to grow abundantly in India. Still, the subterfuge was no small feat: An elaborate scaffolding system was built around the entirety of the dome, which is almost 200 feet tall. The dome was successfully camouflaged, the plant not only protecting the famous silhouette, but also dimming its gleaming white marble that, when bathed in bright moonlight, shines like a beacon in the dark.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The U.S. created a fake “Ghost Army” during WWII.
Disguising the Taj Mahal wasn’t the only smoke and mirrors strategy employed in World War II. In 1944, the U.S. Army activated a “Ghost Army,” a top-secret unit made up primarily of artists, sound engineers, and designers, brought together to create illusions of combat movement to deceive German forces. The group was known formally as the [23rd Headquarters Special Troops](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv2cpm&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com); together, they pulled off 22 campaigns using inflatable tanks, fake radio dispatches, pretend generals, and sound effects, creating a false picture of American troop movements and diverting enemy attention away from actual missions.

In 1944, the U.S. Army activated a “Ghost Army,” a top-secret unit made up primarily of artists, sound engineers, and designers, brought together to create illusions of combat movement to deceive German forces. The group was known formally as the ; together, they pulled off 22 campaigns using inflatable tanks, fake radio dispatches, pretend generals, and sound effects, creating a false picture of American troop movements and diverting enemy attention away from actual missions. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: We were in the trenches together
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
Vivek is the real deal. He’s whip smart, quick on his feet, knows exactly why he believes what he believes, and he’ll be a reliable partner to President Trump at the state level.

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/lWoHd6_Tc3YF3H51eO_Irw)Hi - how are you?
This is Charlie Kirk. I don't send you many emails but I figured this was as good a time as any.
Why? Because my friend, Vivek Ramaswamy, just launched his campaign for Ohio Governor and I have a lot to say about it. Let me start off with this:
Vivek is the real deal. He's whip smart, quick on his feet, knows exactly why he believes what he believes, and he'll be a reliable partner to President Trump at the state level. He will make for an excellent Governor of a critically important state. [In a minute, I'm going to ask for you to make a donation to his campaign, but first, let me go on.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/33GD1scyc64X7n0ggnBUJw)
I put my faith in Vivek 100%. I know who he really is because we were in the trenches together at the height of the election.
He and I barnstormed the country - focusing most of our attention on college campuses - campaigning for President Trump.
* We faced off with purple-haired, nonbinary socialists who called us every ugly slur in the books
* We handed out Trump hats to (previously) undecided voters
* We generated hundreds of millions of views across every social media platform to convert every Gen-Z voter we possibly could

[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/31h1MnNnALC9EqJ627X5SA)When we look back and see that Gen-Z LURCHED toward President Trump, I like to think me and Vivek's hard work paid off.
So when he threw his hat in the ring, it wasn't a hard call to support him.
I've seen that guy go viral time and time again for methodically picking apart the cheap talking points folks heard from MSNBC or Democrat influencers.
He'll do the same when anyone gets in the way of him **SLASHING** the state income tax, **SECURING** our elections, **CUTTING** wasteful spending, **FIXING** Ohio schools, and **HELPING TRUMP** Make America Great Again! [That's why I encourage you in the strongest possible terms to support his campaign for Governor. ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/jO6hcvwu3N5kPFZGY7PUuA)_Whether you live in Ohio or not is beside the point. _
When he wins, Vivek will move at lightning speed to fix the government - just like President Trump is doing on the national level right now. Then he'll set an example for the other 49 states.
I know in my heart of hearts that Vivek will make you proud.
He'll make me proud, too.
**PLEASE:** | | [**CONTRIBUTE $4 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/KnXy9TEodkbG2563bGnh5g)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $40 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/wUaEnRNBq8zQclj48rRrMg)
---
| [**CONTRIBUTE $400 HERE** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/4A9-BvllIwDEmWFhtPRc4Q)
---
_Thanks for hearing me out. God bless you. _

Sincerely,
**Charlie Kirk**
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDQyMV9EWC0yMS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE2MjkyMDAtMzYyMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyNTA0MjFfRFgtMjEuMTE0NTEwX3QxNjI5MjAwLTM2MjMifQ/1FxUgAqgc-qM_2Y-XE0F_g)
| |
---
| | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
---

350 E 1st Ave
Ste 100
Columbus, OH 43201

[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._tS7JATxy2aHUtMc8zw)

To unsubscribe from Vivek Ramaswamy for Ohio, [click here](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

# Monday, April 21, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1836, Texas soldiers under the command of Sam Houston [routed Santa Anna’s army](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGSqyAUxvGnwU7ncASZFBS3scttt3RADsougQwwMb79jnmFrf7V9yu-r_tyNyGGtP03D9Lt7fOS6KiRWqOyfGdbC625OFPWPYYf2opJzpsFAWUPoke-OBPiuYjOaQvuxjvSXAmJ44hKdLteSU1GgpdkFZdSqQlICqHs6pUj9F3QFwYCOefAQQ4E3KqRj46cHCd7YwLIhZbL0HZq9DbVxzO_qAxrfnRR7609Kxv_MZwZzsdxDK3uJqcYEg25bAznz6p35uzteYXhTKmVq2KCrmj3PEKMoU6KCdgeJsQP3v52yUvjbwAAAP__ke91Zw) at the Battle of San Jacinto, shouting “Remember the Alamo!” and “Remember Goliad!” The decisive victory secured independence for the newly established Republic of Texas. The Houston Rockets faced the Golden State Warriors last night in their first playoff game of the year. Check out this link for the [score and a recap](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O4yAURp8Gd7HgGoe4oMgW7DbJFqPRlIifa5sJNhagOHn7UUbzBtN_-s7R-bjoiwkxrNPVLCjrY0x6xb1ErBWz_ky2ZHQpe5PdHMMNp2xWPxoNFPoD5Qdg2psQn5o3XlrqB9agZIL30HUgeDPLk-gH7vtTN1DggroeRmf4EZwYnGV8bIJ8nVEOjDHKaN8iZVZ0rPPo--5oB8Ip-lBTbuuMFR-mjPGZ7phbl5YmyrnWrZDuTEARUPu-t86WsqVcy2tBQK3WEFCTWbBm426YCaiMzmwE1PXPWf8IUP33jXD67_87AdVk6bc9xBjKURBOp8WE-E2sv-t0l_AVAAD__7LQeaU), and let us know how far you think the Rockets will go this postseason in today's poll. Today’s __ edition of _The Texas Flyover_ is a bit shorter than usual so that our staff could spend time with family on Easter Sunday. We’ll return tomorrow with our regular Tuesday edition. If you're looking to save money on your property taxes in Texas this year, be sure to check out today's sponsor, [Ownwell](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQhU9juiB7xkAoXKwU0WXbLZFhhuBdY0fGiZPbr4hyg7_9Zt6np_fnOl6t8y7cftuNTX4tcQxcds85cxr_xmlPPMdENs2rd__4lmygxY4goTlJfQI1knX-PeqKzCSpVxUb1ekGEKHT1WpmPINuSRI2TQc9wpnQNkvbKtlq6rFy5pBJDUopqWRTs1RThwqJqcF26oWWTC7HVOeVM7_svvh3fHKq57hV3qw533eBvwQMAoZSSh1LKOz9cRcwfCICh0fexj0-0swCL1-FgPbAG5N7bAIvvFnnv3COIXPIAi-bdaFKhu7Fee_2thNa3o7PT4P8s92eBv4HAAD__9ULgpI).

## Texas Leads Nation in Job Creation
Texas [led the nation in job creation](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkEuO5CAMhk9Ddo545DFZsChplF3PdpaRASehm0ALmErV7UepOkLvbNn67P_7-7F8oA8-bn_wIF0fa1oinSVQrZSXz2RKJpuyw2z34L9oyxjdiovksgfegRSLQx-eS9c4bbibRENajF0vlZJj1-xa9aJfR_w1Iinkg7Cjk7j2gyWDg5umxusLxjsphOCC9y1xYUYllCPXq8FMrOPkfE25rTtVemBZwzPdKbc2HU3Qe63fhakbkzOT83me7VHiNWNypgj_CpOzxUyUr-ozGSh05WFyftEgELoCEatPEXyEa8VmevdYoFSsBGfKX2vKliD7QgVqgrcb2P22AxqTaoWCz-sKZrjdxG9ap3uTtfs-fQi-DCPr-HagD6_X68-E37X8HwAA__-D7Zfj) over the previous 12 months, adding 192,100 nonfarm jobs, according to the Texas Workforce Commission and the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics. The state’s 1.4% rate of growth surpassed the national rate by 0.2%. Last month, the number of Texans in the civilian labor force (15,778,500)—and those actively working (15,137,500)—reached all-time highs. The state’s 4.1% unemployment rate beat the national average of 4.2%. Midland’s 2.9% unemployment rate is the [lowest in Texas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL8GMlHSIME5UHAJmS-9kBoxY9BaIJeYNfbfb-Ff2Px1V7_-fx2vGFPc5n-4spfXLY8bH3tiES7jVw574SkXwjItKd55LrjRDUfQ4JS2CsxIGNN7tDX5oOliavamtw7aFnpbL94hATD3Nhjbuy5oNMH90a1jAnsJto7-LNMWjDHaaNewNqFvTUtMru3CpbKaKUoujSws_ML9lt75yaWZ8lonv4g89qr9W8FQwXAcRyPH1HzAZs7PCoZTqYLhzCjotNbqNFNIxKQ-oEoYclErljuLmvImcfvmXc0lH7KoXQrjvS6eHkdMKe5dX1k9rxjTZ4T87rqnh58AAAD__-O9hE0). In a [press release](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb1j8PxDXA0MXb-na0cLmt02KIQLkJG9fxX2Ejqc7fae77-t4tT74uH7ZnUx9LmmM9CiBaqU83tJUMs0pO5vnLfgfWrONbrEjCtRcKI4wOuvDa1SNM5NwPTRkoFMapcRONZtZug5QCq1gEeryQVr1GnSvhBWq70E23rxhQiEACBC6JQFTJ0E6clpepp4pQc7XlNu6UaWnLUt4pYNyO6e9CWar9V6Y_GQ4MBzWdLRnqF3TwXB4z2E43FOpDIfT4YGsKzza6lPkPvJbmvic6U-_yTzYUjkg31OsW2mycfeHD8GXS8eUWHfrw9le__fZYfA3AAD__wRZgFw), Gov. Greg Abbott praised the state’s “booming economy and highly skilled workforce,” touting pending legislation to increase public school funding and expand career and technical training programs.
## Kidd, Thompson Reflect on Mavericks' Season
A year after going to the NBA Finals, the Dallas Mavericks lost more than half of their games and were [eliminated from playoff contention](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu3CAUAE-DO1bwwPa6oEhD99OmtB7LwybBxgK8_r59tLlC6pFGo_n1NX9hTHFffuJGpn2HPO901UStUZl_Z1cLvXLxWF5rin9oKbj7gDMI6LnQHOTsMaZ71p03TvhJdmTkqHtQCkbdreYlhueAMATnxyDQ4_AM_jmNkwIXehW6aD4yoUFKKaToHySkG5VUnnyvBjcxLcjHlsujrdToG2tId35Tebzy1iWztnZUpn4wsAzsdV0Pqsf-gQzs7pCBrS2Xm4GdGdjoGVitR60GmBjYDd-Vu3zxI-HNF9yIHyWfnrdzO1M781l5Jax574rxxxVTinUYmRbLhjH9i2j_t-5t4G8AAAD__2pKguc) Friday night. However, during a post-game press conference, head coach Jason Kidd said the Mavericks had an “incredible season.” “When you look at the injuries that we've had, the change, for us to even be here playing in this game tonight, it's incredible,” [he explained](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOpTAQRVcDmZ_8fZ_AwSRkPemEqMAFVD9jI5cHmt2P6GA20FFJdXWOru6fj_4DKFKaf8OKvn5NuU94cMRasfSfeeCCYy4ByrhEeuNcIIUJei21E9IKrfoAFM_etsEPMrxUi149rNPG6IdtF6-tdRNMTxvU3Y0yAMJo5fByzjyfxr1a8pdMWq2Ukkq6G0o1PIwyAYMz9-HVWImBai63umDFL-ApnnnHchvz2ka_1LpxY341umt0dxzHjemKGt2lARrdrbBjofHN1weP63wC5yTeFILgv2UrxJTmeIotM1XaUeSNEuUkAsQILP4rBOM3GpA3qihW4gsVW4QzTxO3xYftoBiJ74_GynkFit9F68_m3b3-FwAA__-L0JNL). Mavericks' perimeter threat Klay Thompson, on the other hand, acknowledged it [was a “tumultuous” season](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OpDAQhJ8GMo_8x1_g4BKyvfRC1MYN-LbByG5md-bpT9wrbFqqKn36_nxMHxApHutv2NHx95KmA78KITPm6W_yJeOccoA8bxQ_cc1whAUmLXUjpBVaTQEivSZbB-dlGFSNTnW20cboztabC6HXnVHWWtupzg8-yN4M6Jd5aKFvmzq6-0xarZSSSjYPlMp3RpmAoTGtHyorMURO-cEbMn5DWeiVnpgfc9prchvzWSrzq9JjpUdPCPOGOeOZMt-VSo-QOc6EpdKjblTfKyvFJ8FL8Jb2s6RDzEBUxA7PIgrCnfC1X8RXuoqAhTGLw4M47xGlUsSa4_tNEUudXTi_IlEsbVdZue4Q6T8a_0zo0-l_AQAA___a7Yzg). Thompson signed a three-year contract with the Mavericks as a free agent last summer. When asked if he would have made that decision if he had known Luka Doncic would be traded this year, [Thompson said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvOozAURldjOiM_eAyFi0gjukw7JbrYF3BibGRfQrL7UWYLf_dJn3R0dP7epzv44OP6B3Y09F7SFPEqAYkwT480l4w2ZQfZbsE_cc0Q3QKTEqrlouFKTg58-ExN5cws3CArNLJvWqW16ptqM53ohhY6tdjB2r63FgbbDlJr92vADkTlzRcmGiWlFFK0NQo591pqh67V3TywRqDzlHJNGxK-oSzhk16Ya5v2KpiN6ChM35gamRqv66r3Er8fUyNGfhamxnKkTN8RZ2BqdAkLfwb4cNrSfpQUecY1I_FH8tHHle_wwuzts_AlZU7nfgY601l4QSgpMjVC5reb_L142VbZuOPyIfjS9awR6w4-_LejnzV9GfUvAAD__6o3jWQ), "_That’s kind of a ridiculous question because I don’t own a time machine. I’m here in Dallas, and I’m looking forward to the future_."

The state's 1.4% rate of growth surpassed the national rate by 0.2%. | | | | | | Monday, April 21, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1836, Texas soldiers under the command of Sam Houston at the Battle of San Jacinto, shouting “Remember the Alamo!” and “Remember Goliad!” The decisive victory secured independence for the newly established Republic of Texas. The Houston Rockets faced the Golden State Warriors last night in their first playoff game of the year. Check out this link for the , and let us know how far you think the Rockets will go this postseason in today's poll. The state’s 1.4% rate of growth surpassed the national rate by 0.2%. Last month, the number of Texans in the civilian labor force (15,778,500)—and those actively working (15,137,500)—reached all-time highs. The state’s 4.1% unemployment rate beat the national average of 4.2%. Midland’s 2.9% unemployment rate is the . In a , Gov. Greg Abbott praised the state’s “booming economy and highly skilled workforce,” touting pending legislation to increase public school funding and expand career and technical training programs. Kidd, Thompson Reflect on Mavericks' Season A year after going to the NBA Finals, the Dallas Mavericks lost more than half of their games and were Friday night. However, during a post-game press conference, head coach Jason Kidd said the Mavericks had an “incredible season.” “When you look at the injuries that we've had, the change, for us to even be here playing in this game tonight, it's incredible,” . Mavericks' perimeter threat Klay Thompson, on the other hand, acknowledged it . Thompson signed a three-year contract with the Mavericks as a free agent last summer. When asked if he would have made that decision if he had known Luka Doncic would be traded this year, , "That’s kind of a ridiculous question because I don’t own a time machine. name: Natalie Jones
subject: 🥚Eggs Will Roll🥚
body:
Sorry, how many eggs is the White House planning to waste?
| | |
---
| |
---
| 🥚Eggs Will Roll🥚
---
| Sorry, how many eggs is the White House planning to waste?
This was not the news we expected to be concerned about today, but according to NBC News, the out-of-touch, [only-picks-up-the-phone-for-billionaires](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOPN9gwu36MN-twaRV-UQpCPKzgHKk87-adPe5sR63301Riu7AgGFX5LWEQPbvy3zjCkllqoZor44tY0mz8pHtKfahKvhqdubn15FjFI0yleKZrEaxHBhMNiRgg_JGKCSCDky7mIOz6jm&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==) White House plans to use [30,000 real eggs](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOPN9gwu36MN-ib496kdpfBxn74uZQmrCUi2n9F_MEPzjkwZBaKYcGbe_slkzadAZ_oQeIz2XckdW6L8XhlniF8Ux8bWAr4yLvZSu23JGlPpuF8bCaqxFs77Y59x_IRN5v6M8UaBUDiEyTHqA8IsI4moIvqW2KvLF3oMyBhNIx_X8bvC_gcdABZsUsz1ZE_vuD6jROSuChfA-GQTmRm6dKa4=&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==) for its annual Easter Egg Roll.
Last month, the average cost for a dozen eggs hit an all-time high of [$8.64](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOPN9gwu36MN-oLQNEDahyEmdva4Q2NuiNjoZhtHJcpSDa0vjjs1n4vX9VFpH0mX5aIUHoie6UNbAWdaMofxY7I-dwqNgcyXKpgp-g2G-_-uhZ1-XgwN1N6q5sOJrbFraIY7rEDlnKE2P40l_ynR6SyIK8vYuo2FSfDuhKdndqTvmuINvZRUrHU4LZgc1mCDfjjScult03v3_MC7F8YcKl9a3RTpCVPcJ_7D057D5N6ZRJS4zMGxC-pOzdLoPlzlPzSP4bWgL3qonIz2i2Lt4dTR720xDPhIvBg==&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==), and eggs still remain out of reach for many American families today.
[March Navigator polling](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOPN9gwu36MN-DaXwXzhG9iVYXn0kIlJYeP4jGV0dKquaVjFDCBQtJGmiJ1CH5RGf1biQYXKxCfS5t-2CnAO_sIcKmVlI4MQCQumKAQgfYkuq4vezjRFFTAFY_AwceLmcRqV3USs1zgLnvZ5zCh-nNO_ziYox-oWEJhNbL4QwkscKBlWzl5TqyBOS3h0-i8WTEIRmvM7txxOVVlWnbGq-Z8F4xwPqKUTYl-gochHIO3jy-ImWpY5gH1g7dz0yvV-ApG8be7G7tR1H9tHopH4OFyfw8U4t8lhUcIurA5SmkB_5woJQiROkarAauzC3TgEYnw7-of6Q3UbVz6ppJCGuug0=&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==) showed that Americans feel that the costs of everything, but especially eggs, are rising.
---
| |
---
| Vanessa Frias of Willowbrook Farms in Michigan was [quoted in the NBC article saying](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOPN9gwu36MN-_5qXHChbEr8sDc__oFa3QoWKNULZKKZwMQKTGswJBpEy1F0deeBRe1NqiLPbjxqLSrXoJKSagtylITFtKFBeQO2u68wIu9hs0sPC8fJg3o7ZLBuDNDdxTRi4CqBEDYCgHpwUQiTwtq-C67JaroPL6VVryJEb9s0oiCAofTJvTA-yhmrKFRDIaoJg-y0JAfT2-vyJZLQy3sgP6phlbYAQlYkaibxrDF8oaT3YDYYwgkZo-reVAQ1Oc_3Q8PmTfQAZUjfwcH9CSFQwX_GLJJDmYl-vC3xFXqdNeItDB2YYcTk=&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==), "Those eggs need to go in people's bellies, and it needs to feed our families here in the United States, not to be played with [...] Because of the shortage, I don't think it makes sense to waste our eggs on an event that isn't giving anything, I could see if the eggs were going to a cause or going to feed people, but to roll them across the lawn, I don't think that makes any sense. It's a waste."
Families are struggling to afford eggs, but never fear, their hard-earned taxpayer money will be wasted on real eggs for a ceremonial event. Trump is clearly [taking some cues from Lt. Gov. Winsome Earle-Sears](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOPN9gwu36MN-vC09oL55JJbXAgw5q-M5gc5NmDqaCjdRPp3DBQV0GJRBFyWjN-BVqJYhdr78diAMFFGlsK0EDbD1O_ZKcyO9MT3_yup9zxPzI67IT_rIjs0HBMSWWnT6lhJAfY8ax43r&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==) channeling his inner Marie Antoinette, "let them eat eggs!" Only, in this case, hardworking families struggling with the cost of groceries can't eat those 30,000 eggs.
Anyway, we'll be listening to the Yeah, Yeah, Yeahs and A-Trak's "[Heads Will Roll](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOPN9gwu36MN-WQrFxAYpNPHTP5OqHuSP65jZ1tPbUxI7yTIA18avVNSy7XEKv6r9GIMux5EwtOGRiScDJZwgYY0xNo_Bwj1b9LL0v_tL6gSfiP_yiVWSzNI8gjD4v-DU3eAEnFtqZOlw6EJROKgU8KHBzS7i3v701uaUT9v9vBB6SMLArBA0L6vut5d_wqQtoh5OM-zGTsYkevLeCtuZJ_jQVqDPw3ue5Q==&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==)" for no reason today! 🥚
Natalie Jones Communications Director
---
| [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOE62gCv933xNb6FLoGZorEHyUOMRKYl2TKoAzkdeUQn9HqX5ExZzYRiAoUve2Johya5lDvKh60NzYay3pRET1h2ntuKVhc8Zl28YvVHmctuZdSA2PxkRuXo=&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOE62gCv933xNi-p-1CeC2T4UTJoecORqaPvTJOFYsGm12V_y-xpYcEwYUV6AvWrAC424QlGTieflyTo9IhJgbR-QJhKaSbCWVW5f_jTYCWT3&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==) [](https://dpxqxvhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00153CtO4H_MhRsuXjO33ilCcZGUp3lP4IXiVwiQeYg6em4EALDbl9YOE62gCv933xNBTwtJIsfZsNpdBOepFcE4Cs7tSqT0xOd4CLMOBWebPBQF9RDZigulhXzq_6er4AE5mm1QUBiyX9bqPK9RSeRwnVnNjM7b8jOxanTb883RPc=&c=vTp6WT-iE51RJFWMFHhjrOv_ro1Qvdr2ZgVw9YUWe-p-jE4zkoN7dg==&ch=ipWnm7XYC7LXGQ3IWIgwynIiBG35pQBGd1QVMWaiE0GWUK4_J0Cf5A==)

We are exposing this radicalism and giving parents the resources they need to ensure that America's children learn our nation's founding principles.

As a service to parents and educators, the Goldwater Institute's Van Sittert Center for Constitutional Advocacy compared two of the most ambitious and prominent literary projects ever undertaken to teach high schoolers the history of the United States of America: Howard Zinn's _A People 's History of the United States_, and Wilfred McClay's _Land of Hope: An Invitation to the Great American Story_ -- a textbook that gives students an honest, balanced view of both America's virtues and struggles.

Our report details to parents how the adoption of one text versus the other will determine which narrative about the American experiment future generations adopt.

Rather than provoke division and distrust, we must help students engage with the nuanced history of the United States with both honesty and high expectations for the future.

**I am asking for your immediate help to win this battle for the minds of the next generation. Our nation depends on them, knowing America is a place where they can thrive and a force for good in the world.**

[Support the Goldwater Institute in reviving the American Dream in education by fighting for a fair portrayal of our history and reclaiming our education system in all 50 states >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zepg8hqtr8rlk489u9h0trjhgupo3ojvpob0qvlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjqn2a4ojc1rb5n7k8koscs3cujhc2piup421e7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)

[Donate $17.76](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsl63ok1vbpn541kldkgo4vm273dftf37sfmp16g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq96ci95hvn79ds227sgv31k8093q49in2hrd310_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkf7js9iu8tph06gfd176r9a2c92h2epa37envkg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsf3oorn4ssutp4o334gs5duiaof81qe580v3jto_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcpm2r1otel0e4o13fjma5at5fhuv36ljg4ngak8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)
The Goldwater Institute is focusing on expanding liberty **at the state level** , where decisions that _**directly affect our families are made.**_

We have SECURED high-impact reforms in all 50 states -- and defended them tirelessly in court to make sure they actually work as promised:
* **DEFENDING Parents ' Rights: **Working with parents to help them wage the legal battles to STOP schools from hiding information about their kids.

* **EXPANDING School Choice:** Making Arizona the first state to offer education savings accounts, and helping other states like Florida, Mississippi, North Carolina, and Tennessee in waging similar battles for school choice.

* **DEFEATING DEI:** launching a new 50-state legislative push to outlaw political litmus tests in our universities, once and for all.

* And now, **STOPPING the Leftist propaganda** that's infected the minds of our children and turned them against our nation's values.

**The Goldwater Institute not only passes reforms -- we defend them in court.** When the government refuses to follow the law, our best-in-class legal team takes action to hold them accountable.

Our strategy is simple:
1. _**Pass the law.**_
2. _**Defend the law.**_
3. _**Deliver results the American people are counting on.**_

But high-stakes legal fights on 50 different battlefields aren't cheap. And we can't count on Hollywood, the media, or woke billionaires backing us.

[We only have YOU: freedom-loving patriots who still believe in the promise this great nation has to offer.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5589ebqr3qvqf4ds24v5vh4eiep44poc73f1ab0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)

EVERY dollar you give today will directly advance and defend policies that protect liberty and save our schools from radical indoctrination. And **EVERY amount makes an impact**.

[Help us REMOVE propaganda from our schools and BEGIN the long fight to win back the minds of the next generation. Your donation will support the Goldwater Institute's efforts to reclaim our education system and spread liberty nationwide >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1ve9vn1qfbasop4kj6833q8784sumf1i6t5l008_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)
[Donate](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2aeb8p1987jusati5jq82tnh5r2g7jfm5qo8a70_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imco36c5h2bs)
Thank you for standing with us to protect the future of American education and this great nation.

Sincerely,
Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

#### Welcome to Andrew Yang Newsletter!
Andrew Yang recently moved you from another platform to Andrew Yang Newsletter, hosted on [Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/8383cd85-ead3-40ab-991b-9226499a30d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). New posts will be automatically delivered to you via email or via [the Substack app](https://substack.com/redirect/79a02807-3e10-4460-9660-101f52421688?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
To set up your profile and find more to read, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/2c6fc834-9cc2-4a93-8e36-4518206f6298?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If you do not want to receive emails from Andrew Yang Newsletter, you can unsubscribe [here](https://substack..6FYItv4bIhn6_nWdBmsQA_jcyGglXlfpYq0HaMMy114?).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e69810cb-368b-4840-bdf2-e0a79080b403?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Do you know of anyone who rushed out to buy a phone last week to avoid a possible price spike from the tariffs?
If you do, you're not alone. And companies are doing the same thing.
I spoke to a big investor, who shared this: "My companies pulled all of their orders up and ordered everything they could for the rest of the year to avoid the tariffs. One of them sent a fleet of trucks to Mexico and packed everything that they could. I think the second quarter will look fine. But the demand all got pulled forward so the third and fourth quarters are going to look terrible by comparison."
He also shared: "A couple companies I know are moving their headquarters from the U.S. to Europe because of tariff uncertainty. It's getting harder to get certain folks to move to the U.S. for work." He says that many companies are complaining about the difficulty in planning when you don't know how high the tariffs are going to be from various countries and for how long. "Their costs are shooting up, and right now they don't know whether to eat those costs or raise prices, especially if the tariffs might then disappear." So for many firms their margins will weaken and they'll fire people, or they'll raise prices.
Another wrinkle he observed is that Canadians are demonstrating patriotism by not crossing the border. "It's going to hurt small businesses near the border and big tourist destinations alike," as European tourists are doing the same.
What do you do if it's tough to plan for the future? Maybe you buy a bunch of supplies, throw them in the basement, and get ready to settle in.
I believe that is now happening throughout the country in ways big and small, for both companies and people. It will be tough to discern for a while because the numbers will look fine through the reporting of the second quarter, which could take you through mid-summer.
"These tariffs are economic mismanagement of the highest order," shared Noah Smith, popular economics blogger of Noahpinion, on the [podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/5d46f933-569a-4e7a-8aab-c0a99ac50381?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week. Noah is worried about stagflation, a combination of a lack of economic growth and prices going up. "A ton of federal debt is going to need to be refinanced in the next 12 months, and interest rates are higher not lower which means that interest payments on the debt will be a lot more expensive for the federal government." This could crowd out other spending and make the deficit unmanageable.
On cue, Trump has lashed out at Fed Chairman Jerome Powell and is suggesting that he be fired for not aggressively lowering rates. The Fed's mandate is to be vigilant on both economic growth and inflation, which is likely to increase because of . . . tariffs.
It's an incredibly important balancing act that is being played out, with risks on every side. Noah says, "The only other country that has been in a similar situation in terms of servicing their debt was Japan, but Japan's savers were content to keep their money there, which won't be the case for the U.S. There have been some early signs of capital flight from U.S. assets already, which would be a disaster."
I confess to feeling that we are experiencing a new era of economic history that is being led by Trump's instincts on tariffs. The reactions are already happening; the consequences will come to light soon. Give it 90 days.
For my interview with Noah click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/5d46f933-569a-4e7a-8aab-c0a99ac50381?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). To see what Forward is doing in your state, click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/5a62a902-e461-47d7-b42f-3793d9c9b609?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a63e90a0-811a-4034-86e0-0b82b4a94437?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

body:
That’s why so many young Americans are choosing despair over hope.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn3nh4a2rjqmk84ubism8d99kjm3fpl9d8fm576g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)
Friend,

The Goldwater Institute is [on a mission to reclaim American history.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkuvkq12kr2c3ga7mfa4ep1ligurkvqdih7f4tk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)

And it starts by getting Marxist propaganda OUT of our schools.

We have only one chance to make that happen, and **we need the help of freedom-loving Americans like you. **

Right now, one in four American public high schools teach history through the lens of one radical socialist: Howard Zinn.

Zinn paints a distorted picture of America, defined by oppression, exploitation, and division. He ignores the values that made America a beacon of freedom and opportunity.

**That 's why our colleges are hotbeds of hate and anti-Americanism. That's why so many young Americans see socialism as the "solution."**

That's why so many young Americans are choosing despair over hope.
[The Goldwater Institute is liberating the minds of American students. Donate now to support our mission >> ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuqkcokfsllche7k8du0vd0mbs423he9mi0lfkoo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)
[Donate Now](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhii4uu0rv0cp1gk0akue29t79kodoiu91viiq88_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)
We are exposing this radicalism and giving parents the resources they need to ensure that America's children learn our nation's founding principles.

As a service to parents and educators, the Goldwater Institute's Van Sittert Center for Constitutional Advocacy compared two of the most ambitious and prominent literary projects ever undertaken to teach high schoolers the history of the United States of America: Howard Zinn's _A People 's History of the United States_, and Wilfred McClay's _Land of Hope: An Invitation to the Great American Story_ -- a textbook that gives students an honest, balanced view of both America's virtues and struggles.

Our report details to parents how the adoption of one text versus the other will determine which narrative about the American experiment future generations adopt.

Rather than provoke division and distrust, we must help students engage with the nuanced history of the United States with both honesty and high expectations for the future.

**I am asking for your immediate help to win this battle for the minds of the next generation. Our nation depends on them, knowing America is a place where they can thrive and a force for good in the world.**

[Support the Goldwater Institute in reviving the American Dream in education by fighting for a fair portrayal of our history and reclaiming our education system in all 50 states >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqdqif3si0agcjlc58dkhaf8mou2rsbbl076i3r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdkpuee6p2b3tjs02ck74i0knipvakbjmg8tasp8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)

[Donate $17.76](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdnitsofoafn488h0hts5dl39ulep4ge2fpk6lho_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt2n1e32jdjd6c9aem7u3jhdtkbmtbvv5qv7ov88_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc6ai59f4v6dai75qfrmr9rap5fehc0agfm8mqu0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6rg8ucgfi7lhln70h7hbchmuug2dus4itf1r780_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztel02ht9cbtms6dc59n204k6jrs8s0p9esehgt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)
The Goldwater Institute is focusing on expanding liberty **at the state level** , where decisions that _**directly affect our families are made.**_

We have SECURED high-impact reforms in all 50 states -- and defended them tirelessly in court to make sure they actually work as promised:
* **DEFENDING Parents ' Rights: **Working with parents to help them wage the legal battles to STOP schools from hiding information about their kids.

* **EXPANDING School Choice:** Making Arizona the first state to offer education savings accounts, and helping other states like Florida, Mississippi, North Carolina, and Tennessee in waging similar battles for school choice.

* **DEFEATING DEI:** launching a new 50-state legislative push to outlaw political litmus tests in our universities, once and for all.

* And now, **STOPPING the Leftist propaganda** that's infected the minds of our children and turned them against our nation's values.

**The Goldwater Institute not only passes reforms -- we defend them in court.** When the government refuses to follow the law, our best-in-class legal team takes action to hold them accountable.

Our strategy is simple:
1. _**Pass the law.**_
2. _**Defend the law.**_
3. _**Deliver results the American people are counting on.**_

But high-stakes legal fights on 50 different battlefields aren't cheap. And we can't count on Hollywood, the media, or woke billionaires backing us.

[We only have YOU: freedom-loving patriots who still believe in the promise this great nation has to offer.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn2tgmhvh9hg0q5st84npm2fgmuff1d0qi68i5oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)

EVERY dollar you give today will directly advance and defend policies that protect liberty and save our schools from radical indoctrination. And **EVERY amount makes an impact**.

[Help us REMOVE propaganda from our schools and BEGIN the long fight to win back the minds of the next generation. Your donation will support the Goldwater Institute's efforts to reclaim our education system and spread liberty nationwide >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5rsbj040qlnus40he9517s5uqi0kk7lko8pa450_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoalopp63huauari46jrc9b0hfqsp0f699cuqf8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp76c3h2bs)
Thank you for standing with us to protect the future of American education and this great nation.

Sincerely,
Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc4v434cse5v54k7po8cp8odu2r79ql8d560ubdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3n4ps17h8pi08gc89e94li745upqt0bduqin7bo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zui4e9saddj5rblpdu8m5taignguei6urhb1ova0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbdrrfiqbdfilolgj22jv9r27pjme695bm62lfdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf4ut0gk4urvp0dl1616onv4rbje2agigb45ts9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbk4fhc6c0bgejlnl53c53mql9nv9dcnh0tm8d9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zasji7qpc0dd7qril75dov1qts1epklu48140meo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7fl9or1r4qt1sa17l7oeom2kdll3gurjkbemn0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1r2lv7dgfd0kn53js80uvf1jpmd8umte0ej2j5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkiu87je546t39bksur14uo35a21330d3qj3a4tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zuebaj3kjeolnfhpsrn0js1gpo1o94t98onkpv60_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z821squbd636sjp2avhu01kl074966c11vv5m16o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)**
---
[ DONATE $850 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z0g0vmu2mvml1sgp4uq1ect7pfnv8c5f92rii3e8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $600 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2rnf32b30s6ihtijv4e0u8udjbbr8ruh6evv9lg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $350 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z40ufcldfguojm7cq9t2h40kq65t0a0b9rnl0d38_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $120 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvr514nb7dadves1j6fguk6fvtngcm3nv9evkr5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $65 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zc0j2algchhfhvcpec9b0iqsef4jo1kipf0i27r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $47 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zvo3c6stjdcr0k1scdqv2nc048eq5q605dsn1vqg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $33 >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zdnilj38egomvtapuaeq6letibp72lo8vpi6r86g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlq6urpbc26bjf2latrr14prkjtrpn0taqjplj9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imcp71c1h2bs)
---
If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you _please keep me and my team in your prayers!_**I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!**Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears _Immigrant_ _Marine_ _First black female Lt. Governor of VA_
---

clean_body: I wrote this email to give you an update | | | | | | | Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. This is a humble from the heart, so please read it all the way through.In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers!I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1p1e7b2mjasbd0lbufcvo4sl50l0qu1pn4gdbeg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im2o76c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8mpl0ss9r7f11tunldo4aae3jcv6s2ld6vvifv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im2o76c5h2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zker624q0k1eo2629p665pmbk870nsidkerofsko_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im2o76c5h2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9o6fmaq9fbhspmplflb9prq338mv0fltlgfh9rg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob6chhm0oj246h22sh2s8i6eob5c9im2o76c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztvj1u18p9l9ugienat0tgbsi8nldc44fsrq4nh8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im2o76c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zivjru0300g8auob7cj5ps498ll1e0pqgqti5110_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1clh6aob0spgm49fg)

## Tributes paid to Pope Francis for service to the gospel and to the poor
THE late Pope’s ecumenism, championing of the poor and marginalised, and his “unstinting service” to God have been remembered in messages of condolence from church leaders around the world. Pope Francis died early on Easter Monday, aged 88. Leading the tributes, the Archbishop of Westminster, Cardinal Vincent Nichols, said: “A voice proclaiming the innate dignity [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/AlOiM7xyKa1DsFaLuVAS0h7X9JZMW3uZwlM1LvNBohEE6v6-nOYNpq4zTFAeVmniMYeFLCLAd83XPiBzPzCCGITxqP0CW_C30mZAwqsOBZ3MBZGX6j8ZhaCaHLTQkXVxDCmp6psgDfvtFmfitD-Eo23f0_Y0u7qwJ6RfsIytWo8Xvhr2ghINlyubGL0MJbChai9XwevqN5jho_0zQFfkR-Ds1IHh_KoXOmAUyT-ziBdJUgb_N973DJ602aSahHKGIpt5YYEf5mfXlqsgmFQJsGJGbXjEHPE8PCLS2_pkblPWrhjjI3IKFENVWNAiVbeLtYQoKz__WWV7Ga5zbwjdIk8qsPp-uhcb30047vTAaJThLsg/w3fnlQWQO8_yIxgkvbUjV7KT1bWgQf5U/8)

## Pope Francis Dies After Meeting JD Vance
Pope Francis passed away in the early hours of Easter Monday, beginning the process of conclave, in which the church will select its new leader. He was 88. The pope had met with Vice President JD Vance the day before. “Dearest brothers and sisters, with deep sorrow I must announce the death of our Holy [...] [Read more](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/q0nErzoVDhngDR7T8ijfj3XHGXvqhAR5NM-szHJvVe_iQfmmgf5Od3mcEQL02xTvgdJPEORCL6kXEgLage1nAnGVCq1VNQBRwFh9JfiibB90qWXpWin3RNqBXtH7qv9yWIDslXO1fF_v6AmkTPQyL_O8LB9b3cXjNP_3IATLafRECIT8sOSAa06ZpdSoX66pHqG5Bh5I7GQuQFVujIq5cYgXHoO8vEqqp2fddalwk7eE4k7c7bWvxmMCdM8dqy5Kr6ZYaOYrWmctGd2vJ5GDigijYcpZNrP6gAsYPgD7JRr94Sadqiv8vYLnJUgBspbY--uqDA/kvv_6TZtYcL8KWW8Gsn82F38mcmhEwWB/8)

## Brief from Prof. Justin Driver (Yale) and Me in School Curriculum / Religious Opt-Out Case
We argue, in an amicus brief filed in Mahmoud v. name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Participate in our national CRT Survey
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Updates for Great Americans is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2k7vf9s7342s2hlpaf1jpl0su0dkoo7kp4l8lpo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imapr6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ze0b87r1kcss31s6inmpfgdj647qfuht45qsvkog_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imapr6c5h2bs)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z98389req9kuuecipvetjcqgrda0khgjfg4la14o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9imapr6c5h2bs)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |

Fox News host Sean Hannity **[grilled woke journalist Taylor Lorenz](https://substack.com/redirect/fadbbbe5-c8a1-4cef-8883-49a46d78b545?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for praising and fawning over accused United Healthcare CEO murderer Luigi Mangione.
"Do you condemn people who support violence?!!" Hannity snapped, unable to get a straight answer out of her.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fadbbbe5-c8a1-4cef-8883-49a46d78b545?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fadbbbe5-c8a1-4cef-8883-49a46d78b545?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"We have a violent, violent healthcare system Sean, and it needs reform and that's what we should we focussing on!" Lorenz said.
"You want to make a rationalization, I am saying anyone who wants to assasinate any innocent person is wrong! I don't care if it's a Democrat or Republican!" Hannity fired back. "And people that have a platform like yours should speak out loudly and clearly and unambiguously, and you won't do it!"
Lorenz, a former columnist for the Washington Post, described Mangione in an interview with CNN as "revolutionary, famous, handsome, young, smart" and "a morally good man."
Mangione was arrested last year after allegedly gunning down United Healthcare CEO Brian Thompson in cold blood on the sidewalk outside of a New York City hotel.
Watch Hannity tear her apart for her deranged comments:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/fadbbbe5-c8a1-4cef-8883-49a46d78b545?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Neil Armstrong's SHOCKING Apollo 11 confession

Dear Reader,

You won't see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/b789a61e-d570-4829-ac4f-7156d7d2449b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in any history book...

But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon, Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/b789a61e-d570-4829-ac4f-7156d7d2449b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief. And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.

NASA did their best to keep it secret, but now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/b789a61e-d570-4829-ac4f-7156d7d2449b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.

**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/b789a61e-d570-4829-ac4f-7156d7d2449b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.
