# Pope Francis, dead at 88: Vatican
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e81cae0b-5506-49f2-a546-522703cf93ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Pope Francis, the first Latin American leader of the Roman Catholic Church, passed away at 7:35 AM CEST today at his residence in Casa Santa Marta, Vatican City, at the age of 88.
The Vatican announced his death with profound sorrow, marking the end of his 12-year papacy. Cardinal Kevin Farrell, the Vatican camerlengo, confirmed the passing, stating, "The Bishop of Rome, Francis, returned to the house of the Father."
Born Jorge Mario Bergoglio in Buenos Aires, Argentina, Francis was elected in 2013, becoming the first Jesuit pope and a global advocate for the poor, migrants, and environmental justice. His papacy was marked by efforts to change and modernize the Church, which often faced resistance from conservative catholics. Despite chronic lung issues, exacerbated by a recent bout of double pneumonia, Francis remained active, blessing crowds in St. Peter's Square on Easter Sunday, just a day before his death.
World leaders, including U.S. Vice President JD Vance and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, expressed condolences, praising his humility and religious leadership. The Vatican has begun preparations for simplified funeral rites, per Francis' wishes, with public viewing expected by Wednesday at St. Peter's Basilica. His final resting place will be the Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore on the other side of the River Tiber in Rome. The College of Cardinals will soon convene to elect his successor, ushering in a new era for the Church.
* * *

Pope Francis, dead at 88: Vatican | | ---|---|--- Pope Francis, the first Latin American leader of the Roman Catholic Church, passed away at 7:35 AM CEST today at his residence in Casa Santa Marta, Vatican City, at the age of 88. The Vatican announced his death with profound sorrow, marking the end of his 12-year papacy. Cardinal Kevin Farrell, the Vatican camerlengo, confirmed the passing, stating, "The Bishop of Rome, Francis, returned to the house of the Father." Born Jorge Mario Bergoglio in Buenos Aires, Argentina, Francis was elected in 2013, becoming the first Jesuit pope and a global advocate for the poor, migrants, and environmental justice. His papacy was marked by efforts to change and modernize the Church, which often faced resistance from conservative catholics. Despite chronic lung issues, exacerbated by a recent bout of double pneumonia, Francis remained active, blessing crowds in St. Peter's Square on Easter Sunday, just a day before his death. World leaders, including U.S. Vice President JD Vance and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, expressed condolences, praising his humility and religious leadership. The Vatican has begun preparations for simplified funeral rites, per Francis' wishes, with public viewing expected by Wednesday at St. Peter's Basilica. His final resting place will be the Basilica of Santa Maria Maggiore on the other side of the River Tiber in Rome. The College of Cardinals will soon convene to elect his successor, ushering in a new era for the Church. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I am MAGA’s #1 target without a doubt
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.eBryvR&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=1&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)
---
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
And the President said he’ll back Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge me.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country -- and you’re ready to fight -- [**please split $5 between my re-election campaign and GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.eBryvR&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=2&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Jon Ossoff and GIFFORDS PAC:_
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.eBryvR&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=3&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)**
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate -- and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran -- years before the _Dobbs_ decision -- because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and GIFFORDS PAC today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.eBryvR&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=4&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Jon Ossoff and GIFFORDS PAC:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.nPASW1&amount=5&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=23&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.g3RRuk&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=24&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.iXh7W4&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=25&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.b6-X3v&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=26&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.doAChl&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=27&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-apr25.nPASW1&refcode=em250421-1-b&t=28&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF)**
---
****
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=10315%2E3935704%2EGdv2kF) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Fellow Patriot,

It's been just under 100 days since President Trump and I returned to the White House, and already, _**America is BACK.**_

From the moment we stepped into the West Wing, we got to work cleaning up Joe Biden's mess and restoring sanity, sovereignty, and strength to this great nation.

We're cutting regulations, shutting down globalist nonsense, and putting the needs of American families FIRST.

clean_body: To: America First Patriots From: Vice President JD Vance Re: The First 100 Days Date: 04/21/2025 Fellow Patriot, It's been just under 100 days since President Trump and I returned to the White House, and already, America is BACK. From the moment we stepped into the West Wing, we got to work cleaning up Joe Biden's mess and restoring sanity, sovereignty, and strength to this great nation. We're cutting regulations, shutting down globalist nonsense, and putting the needs of American families FIRST. But now we want to hear directly from YOU. This is your chance to weigh in on the future of our movement, the policies we're fighting for, and how we keep up the momentum against the radical left. The media doesn't want to talk about our historic wins. They're too busy twisting every word we say, ignoring our booming economy, and spreading lies about our America First agenda. They want you silenced. We want you heard. That's why your voice matters more than ever before. You're not just part of a movement, you're the reason this movement is unstoppable. So before midnight tonight, I need you to do two things: 1. 2. Let's keep winning. Let's keep fighting. And let's make sure this country is never handed over to the radicals ever again. For America, Vice President JD Vance Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

## Extending the Trump Tax Cuts’ Small Business Provisions Is Critical for Main Street
Congress has a decision to make. Hang American small business owners out to dry, or lock in a tax system that allows America’s entrepreneurs to thrive? That’s the question Congress must answer when deciding whether to renew critical expiring provisions of the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act. ## ‘We’re Able to Do Our Job Again’ – RedState
Almost a year ago, the U.S. Border Patrol was bleeding personnel. In the four years of the Biden presidency, the law enforcement agency lost nearly a quarter of its ranks. U.S. Customs and Border Protection staffing data showed just over 4,200 agents had left the federal agency between October 2020 and April 2024. ## Bill Targets Free Speech in Texas
Texans for Lawsuit Reform’s mission statement says it was founded to “fight back against job-killing, abusive lawsuits” and “shut down new abuses of the legal system.” But the so-called tort reform group makes an exception when it comes to one kind of tort: the kind that lets the powerful silence their critics through lawfare. **On this week 's episode of The Qasim Rashid Show:**
* I'm excited to welcome 5X NY Times Best Selling Author and Scholar Dr. Ibram X Kendi.
* Dr. Kendi joins to discuss his latest book, MALCOLM LIVES!, which is the first biography on the life of Malcom X in 30 years, and is particularly written for young people.
* We also discuss the state of civil rights in America, and because he and I both dreamed of and failed to make it to the NBA, who his pick is to win the NBA Finals.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgo99pspmcsbcv4rj6k4hfcvukb1400947ogv830_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkhmacrcr2ck6m5hctihd8u3adusj5ugbnnkir6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm81j8p5hg0f6j2j8fdigi1lrd11bjnlm745dfmo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)**
---
[ DONATE $850 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z508eflc2gequ7l4sle094n95dv666n6dfkpdgvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $600 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu1fj85m58jc2j3j6822nff2fhdvhgniuvsu6umg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $350 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaleg410rrp2vhertus69mr1kad2tfip8la6vg9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $120 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk4cfjusur30ebhheapnul2psvp7jkcbkgcua580_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $65 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjp1pih1frsf7snrrhroksqknhqq7kuf4llgum60_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $47 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu5cmpq4b13d9l0vonmkt0u4eateje3nncblndp0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE $33 >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfre3np7vhc75ut6mk72npstrd6vcb3sue3d76vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z48fslienbp8dj2rs0ag16dnsqu38dq3fbl8lof0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)
---
If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you _please keep me and my team in your prayers!_**I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!**Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears _Immigrant_ _Marine_ _First black female Lt. Governor of VA_
---
[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zneprficmrucgl5c2vggs82q2mla7akmlm3ehmtg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)

---
Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zri1nfl692o0dr5e9sem511qfgg2nbk1hpf2afs0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.
---
[ **LEND A HAND**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq2peujdm5e24o7fakdv2m8080f6d2bm04s6b42o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cjh2bs)

name: *** HOUSE GOP COMMUNICATION ***
subject: useless as a white crayon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here’s the God-honest truth –

| |
---
| | | **Sometimes these emails are about as useless as a white crayon ...**

People ignore them all the time but sending one is worth a shot when there's nowhere else to turn. We need to fill you in on what just happened:

---
** FIRST: ** House Republicans announced our target list of 26 Democrat-held districts - _it 's an ambitious goal but these would be major pick-ups
_
** THEN: ** We urgently called on 10,000 Patriots to help save our House Majority - _and we were blown away by your support_

** NOW: ** House Democrats unveiled their list of 35 vulnerable Republican targets for the Midterm Elections - _it 's more aggressive than anyone thought possible_
---
The LAST thing we want to do is ask you for anything but we're deeply concerned. We're facing a multi-front campaign to destroy our Conservative House Majority and we don't have much time to turn it around.

**[So we're humbly asking you to chip in a few bucks before President Trump's 100th day in office - that's April 30th!
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsjhksd8jj26193r56v83l64b9k9je3q3ia48n5g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs "So we’re humbly asking you to chip in a few bucks before President Trump’s 100th day in office – that’s April 30th!")**
If everyone reading this agrees to help, we'll save our House Majority, defend our Trump Trifecta in Washington, and make history!
---
| | | [PLEASE: PITCH IN BEFORE 4/30](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkmngg0q0cbofnovupbvg0hquohfaj5oci86avt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs "PLEASE: PITCH IN BEFORE 4/30")
---
Here's the God-honest truth -

No matter how bad the shellacking was in November... The Democrats will NEVER back down. And they'll never change. They'll do ANYTHING it takes to destroy our House Majority, sabotage our President, and take back power.

_Do you know what could happen if we let Democrats take control of the House?_

Far-Left Members would take over our Committees, launch political Witch Hunts against Trump and his Administration, and stonewall President Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda.

**[That's why we're rushing to you for immediate support:](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zr183nasg7ar0qp5r2r0rmcl98b8slpr8kp2bjbo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs "That's why we’re rushing to you for immediate support:")**
---
| | | [PLEASE: PITCH IN BEFORE 4/30](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm5l5g269rcq17klj5q9te9qabop6nqivjs7qm7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs "PLEASE: PITCH IN BEFORE 4/30")
---
Thanks for all you do.

**- HOUSE REPUBLICANS**
_Sent via Team Scalise_

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo5s73fvb5nqv0a4pfrj0ro58cnj5b36gdc8d340_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znffsspkb796sj9dr3jh22av6j41j36nab9kav2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z2ie81nvrg8fpb2mp24q9aq271fr6mfk6g9cnnlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
- STEVE SCALISE
---
| | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---

Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6hslmfbc0gb4m822kvfsp2dib0grs1keso3ufuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im1ob4cph2bs)

name: Senate Republicans
subject: The major accomplishment everyone forgot about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Answer this quick question. >>

Friend,

President Trump didn't waste a second once he took office.

__He and Senate Republicans got right to work -- cutting job-killing regulations, securing the border, and sending a clear message in the first 100 days of his administration:__
**[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7uvog8qqn412t2pt433h15aob88bdumrbph2mv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im9pj4clh2bs)**
Now, Senate Republicans are collecting feedback from top conservatives like you to hear what your favorite accomplishment was in the first 100 days.

**[What was your favorite ACCOMPLISHMENT of President Trump and the Republican Senate Majority during their first 100 days in power? Take the survey.>>](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zec4sh0hhqcqeo3l180ut1pvg12lm7ging6oqgi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im9pj4clh2bs)**

**NAME YOUR FAVORITE ACCOMPLISHMENT:**

******************************************************[SECURING THE BORDER](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfkm8ikcptlt9f3s2toacvtt4ccq1p7mu6pbe3a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im9pj4clh2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[CUTTING TAXES](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd2ov8ilhgl2931lkn94jbo77h3br89ocglua95g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im9pj4clh2bs)******************************************************

******************************************************[OTHER](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsbn4nahk74ctud8tru20ne3eo5iqkm2763np0vo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9im9pj4clh2bs)******************************************************

name: Van Orden, Derrick
subject: Goodbye forever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:

| | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/FQV70RuUSSSvXQhK67dwuAGk_v-1h4bmxr_8I58eyxU4TNH5G2dNtkhA-fWVQpCAyyqFeDlVYY8zWCvAR2weAGpR3PpL5m5QRxEMBGPtBGXT0bEhIF3Z5a8irgZqswNDLtCMTuSt7d8y9YXdViRlUXCp04OlDoXHPTywQb3F9dEsMof2coy3ehuQkUmcPG_JjR_pPDWCeGktGN5CIQ8Xd7RbLeyWSNnTgLKAQWYt9giviNfZIjm2zlqTNYmOcDw8a6Ycstme8IVQlXGLAUwZ1LRRwyPfhMsm31FTsNUDRWiVIu6U9GF6F-7WNfSbjIqwtxpzvxQujZe1ZPLBy6WEozBTHwtYhou0PX2XtJgIiyXIjxhAmMqRM-BKimtRxyCclEbwFM4EwELro3toURnF2a6HUeY8hVYpjM1_rI4ocrAoK_oI0-KaG01SL8EjdLgs2ReMEgcP5C0ffoGLggza1Faf-_kiWU_OqQVT/LKDA7dT_tiDwb9LnsMmE7CQhTqJBRKT3/8) Friend, I hope you’re well. I’m writing with exciting news: I’m running for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District—again. You believed in me last time because you know we need real solutions for Eastern Colorado—not political theater. **[Can I count on you to join my campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert and become a founding donor today?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/s/c/GZqOSXyZKeOJw5CFfm60z6TO_Tu5OraovKow_uiiIxliZvgcC4umnQkzG0dYAKTUfmoDlo5lbEIRTf1fvIMg4Hbkg1crE9gksT-9q2xKyWQqEGrBkcLNb__UbgPPJ31g8Qm__4T6iTHsS3729CYImwTE7ZpaqQmC0CDgZ8eP2-_DPTfE62Mb0h50uZ4Qg01YVdmyapPgUoqS2jpyCKWMDz0-8Uu5NJ7igNsyLqYn0vhyPVKIJ8nWZ7QCPvkdghZpFLI_DVZE2TK3ongbEAGXcvK3t3OhqsrZ7HpiVawSg6JUnfUOkZPhwS5QLIuLKlxMCmeea7yTwEi1PSlGXi0Asb1kXNpPDEp1YmjCJLqcOb9gnc2XnBiHNFzbfX07s66d-PFegaCCaS9wDoS1Vk-QHcWwMuC0XHNcNzJGOILq3aEoN2wd-BPm5xXfJpPhDswAusa78aRZ7ZIgyOswBeo1xkVeWUSZ6dgEIotk/paarvrhpgCnde2JhEqd7rrskyg9E23kr/8)** Why do we need an Engineer in Congress? Let me explain: **Only One Shot at Getting It Right:** If companies bring manufacturing back to America, we need a Congress that knows how to partner with them responsibly—not just hand out favors—so we protect local jobs and build our economy. **Real Manufacturing Roots:** Growing up in a manufacturing town in Pennsylvania taught me the impact factories have on families — whether they thrive or disappear. Our neighbors in Fort Morgan and Sterling have felt similar pain from retaliatory tariffs on wheat, corn, and soy. **Building Strong Communities:** We want a future where local businesses can fail without devastating entire towns. We do that by investing in safety nets, fair trade, and the people who work the land and run our shops. **Made in America, led by Americans:** We deserve leaders who understand international trade and how to create a system that benefits every American business — and especially the working families behind each product. **Our District is at risk, friend.** Lauren Boebert and MAGA extremists chase headlines instead of ensuring farmers and manufacturers can survive rising costs and trade disruptions. We’ve seen how tariff battles damage the dairy industry in Greeley — every steel pipe and storage tank gets pricier, and our neighbors pay the price. It’s time for a representative who works with everyone — progressives, moderates, and Republicans — to protect Social Security, Medicare, and the local industries we rely on here in Colorado’s 4th. I’m up against powerful interests with deep pockets, but we have something stronger: you. **[With your help, we can flip this district and send a proven problem-solver to Congress. clean_body: | | | Friend, I hope you’re well. I’m writing with exciting news: I’m running for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District—again. You believed in me last time because you know we need real solutions for Eastern Colorado—not political theater. Why do we need an Engineer in Congress? Let me explain: Only One Shot at Getting It Right: If companies bring manufacturing back to America, we need a Congress that knows how to partner with them responsibly—not just hand out favors—so we protect local jobs and build our economy. Real Manufacturing Roots: Growing up in a manufacturing town in Pennsylvania taught me the impact factories have on families — whether they thrive or disappear. Our neighbors in Fort Morgan and Sterling have felt similar pain from retaliatory tariffs on wheat, corn, and soy. Building Strong Communities: We want a future where local businesses can fail without devastating entire towns. We do that by investing in safety nets, fair trade, and the people who work the land and run our shops. Made in America, led by Americans: We deserve leaders who understand international trade and how to create a system that benefits every American business — and especially the working families behind each product. Our District is at risk, friend. Lauren Boebert and MAGA extremists chase headlines instead of ensuring farmers and manufacturers can survive rising costs and trade disruptions. We’ve seen how tariff battles damage the dairy industry in Greeley — every steel pipe and storage tank gets pricier, and our neighbors pay the price. It’s time for a representative who works with everyone — progressives, moderates, and Republicans — to protect Social Security, Medicare, and the local industries we rely on here in Colorado’s 4th. I’m up against powerful interests with deep pockets, but we have something stronger: you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | No amount is too small — every dollar proves we’re a force that cannot be ignored. Thank you for believing in this campaign from the start. Let’s send an engineer to Washington who understands what it takes to keep our factories running, our farms thriving, and our communities strong. In solidarity, John Padora Manufacturing Engineer Paid for by Padora for Congress

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update

| | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztvkhufvfebd0qppsno1f3fh7h4mal7sq6v73rt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm0oj2clh2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---

clean_body: I wrote this email to give you an update | | | | | | | Our future rests in your hands, friend. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. This is a humble from the heart, so please read it all the way through.In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, friend. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And friend, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers!I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!Ever Forward,Lt. But that hasn’t come without challenges. As a mom, it’s really hard to see your child become a target of attacks from far-right billionaires. And as a retired special education teacher, it’s really hard to see the attacks on our education system – like Trump and Elon dismantling the Education Department. I’ve seen firsthand how underfunded our schools already were. I’m scared to see how much worse it will get. But it gives me so much hope to see young people like my son demanding change. And I’m so proud that Maxwell and his team are fighting back for working people everywhere. **Peter, while he’s out there on the frontlines speaking up and taking action, it’s his supporters behind the scenes, like you and me, that make the fight for progress possible.** [**_The less time Maxwell spends worrying about funding his campaign, the more time he can spend keeping this movement for change and progress going. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: My new leadership position
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I want you to hear the big news directly from me.
| **__A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position__**
---
Peter,
---
I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress!
---
**This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election.**
---
_I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda._
---
We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country!
---
But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility...
---
**_...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority._**
---
We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again!
---
_With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible._
---
**That is why, in my capacity as the _NEW_ Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! **
---
_If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match._
---
[**Please make a contribution of ANY amount to claim your 500% MATCH now that I’ve been officially appointed as the Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership.**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Mp9mMue_3Ts3vSW0RaWzpCgFTZSfFf11oFWGMAtVxTBotm-x8oWrbDcCa2hpJJHx317hLgH5vKBh8deNjjg7VC4oJL0q5mpvlqzvclzrLQH3BGoyx-q2uIZOa-1JvrpRg5-sYTd8cPX1hiKON99Kob3tb6i9Ic2soudnz8EckrvP_OSdUJuVxEeO2l35YEahI-k9A-JXttUn3ETt-0uMWjXCttudNrGQONCeoEsF6466Oze-k6OjXp9xtnZTQSJpRxh9XZpD4OztEkiIow_f3HrFWEoz7X_oeCMRSdZV_HX4kDOVjtUi4lc8HGWcuPBTCYwXqsSJOkb0yrLvUUv-6f_Zvs2Jh7cWKrtP-2rOvuEInzJDZcisCQ3CZ8jQOnrC9-LPIsmtjJwR_nfwQ6dqaljpr83BerrbnVjg_Ug6S7XZBAqEPm1JMGZVgkKOFj5EELjMCegA-3qGOJPGj0zNy9wlNMuBZjtH25YYqUTpOaGm5po/LQTNnaTlfALYUf3BaN3SH33xKvlg6Qls/8)

clean_body: I want you to hear the big news directly from me. | A Personal Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik on her New Leadership Position Peter, I just received the honor of being appointed to the position of Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership for the 119th Congress! This position has been used by prior Republican House leadership teams to deliver for the American people in critical moments for our country, such as the 1994 Contract with America and the 2010 Tea Party wave election. I look forward to picking up the baton to help guide our House GOP Majority through another such moment as we execute on the mandate from the American people to pass the President’s America First agenda. We’re truly on the brink of ushering in a new “Golden Age” for our country! But at such a critical moment, with the very fate of America on the line, advancing the President’s agenda won’t be my only responsibility... ...he’s also entrusted me with using this new position in House Republican Leadership to protect our razor-thin majority. We simply cannot let the Democrats FLIP the House and rob us of this historic opportunity to Make America Great Again! With the Left preparing to spend BILLIONS against us in the midterms, I have no choice but to do everything in my power to close the gap on their record-breaking war chest as quickly as possible. That is why, in my capacity as the NEW Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership, I immediately authorized a 500% MATCH on all gifts for the next hour to help us kick off my first 24 hours in this new role with our biggest fundraising surge of the year! If (and only if) you’re in the position to do so, I ask that you give any amount you can afford to take advantage of this match. Thank you and God Bless, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Trump called me a “lowlife” and “very low-IQ person”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress

Rome News-Tribune: Eligibility of 364,000 Georgia voters challenged [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/RNT_GeorgiaEligibilityChallenged.png]
Georgia and other states have an expansive legal statute that permits any voter to challenge the right to vote of any other voter in that county or municipality. Dark money voter suppression groups have allegedly used this legal tactic to threaten the voter eligibility of hundreds of thousands en masse in Georgia alone.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this tactic. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you think political action groups should be able to mass question the eligibility of voters?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=c+c1LbFaCyhQEN+PF6NaAzbP/G1NPlvs1DpX0Cjnqv/i9t2h/bHC5VBa+dhVZOHF2e15YQ63lE9zXuNqRn2FU2XlKiJaj4HUCBzpfhRaIwo=] NO [https://secure.everyaction.com/WI7XQsH6D0Kn6HzC8Tsadw2?am=15.00&contactdata=c+c1LbFaCyhQEN+PF6NaAzbP/G1NPlvs1DpX0Cjnqv/i9t2h/bHC5VBa+dhVZOHF2e15YQ63lE9zXuNqRn2FU2XlKiJaj4HUCBzpfhRaIwo=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: Team Powered by People
subject: 500 grassroots contributions. 1 big step forward.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
We’re working hard to reach our goal — but we need your help to turn the tide and hold Republicans accountable.
#
Some months we hit our fundraising goals early. Other months – like this one – we’re working to catch up. In the spirit of full transparency,_we’re trailing behind our fundraising goal_ **– but we don’t plan on slowing down.**
To boost our fundraising, we’re working to reach **500** grassroots donors before the end of the month. Why 500? We did the math and if just 500 people chip in at least $13, we’ll be back on track with our April fundraising goals.
_Every single contribution_ – whether it’s $5, $15, or $50 – powers the town halls, voter outreach, and community organizing we need to hold Greg Abbott and extreme Republicans accountable across Texas.
[**If 50 people chip in right now, we’ll be one big step closer to hitting our April goal. Will you be one of them?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250421._4S9bb&refcode=ema20250421-240075&t=1&akid=240075%2E444211%2ERy0nRX)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: unconstitutional
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | [**_BREAKING via NYT:_
“TRUMP SAYS HE’S ‘NOT JOKING’ ABOUT SEEKING THIRD TERM”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106230793/540834359/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250421_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDcyZDUxMy1jNDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQODp1SN_E1ZblSRUhfAwXO5lx1l9OTy5MZ5tFyo_rE=) I’ll be blunt. During his first couple months in office, Donald Trump has done EVERYTHING he can to expand his power. He has tried to undermine Congress’ power of the purse. He has tried to crush our vital safety net initiatives, including Medicaid and Social Security. He has likened himself to a “KING.” [**And now, he’s even threatening to run for an unconstitutional THIRD TERM.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106230794/540834392/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250421_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDcyZDUxMy1jNDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQODp1SN_E1ZblSRUhfAwXO5lx1l9OTy5MZ5tFyo_rE=) [**Donald Trump thinks he can get away with ANYTHING. It’s our job to prove him wrong!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106230807/540834393/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250421_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMDcyZDUxMy1jNDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQODp1SN_E1ZblSRUhfAwXO5lx1l9OTy5MZ5tFyo_rE=) **[_BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Will you chip in $15 – or whatever you can spare – to refill our coffers since the last election and make EARLY investments in the districts that will decide the midterms? **A CONTINUING

CALL TO ACTION!**
** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1df1869afe&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c97ad8a994&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=73610b1410&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5f95590f11&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=59e76dc92a&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5dbc9dc1f9&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

clean_body: Find out how your actions can make a difference. | | | | PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT! Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed! BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US": | "Join Us!" | | These two topics are two of the most important AND urgent so we are repeating what we sent last week. Coming up soon (maybe even tomorrow, but at latest midweek this coming week) will be a digital "Call to Action" on Medical Freedom. Expect to see a special email from us during the upcoming week. Hoping you experienced a devout Easter or Passover! | | | CALL TO "DIGITAL ACTIVISM"! THE OHIO HOUSE PASSED A '26-'27 BUDGET WITH A $600M GIVEAWAY TO BILLIONAIRES, INCREASED SPENDING, NO HEALTH FREEDOM & NO ELECTION INTEGRITY! ARE YOU ANGRY? TAKE IT OUT ON THEM DIGITALLY! YOU DON'T EVEN NEED TO LEAVE THE COUCH! \ | UPDATE: Republican Ohio House Leadership rejected every health freedom amendment put forward by Ohio's health freedom activists & agreeable sponsors, YET LEFT THE $600M GIVE-AWAY to the BILLIONAIRE Haslam family IN THE 26-'27 OHIO STATE BUDGET BILL (HB 96) now sent to the Ohio Senate for approval to be sent to the governor to make it LAW! It's time to take massive action , and GFI has implemented a "Digital Activism System" (aka "Digital Activism Platform") to make it quick & easy for you to make your displeasure known to every House Member who sold us out -- with the push of a button \-- WITHOUT LEAVING THE HOUSE! Here's a video explanation of the system: | CLICK for a video explanation of GFI's new "Digital Activism System". | NOW: Here's where YOU come in! Please go to (or click on the image below) and follow the directions. It simple, easy, and quick ... a minute or two tops! We want to let our elected officials know we're not happy and we're no longer going to sit quietly in our dipleasure. It's time to PROUDLY SPEAK UP & SPEAK OUT, DIGITALLY! Thank you! | | | | | A CONTINUING CALL TO ACTION! DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2! SPREAD THE WORD! $2.5B BOND ISSUE ON OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT! WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW! WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT! | <We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it! > This issue is beatable! 1) Turnout for the May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes. 2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential. 3) FIRST , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, A VERY REASONABLE thing to do. 4) SECOND , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections and get them to vote , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also A VERY REASONABLE thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county. 5) WHEN we do this, WE WIN! The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, AVERY REASONABLE objective! WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN! Over the next week, PLEASE : Make 10 social media posts on the issue Send texts about the issue to 10 people Send emails about the issue to another (different) 10 people Make calls about the issue to 10 more (different) people Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go to vote with you Persuade 10 people not previously contacted to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help **Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people. If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this stealthy, unnecessary, costly , $2.5B bond issue! LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN! We made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH! HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP! 1) PLEASE forward this message to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! 2) PLEASE download (same as below) to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! NEW >>>> 3)** PLEASE refer as many people as you can to the new Issue 2! (Click the image above to download!) BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can! Thank you! EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue" | | Prior Issues of This Email You May Find Valuable | | | Thank you for being a GFI person as part of the GFI network. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here! Best regards, Mark Pukita A GFI Person mark@gfiohio.com 614-499-0599 (c) | | Copyright © 2025 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._

Social Security is a lifeline for over 70 million Americans — especially seniors.

On Day One of the Trump administration, Elon Musk made Social Security a #1 target for his massive budget cuts.

He ordered DOGE to access sensitive Social Security payment systems, set plans to cut 10% of the Social Security Administration’s workforce and initiated the closure of 47 field offices across the country.

**_He even called Social Security “the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time.”_**

This is nothing more than an attempt to offer gigantic tax breaks to billionaires — at the expense of hardworking Americans.

That’s why Democrats are fighting to protect it:

subject: LEAKED gov. plans show illegal targeting of Americans in Florida
body:
This important update is provided to my more-than 56,000 subscribers for free.

| |
---|---|---
|
# LEAKED gov. plans show illegal targeting of Americans in Florida
| | Apr 21
---|---
**This important update is provided to my more-than 56,000 subscribers for free.**
Two weeks ago, I lost my federally-funded climate position. While I'm working on starting a new job, please consider subscribing to support this work.
[Whistleblowers ](https://substack.com/redirect/ca7ad5a7-f35d-4712-800e-4179b170ab82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[come to me](https://substack.com/redirect/99fe4a69-2c39-4a6a-9af8-ddadd6fb8dc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) because they know they can trust me. Whether it's an [exclusive first-look at new Boeing whistleblower documents](https://substack.com/redirect/5be9f3cc-b814-40be-9d9c-56c9c0e3591d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or[ news about data suppression](https://substack.com/redirect/04117306-eb28-4165-9b0b-4324fd4ad7d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), you have a right to know what they're hiding.
After all, [I've lived the whistleblower experience](https://substack.com/redirect/c768266b-bfc7-4a78-aeed-470726ddc1a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and am still going through it. To keep this active, subscribe or update your subscription now!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..z8DKlaYdzra3xZO8BiWhjpv0nUVYAkW4c4OeAHSKmz8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161809301)
* * *
People send me a lot of leaked documents these days - mostly developments in targeting and silencing scientists working in government. [Federal whistleblowers ](https://substack.com/redirect/ca7ad5a7-f35d-4712-800e-4179b170ab82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)need someone they can trust.
This leak, however, concerns national security and a covert operation to illegally surveillance and target people and groups whom the current administration has deemed a threat for being too "woke" or expressing opposition to the Trump/DeSantis agenda.
I haven't the slightest capacity to confirm this information outside of the sources (which include federal law enforcement officials).
I'm hoping someone who subscribes to this newsletter can help me look into it.
With those disclaimers and cautions clear, what this information amounts to is a [Lavender AI](https://substack.com/redirect/edff64fe-9aa5-4442-8c9e-3e25dcae6625?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) level surveillance system on Americans for the purpose of political persecution.
Think Arnim Zola in Captain America: Winter Soldier.
Here is the leak in its entirety, unedited:

subject: Your Book to Expose the Climate Myth
body:
Your book to expose the Climate Myth. They claim CO2 is a pollutant – but real science proves otherwise.

\-- Your book to expose the Climate Myth. They claim CO2 is a pollutant - but real science proves otherwise. -- The Green Lobby wants control. This book exposes how the CO2 Coalition is exposing their lies. --With 180+ scientists on our side and endorsing this book, we're pushing back against the Climate Cult's agenda. --We're fighting for your freedoms with real science. Learn why CO2 is not the threat they claim.
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8uth0rchtvrkv0fjmbba89o4o9a7l43s41lrcq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm2pr2cjh2bs)
---
Friend, The Climate Cult is pushing their BIGGEST lie yet: that the very air you exhale - carbon dioxide - is a "dangerous pollutant" that must be regulated and controlled. **_Their real agenda?_**__**_To control every aspect of your life_** _,_**_from the car or truck you drive to the stove you cook on._** The CO2 Coalition is fighting back with an arsenal of truth that the Green Lobby fears most: real science. With over 180 renowned scientists, including 2022 Nobel Laureate in Physics Dr. John Clauser, we're exposing the Climate Fiction that's being used to steal your freedoms. _**[_**Your immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 will help us flood the public sector, schools, and halls of Congress with scientific truth that dismantles their fear-mongering propaganda.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu86cn339technv3l5g0nc3lu19mcjmd0m66oaio_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm2pr2cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **EXCLUSIVE OFFER - DONATE NOW AND**
**RECEIVE MY BOOK AS A GIFT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zodr1idc7c5bepovnf187k78f4k50fdkspqjr0pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm2pr2cjh2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9hj9bkq6fks7he4nh1t30s0go7rlnifqt3cna40_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm2pr2cjh2bs)
---
Friend, our impact is already sending shockwaves through the establishment. Governments, international organizations, and big businesses are all getting behind the false climate narrative and seeking to silence voices like ours. That's because the science, the facts, and the data dispute what you are being told. **Not only is there NOT a climate crisis** , but the human condition is THRIVING because of modest warming and more CO2.
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq5aus0ldsjrpjb7d6oem6k6qr1nhc9uvoa4s3mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm2pr2cjh2bs)
---
_But the Climate Cult is doubling down._ They're pouring billions into "green" initiatives that will destroy our economy while enriching their political allies. And they're indoctrinating our children from kindergarten through college with their apocalyptic fantasy that seeks to infringe on our individual liberties and control people through fear. Your support today will help us:
* Publish groundbreaking scientific studies

* Launch aggressive education campaigns

* Fight back against Green Lobby propaganda

* Restore scientific integrity in our schools

With your help, we can reach MILLIONS of Americans this year with facts that shatter the Green Lobby's narrative. _**[_**Will you please make an immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 to expose the biggest Climate Fictions, defend the truth about CO 2, and fuel our efforts to preserve freedom?**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvkklmb871hvq42fgcf4cmfg1c33a77hc7lnvc2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm2pr2cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Fight Back Against Climate Propaganda - Donate Now AND RECEIVE LIMITED TIME BOOK OFFER AS A GIFT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3icj7rmpq3ptp3e4dserf4jogaflk07erkm7dt8_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hm2pr2cjh2bs)
---
_Time is critical, Friend._ **While we have momentum and truth on our side, the Green Lobby is working overtime to silence voices like ours.** They NEED to silence people like me and my colleagues at the CO2 Coalition because we tell a compelling, fact-based story that confirms _there is no climate crisis_. But we won't be silenced so easily, especially with you standing alongside us. _**If you donate today with an amount of $30 of more, I will send you my newest book as a gift for your support. This book contains all of the facts that you need to stand against the big lie. **_ Thank you for standing with science and truth. Together, we'll defeat the Climate Cult's dangerous agenda. Best regards, Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition P.S. The Climate Cult fears nothing more than informed citizens armed with scientific facts. Please don't wait - act now to protect our freedoms and restore scientific integrity.
---

But Friend, that 's the terrifying reality we could easily face if we don't successfully DEFEND President Trump's Senate majority from AOC and far-Left Senate Democrats! With the Left set to shatter spending records in the midterms, we're counting on your grassroots support to save America from this nightmare scenario. ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Senate GOP HQ ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. **Less than a month after we learned that Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and other top Trump officials accidentally texted war plans to a reporter, the _New York Times_ reported that Hegseth shared similarly sensitive information to another Signal chat – this one including his wife and other family members.**

The latest story about Hegseth’s carelessness with sensitive information is yet another alarming example in this administration’s unbroken pattern of incompetence.

**Hegseth should resign.**

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to chip in today to support my reelection campaign, so we can continue the fight to hold the Trump administration accountable:

Their actions are making our country less safe, putting lives at risk, and threatening our standing with our allies.

subject: Your Old Mug Wasn't Made in the USA... But This One Is!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your outdated & boring mug was NOT made in the USA. Fix that today!

|
---
| | | Dear Friend,

For many of us, a cup of coffee is how we begin our mornings. It is something that Americans do all around our nation. But have you ever stopped to think about where your mug was made? **Unfortunately, many mugs -_including the one you're using right now_ \- may be manufactured overseas, supporting foreign economies and workers.**

_But we're here to change that._ Introducing the **_"Proud American Workers"_** thermal mug, _proudly made in the USA!_ This high-quality, durable mug is more than just a way to enjoy your coffee - it's a way to show pride in the American worker and the values that have made our country great for so many generations.
---

| | | [GET YOUR MADE-IN-THE-USA MUG NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zn98pfvhrthmfraivtld95ej2ldgbcl2fll5a6v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4clh2bs "GET YOUR MADE-IN-THE-USA MUG NOW")
---

By claiming this mug, you're not only getting a product that will keep your coffee hot for hours, but you're also supporting American jobs and workers. _**[Show that you believe in the importance of keeping American manufacturing alive and thriving!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z320cri47s5l0c41hlpu1i0veeoggceilfedmq10_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4clh2bs "You believe in the importance of keeping American manufacturing alive and thriving")**_

We want to offer you an exclusive deal on this 1600dzing new mug. For a limited time, you can get your "Proud American Workers" mug for a special price. _**[Don't miss out - order now and start your day off right with a mug that's as American as the coffee you put in it.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3svgvad3pib6o8qbq254vvfk7qq6lasl37sn5t0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4clh2bs "Don't miss out - order now and start your day off right with a mug that's as American as the coffee you put in it.")**_
---

| | | [GET YOUR MADE-IN-THE-USA MUG NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlbta5p2ukur9bknr07agrqs5v8u1rofimpmh4fo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4clh2bs "GET YOUR MADE-IN-THE-USA MUG NOW")
---

Sincerely,

House Republicans

name: Gregory Wrightstone, CO2 Coalition
subject: Your Book to Expose the Climate Myth
body:
Your book to expose the Climate Myth. They claim CO2 is a pollutant – but real science proves otherwise.

\-- Your book to expose the Climate Myth. They claim CO2 is a pollutant - but real science proves otherwise. -- The Green Lobby wants control. This book exposes how the CO2 Coalition is exposing their lies. --With 180+ scientists on our side and endorsing this book, we're pushing back against the Climate Cult's agenda. --We're fighting for your freedoms with real science. Learn why CO2 is not the threat they claim.
| | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z3bkpd4k8i3c567rblalhqdj31eiden0l68mupto_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4c5h2bs)
---
Friend, The Climate Cult is pushing their BIGGEST lie yet: that the very air you exhale - carbon dioxide - is a "dangerous pollutant" that must be regulated and controlled. **_Their real agenda?_**__**_To control every aspect of your life_** _,_**_from the car or truck you drive to the stove you cook on._** The CO2 Coalition is fighting back with an arsenal of truth that the Green Lobby fears most: real science. With over 180 renowned scientists, including 2022 Nobel Laureate in Physics Dr. John Clauser, we're exposing the Climate Fiction that's being used to steal your freedoms. _**[_**Your immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 will help us flood the public sector, schools, and halls of Congress with scientific truth that dismantles their fear-mongering propaganda.**_](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zioir74m97vo0skl30sd1st9gssk3if7ds75g59o_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4c5h2bs)**_
---
[ **EXCLUSIVE OFFER - DONATE NOW AND**
**RECEIVE MY BOOK AS A GIFT**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zppv6qsduma9agh30pncgkie43i2es2t4l40ihvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4c5h2bs)
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zha01csffn0u8vfig7b07b5s28ll4a544od8cmi0_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4c5h2bs)
---
Friend, our impact is already sending shockwaves through the establishment. Governments, international organizations, and big businesses are all getting behind the false climate narrative and seeking to silence voices like ours. That's because the science, the facts, and the data dispute what you are being told. **Not only is there NOT a climate crisis** , but the human condition is THRIVING because of modest warming and more CO2.
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zsqjhfhf0e1t0j76cceduhr559fbte22of0p3p30_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4c5h2bs)
---
_But the Climate Cult is doubling down._ They're pouring billions into "green" initiatives that will destroy our economy while enriching their political allies. And they're indoctrinating our children from kindergarten through college with their apocalyptic fantasy that seeks to infringe on our individual liberties and control people through fear. Your support today will help us:
* Publish groundbreaking scientific studies

* Launch aggressive education campaigns

* Fight back against Green Lobby propaganda

* Restore scientific integrity in our schools

With your help, we can reach MILLIONS of Americans this year with facts that shatter the Green Lobby's narrative. _**[_**Will you please make an immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 to expose the biggest Climate Fictions, defend the truth about CO 2, and fuel our efforts to preserve freedom?**_](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zv9hfstal7lf8kue66h6ffjg40eekmo60df82nso_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4c5h2bs)**_
---
[ **Fight Back Against Climate Propaganda - Donate Now AND RECEIVE LIMITED TIME BOOK OFFER AS A GIFT**](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8cpvlvvrca0i9gl4k4juj8d2e1uull8h277p4sg_rp22sh2s8i6eob5c9hmaor4c5h2bs)
---
_Time is critical, Friend._ **While we have momentum and truth on our side, the Green Lobby is working overtime to silence voices like ours.** They NEED to silence people like me and my colleagues at the CO2 Coalition because we tell a compelling, fact-based story that confirms _there is no climate crisis_. But we won't be silenced so easily, especially with you standing alongside us. _**If you donate today with an amount of $30 of more, I will send you my newest book as a gift for your support. This book contains all of the facts that you need to stand against the big lie. **_ Thank you for standing with science and truth. Together, we'll defeat the Climate Cult's dangerous agenda. Best regards, Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition P.S. The Climate Cult fears nothing more than informed citizens armed with scientific facts. Please don't wait - act now to protect our freedoms and restore scientific integrity.
---

The Department of Justice just received a criminal referral for corrupt New York Attorney General Letitia “Tish” James alleging that she committed FRAUD! New York Post: Trump administration refers NY AG Letitia James for potential prosecution over alleged mortgage fraud Despite her infamous declaration that “no one is above the law” when she launched her witch hunt against President Trump, Tish James thought – and acted like – she was above the law. And it turns out that while she was busy leading a sham prosecution to try to BANKRUPT President Trump over bogus accusations of fraud, she may have been guilty of committing REAL fraud all along! For far too long, Far Left Democrats have abused the legal system to target their political opponents, all while sweeping their very real corruption under the rug. I’d hate to see another corrupt Democrat politician escape accountability! So, to show that the American people want justice to be served, I’m gathering 50,000,000 petition signatures calling for Tish James to be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law. It’s now or never, Fellow American. This is our one chance to hold corrupt politicians like James accountable and restore justice to America! Thank you, Rep. Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

## **[Stop Religious Discrimination Against Faith-Based Charter Schools](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae4b829e68c142c98c3b72f615cbc3f0&_e=YsMNoea6p-AwOllon5HPQYdizSMCqrjr78vxlid8JHYlbxoUHw5dzoKaCuen8LlbjZaxDm9MkgRTryo7giV7bFsrq_My0dN9aGTqseHvGjAl0WsJ6eZuHgFVv2gBG-b4X0KMSzXOjsrSvBih5j19JvAnV3Qg1sJ1e8FORWO2mseBEGfU0jM4JPvIhKEfltno1ENhnMJ0QdLv59rRKRENHSrBUBEyAnjoDNDf-XDgHxQDSh4-u-kylMHA_rNQYMnJNt6JR4V1X9dttX9sLslbx48F7N0K-GYq2sX1nFtIIpL_n7D0xdDtw_JkRWlW-vWuDT7s7hbphF0h4E2J7NFQ1p5QkUatHuMSlkUJn_z9bC0OybIcUU_pHtyJPeukJonv)**
Oklahoma actively discriminates against religion in its charter-school program.

St. Isidore of Seville Catholic Virtual School wants to be part of Oklahoma's charter-school program, and they're just as qualified as any non-religious charter school.

But because St. Isidore is religious, Oklahoma's Attorney General sued to force the Board to cancel St. Isidore's contract after the Board accepted its application. And the Oklahoma Supreme Court sided with the Attorney General.

That's why we're proud to defend the Board all the way to the Supreme Court.

We'll argue _Oklahoma Statewide Charter School Board v. Drummond_ this spring.

We're standing up to religious discrimination in Oklahoma to protect religious freedom in states across the country.

And we'd love for you to join us.
[ Give Now](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ae4b829e68c142c98c3b72f615cbc3f0&_e=YsMNoea6p-AwOllon5HPQYdizSMCqrjr78vxlid8JHYlbxoUHw5dzoKaCuen8LlbjZaxDm9MkgRTryo7giV7bFsrq_My0dN9aGTqseHvGjAl0WsJ6eZuHgFVv2gBG-b4X0KMSzXOjsrSvBih5j19JvAnV3Qg1sJ1e8FORWO2mseBEGfU0jM4JPvIhKEfltno1ENhnMJ0QdLv59rRKRENHSrBUBEyAnjoDNDf-XDgHxSvgupNaxulmM5NC1wFH83Axj0R9TFYr-7oubp3NjoIkvtp3e3OxY74_M-UuZfZvoP0_cAI7Ffp5efAOZA1N1AMtkUOYwdAD-_1uOHaOUFkwMij8fbLbxsIhEWThesOuKPC5sF10hG6oTMGpzfBqme0)

---
Friend,
I’m honored to serve as the new Chair of the Republican Party of Virginia — **and I’m ready to fight.**
Let me be clear: the future of Virginia is on the line.
We _must_ elect **Winsome Earle-Sears** as our next Governor. We _must_ stop radical Abigail Spanberger from taking the Executive Mansion. We _must_ elect **Jason Miyares** as Attorney General and keep far-left extremists out of the AG’s office.
And we need a strong Republican as Lieutenant Governor to break ties in the Senate — and help us stop the madness.
In the Senate, I see firsthand what it means to be in the minority. That’s why we _must_ win back the House of Delegates and build a conservative firewall.
The Democrats are already raising millions. They’re organized, extreme, and relentless.

clean_body: | | | | The fight has already started. Friend, I’m honored to serve as the new Chair of the Republican Party of Virginia — and I’m ready to fight. Let me be clear: the future of Virginia is on the line. We must elect Winsome Earle-Sears as our next Governor. We must stop radical Abigail Spanberger from taking the Executive Mansion. We must elect Jason Miyares as Attorney General and keep far-left extremists out of the AG’s office. And we need a strong Republican as Lieutenant Governor to break ties in the Senate — and help us stop the madness. In the Senate, I see firsthand what it means to be in the minority. That’s why we must win back the House of Delegates and build a conservative firewall. The Democrats are already raising millions. They’re organized, extreme, and relentless. Now it’s our turn. | | Chip in today and help us take Virginia back. Let’s go win, Senator Mark J. Peake Chairman Republican Party of Virginia \- = PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

* * *
With Pete Hegseth at the helm of the Defense Department, America teeters on the brink of disaster.
His brazen recklessness—leaking classified war plans to his wife and brother via his personal phone, and disastrously including a reporter in another top-secret military communication—is not merely irresponsible; it is a breathtaking act of negligence.
Just like Trump, Hegseth and his cohorts have shown an appalling, possibly malicious, contempt for our national security. By jeopardizing American lives, he has proven himself unfit for his position and must either resign or be dismissed immediately.
**In any sane administration, such a catastrophic breach would trigger immediate resignation or termination, with criminal charges almost certainly following.**
******[We implore you to join us in urging Congress to DEMAND the immediate resignation of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOax66ocefz8bIaB7q-lQFz68chwWSufJIbWdAShmcJeuTLWeUCym_Ob-7SPybWhlJyo3T1E4VKk2GQa54z36UUqb4wmUFWWjMNVfur6H0RJ6Zs06gz4cNt_IHs1j6gTGgrEzZTB9gNdUn6rcw8wAklCGsQ0uCdfzdVFBmwd4V8pN3TLZOKWHUznKS9_1LC-tA4AZ-Gf5TJbibouoWvG4odty6Y2EXEC_1SlTW7nceFwZtFQ9tUREXxmWmLZxbb9sFDYxe7QMFr3KEJCVhTlLGZoJo5w76KLlW9uZtYdQzkqcVA8V7FKhf7kgcxc5xMlO99vwPr6YLyl8LTJaiMpOhC-JrZrFeAFuWqyfQ-Hs66TQDg/4fu/mhFjYXVuTBKAq3igH6syMA/h2/h001.g_nkefOQdXQGmreJ875YfNY192P6zeje1CIppdO0QhQ)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm396MCpkY7Ue0aOf7CTWHOax66ocefz8bIaB7q-lQFz68chwWSufJIbWdAShmcJeuTLWeUCym_Ob-7SPybWhlJyonJPiyQXPMQa2zCSCpugmsMvnhaaG_2JxqfD6biJa7HXiK_v1x2swoTpL8aJ7QL-sdVd_f5QjBhXGHvw_X5qykKoI0bpLd9RkrKkhVLPrAvQYEpjnv01oWnsXqKnDSkdg5KuZizEii-vvGnwJ80WIBtqOsx_IYZUMOwgn9Tpb8YytZ8dae_VAFFJJHkQ0KbAGeXlmtPcgJCxNS8Dcf86c3sAE1R6JDnCvBv2eUH3qocTDImLhs7wL_HIVy7zQgmxC5QF3Ro78EvPGv0ruAvxY9Qo3IbmFXGN3Hs9qwaXiqws/4fu/mhFjYXVuTBKAq3igH6syMA/h3/h001.9qKDZqdRkqHthmRf4lXtl0XzLj-uY3a-HAZWXbYHWJ8)

Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. | | Peter, I have a saying: _The people closest to the pain, should be the closest to the power._ **I believe that in order to serve, you have to understand.** My mother was a hairdresser and my father was a union bus driver, but growing up, I watched both of my hard-working parents struggle to balance bills and raise kids. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106235047/540849036/1861023790?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_042125_LIVEDIT_30DO30MO_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmUxMTIyZi1jZDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGLzYwP0ag_soueC2bcJt7t5byUg2qBtHHpt0OwpYQ8=) **I know the struggle that the working class is facing because, Peter, I lived it.** And I don’t know about you, but I’m tired of billionaires who don’t know the first thing about economic insecurity telling us how to fix the problems our communities are facing. Throughout my career, I’ve fought to lift Pennsylvania’s working families out of poverty, and I know that Trump’s “plan” would be a disaster. Between his tariffs and DOGE’s reckless cuts to key government programming, the situation is dire. If the MAGA administration _actually cared_ about working families, they’d be **investing in public schools** , not dismantling the Department of Education. They’d be **defending Social Security** , not threatening to cut it. They’d be **supporting the working class** , not leaving them in the dust to fund tax breaks for the ultra-rich. **[Peter, I need your help. It’s up to us to keep standing up to Trump’s administration and fighting for Pennsylvania. By chipping in even just $10, you can make a difference in the strength of our message. Can you make a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106235048/540849037/1861023790?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_042125_LIVEDIT_30DO30MO_RES1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmUxMTIyZi1jZDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RGLzYwP0ag_soueC2bcJt7t5byUg2qBtHHpt0OwpYQ8=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.
