name: [TOP PAC] REPUBLICAN ROUNDUP
subject: The Texas GOP’s Big Bads
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=5GciQ1HqI%2BL47pPeiaX3ijN8g%2BngVMD1lUj3svbEWFauYwQdTze2r29BXaQ0JvD7HgRuNRQfMn9P7YAVryIw6bboQ5anImtN3hPTaVk67vpeP2xkd5QDG9wn4lO%2BWP1Sh9nsXAWlGEY1OuAALRN6FJFVaUj4xpIwOMybtUOZoJOJeBnf%2F3RS8vhlXsMWxtST%2BwXUWnzsGuu0SpIJ48aK1UWGJnmnD5OL4miF0RFuEOLpi9ZKZFdmxTNvq7bBznfgWXt3OtvFacj%2F4%2Bi5rkuZx8AWsE6z1BSGB1ihPrZndRQbAueydBZRfkwmXszz4gvTr%2Bu54sgtn2LLLvrK%2BFl9PdQJO6S7xhrlla7P25n652s7nITZJZiqII%2BD5KAd9C%2BCha5InTFdHqTUPmxQdhsXeV%2F4HH2ZDypHmxNTMBKwnk0%3D]

# [#]
Hey Peter, it’s the team here at TOP PAC. We wanted to give you the rundown of all the Big Bads we’re dealing with in the Texas GOP. Help TOP PAC engage and mobilize Black and Latino voters with a donation today, and read on for our full Republican Round-up!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_042125_ROUNDUP_ATO_RES1

Governor Greg Abbott
Of all the Republicans in Texas, Appalling Abbott might just be the worst. From publicly saying he would shoot immigrants if it weren’t illegal, to accepting the largest single political donation in Texas history ($6 million!) from a school-voucher-supporting GOP megadonor, one thing’s for sure: Greg has got to go. Donate now to help us fight back against Appalling Abbott!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_042125_ROUNDUP_ATO_RES1

Lt. Governor Dan Patrick
Nicknamed “the king of right-wing talk radio” for his extreme anti-LGBTQ+ and anti-immigrant rhetoric, Dan Patrick’s long history of pushing conspiracy theories on national television almost rivals that of Donald Trump. On top of that, he accepted a $3 million contribution from Defend Texas Liberty, a PAC tied to white supremacist Nick Fuentes. Rush a donation now to help us get rid of Dirty Dan!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em?amount=10&refcode=SBD_TOP_EM_FR_042125_ROUNDUP_ATO_RES1

Attorney General Ken Paxton
Ken Paxton stood trial for impeachment in the Texas Senate for abusing the powers of his office. He also made a name for himself as the man who viciously targeted Dallas mom Kate Cox and personally took away her right to receive a potentially life-saving abortion for a nonviable pregnancy. When Ken is not attacking our reproductive rights, he travels the country seeking medical records of children who have been forced to leave Texas to receive gender-affirming treatment due to the statewide ban on transgender care for minors. Will you donate now to help us defeat his extremist agenda?

Together, we can chip away at the GOP’s hold on our state, elect candidates up and down the ballot who will truly represent our Black and Latino communities and build the Texas we deserve. All we’re asking from you is a donation of any amount:

If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [] [#] Hey Peter, it’s the team here at TOP PAC. We wanted to give you the rundown of all the Big Bads we’re dealing with in the Texas GOP. Help TOP PAC engage and mobilize Black and Latino voters with a donation today, and read on for our full Republican Round-up! Governor Greg Abbott Of all the Republicans in Texas, Appalling Abbott might just be the worst. From publicly saying he would shoot immigrants if it weren’t illegal, to accepting the largest single political donation in Texas history ($6 million!) from a school-voucher-supporting GOP megadonor, one thing’s for sure: Greg has got to go. Donate now to help us fight back against Appalling Abbott! Lt. Governor Dan Patrick Nicknamed “the king of right-wing talk radio” for his extreme anti-LGBTQ+ and anti-immigrant rhetoric, Dan Patrick’s long history of pushing conspiracy theories on national television almost rivals that of Donald Trump. On top of that, he accepted a $3 million contribution from Defend Texas Liberty, a PAC tied to white supremacist Nick Fuentes. Rush a donation now to help us get rid of Dirty Dan! Attorney General Ken Paxton Ken Paxton stood trial for impeachment in the Texas Senate for abusing the powers of his office. He also made a name for himself as the man who viciously targeted Dallas mom Kate Cox and personally took away her right to receive a potentially life-saving abortion for a nonviable pregnancy. When Ken is not attacking our reproductive rights, he travels the country seeking medical records of children who have been forced to leave Texas to receive gender-affirming treatment due to the statewide ban on transgender care for minors. Will you donate now to help us defeat his extremist agenda? Together, we can chip away at the GOP’s hold on our state, elect candidates up and down the ballot who will truly represent our Black and Latino communities and build the Texas we deserve. All we’re asking from you is a donation of any amount: [] [] [] [] [] Texas Organizing Project PAC runs the largest, independent get-out-the-vote political field programs in Texas, focusing on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters. name: Jeff Jackson
subject: Three wins
body:
And the last one is the biggest

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9qZWZmamFja3Nvbm5jLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.EQV0R_I3OQHj-lPOXECvSJbALlemIADA9mg_UUT5fPg?) for more

# [Three wins](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=161808410&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxODA4NDEwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDUyNTQzNTksImV4cCI6MTc0Nzg0NjM1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6mvNcHnH0OAiHWz_HhkWv74VpTjMu7f8Z9fg7a6OKsY)
### And the last one is the biggest
| | [Jeff Jackson](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---
| Apr 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jeffjacksonnc)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=161808410&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxODA4NDEwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NTI1NDM1OSwiZXhwIjoxNzQ3ODQ2MzU5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTE0NTAyMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.v5Zv0iWikM7_Ma_PENK6U0awYZC2mwE2weSbAEXldtM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=161808410&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxODA4NDEwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDUyNTQzNTksImV4cCI6MTc0Nzg0NjM1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6mvNcHnH0OAiHWz_HhkWv74VpTjMu7f8Z9fg7a6OKsY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1145021&post_id=161808410&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxODA4NDEwLCJpYXQiOjE3NDUyNTQzNTksImV4cCI6MTc0Nzg0NjM1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExNDUwMjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6mvNcHnH0OAiHWz_HhkWv74VpTjMu7f8Z9fg7a6OKsY)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamVmZmphY2tzb25uYy9wL3RocmVlLXdpbnM_.yzeo_J_sn84YTfyutNWL-uVh_FmJFiHYFTW3CuwfMi0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jeffjacksonnc/p/three-wins?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Sometimes I have to work on something for a while before I tell you about it.
Let me give you a couple examples:
## **Safe to Rebuild**
Over the past month, we've been working on an initiative to help western North Carolina.
When Hurricane Helene first hit, our primary focus was making sure people weren't being price gouged for things like water and gas.
Now that we're past the immediate aftermath, the concern isn't price gouging so much as what comes next: property crime (especially at construction sites), contractor fraud (lots of work starting, much of it unlicensed), and scams claiming access to federal funds.
So we launched a project - _Safe to Rebuild_ \- focused on stopping those risks before they grow.
It kicked off last week with press conferences in Haywood and Watauga Counties. They looked like this:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b73dd4d-0706-43a5-a704-20d9d82aa2e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Haywood County
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f630c22b-8f80-4ba9-84f1-a2f5b85b8689?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Watauga County
I was joined by law enforcement leaders from across the region, and the message was simple:
If you're thinking about stealing from or defrauding people who are trying to rebuild their lives - don't. You will face consequences.
And to every mother and father wondering whether it's safe to stay and rebuild: we're doing everything in our power to protect your family. Your safety is our mission.
Contractor fraud is a major concern, so we posted a guide on our website: how to vet a contractor, plus three basic rules - get multiple estimates, get your contract in writing, and never pay the full fee up front.
During the press conference in Haywood, a family was walking by. They waited for it to be over, and then came over to say hello. It was a great moment because it was exactly why we were there, and I hope families across western NC heard our message and felt a little better.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a678489-7a0c-4de2-aa0f-77e1ac458b95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Fentanyl money laundering**
My second example is one I can't tell you much about yet - but it's coming.
As you know, people die from fentanyl in our state _each day_. For people my age and younger, it's one of our leading causes of death.
Stopping that means fighting on multiple fronts. One of the biggest: money laundering. In other words, how the profits from fentanyl trafficking are cleaned and moved through the financial system to keep the operation going.
The good news is that our state recently passed an anti-money laundering law. I'm the first AG in North Carolina with that tool.
So in my first couple of months on the job, I had extensive meetings with federal and state law enforcement about this. Then I took what I learned, brought it to my team, and we worked out a plan.
Then I took it to other AGs. They are reviewing it as you read this.
Soon, I'm going to share a lot more with you about fentanyl money laundering. It is massive in scope, likely more than $100 million _per week._ That means that disrupting these financial networks isn't optional - it's essential.
I'll keep you posted.
## **Three wins**
* My first official action as AG was to take six mega-landlords to court for using RealPage AI software to unlawfully raise people's rents. Well, the first of those settled with us last week. It was a good win for thousands of renters across the state. More to come.

* We reached a multimillion-dollar settlement with a pharmaceutical company for its role in fueling the opioid crisis. That money will support addiction treatment in communities across our state.

* Marisa joined me for the inaugural ball, which was rescheduled from January due to weather. As you can see from this photo, _I won._

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ed23f76-2a27-4392-8b76-fe4cd0657dbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Best,
Jeff Jackson

name: Steve Simon
subject: This is what democracy looks like

At a time when so many are trying to make it harder to vote, spread disinformation, and erode faith in our elections, Minnesotans—especially young people—are proving that our democracy is still strong.
**And I want you to know: It didn’t happen by accident.**
We passed automatic voter registration.
We restored voting rights for over 55,000 Minnesotans.
We allowed pre-registration for 16- and 17-year-olds.
We protected election workers from threats and harassment.
We’ve fought back against lies and disinformation every single day.
That’s what it takes to make democracy work—not just in theory, but in practice. And it’s working.
I’ve made it my mission to ensure that every eligible voter in Minnesota can make their voice heard—no matter who they are, where they live, or what challenges they face.
**That mission has never felt more urgent, or more personal.**
[**Thank you for believing in this work and being a part of it. Together, we can keep moving forward. Please help me hit my April fundraising goal by chipping in $10 or more now →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106236170/540853174/-1506296379?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250421&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JmMzQyZGEtY2YxZS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ccKGv87dDUxxi1gfD3Z906mIXI-DPn4GrRgfTKZbgDo=)

His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. name: KamalaHarris.com
subject: Pete Hegseth
body:
When Senate Republicans voted to confirm former Fox News host Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense, it was pretty clear to everyone paying attention he was unqualified and unfit for the position.
# [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/2780?t=1&akid=519%2E2563979%2EL2Mdgr)

Peter --
We’re writing to ask you to choose a donation to the Democratic Party today. Here’s why:
When Senate Republicans voted to confirm former Fox News host Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense, it was pretty clear to everyone paying attention he was unqualified and unfit for the position.
And the truth is, even most Senate Republicans knew it too.
They looked over one shoulder and saw the brave men and women who signed up to sacrifice for their country -- then they looked over the other shoulder and saw Trump.
And they chose Trump. Out of nothing but fear.
So here we are, months later and Hegseth is talking about war plans on messaging apps, several of his top aides have been dismissed in the last week and a longtime aide just left his job saying the Department of Defense is in “total chaos” and “disarray” under Hegseth’s time as Secretary.
**Here's the point: Republicans have proven time and time again they will choose Trump over the country, even when they know it's wrong. This is just one example. There are plenty of others.**
And the next chance out of this mess is to flip the House or Senate. And the Democratic Party needs your help to get it done. Campaigns are already underway. So please:
[**Make a $5 contribution to the Democratic National Committee today. They will put your donation to work electing Democrats up and down the ballot in the next elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc?refcode=em250421-1A&refcode2=519_2563979_L2Mdgr&akid=519%2E2563979%2EL2Mdgr)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Before Bernie & AOC step foot in Montana
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Bernie Sanders and AOC recently brought their socialist road show to Montana | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=cc1457f1f65c48148b3ab90f9b258999&_e=-QPwUFbyVHPM7xxE1fqTmzjKIlFP4Z7aeKn6nbt4uixruVsQwJvWZ3WRVP7jmisWoCGgOJ1IyGUSwnwlRGQ6hHP8uZF7G-t8GNjkB-6zFv3qXoLTF5Ha29xEpqDaEiRKFiVJbt3ShgrsoCWgi0Wkf6M4HWCvTL47fXY4l7krjYjHUXrY9gV1r1SKXFIB3eeX8LDkyiICi-y19Z27xXWogBM6xzNDCJl-bslwvw8gPqgSq1rwR2fhoako5E8q550NiWkx2NF1B2WjP-PExtJoMKYgWLpFTnCy1jMxER1YR48bMpnzvG4Z6GtwpNJCpCjnzCbUrGSDkMvFWWjGsP0_OfwpIf4uSny_iXo1xqXs2zUquL95oxOIXYVfjC5ZMK9cuzjm5wSIGDlYKdrFfAf6_w%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Bernie Sanders and AOC reently brought their Socialist road show to Montana.

Thousands of radical activists and extremists are going to flood into Montana to rally behind Bernie and AOC’s radical agenda. **Their message is clear – Montana is on their 2026 target list!**

Just last year, Montana faced an unprecedented fight in the race for U.S. Senate, **with Democrats spending a record-shattering $160 MILLION**. Now, Bernie and AOC are preparing to unleash their army of megadonors on Steve for leading Republicans in retaking the Senate Majority.

**That’s why we are coming together to ask for your help.** These are unprecedented times, and they require unprecedented action.

name: Save the Redwoods League
subject: What California’s snowpack means for giant sequoias
body:
Big trees + deep snow = good news | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106236971/540856153/779512579?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth-day-2025&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZDhhMDBmLWQyMWUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E8BIlUDs5nXa0kT-9RWD2909BBgrL_8nXkLb_22HM-U=&emci=11c7a41e-011c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=96d8a00f-d21e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)
---
| |
---
| | _Winter snows at Alder Creek Grove mean spring snowmelt for thirsty saplings and a reduced risk of wildfire in summer. __Photo by Roy E. Williams II._
---
Dear Peter,
---
Our planet is nothing if not transitional. It wobbles and spins on its axis, zooms around the sun, and gradually sweeps across the galaxy as part of the spiraling Milky Way. On its surface, the Earth is a shifting mosaic of intricately connected ecosystems, including one of our favorites: California’s Sierra Nevada, home of the giant sequoia. This Earth Month, we’re sharing some positively average news from the Sierra. Because sometimes, average can be extraordinary. According to the California Department of Water Resources, the **[state snowpack](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106236974/540856159/-1374182362?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth-day-2025&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZDhhMDBmLWQyMWUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E8BIlUDs5nXa0kT-9RWD2909BBgrL_8nXkLb_22HM-U=&emci=11c7a41e-011c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=96d8a00f-d21e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)** was 96 percent of average as of early April. In the northern Sierra, it was well over 100 percent. In the central and southern Sierra, it was at 91 and 84 percent, respectively. This is the third consecutive year California’s snowpack has been near or above average. It’s also the first time in 25 years we’ve seen a three-year streak of winters with near-average snowfall. That’s amazing news, considering 2016 to 2021 saw the state’s worst drought in 500 years.
---
---
_A March 2025 snow survey in El Dorado County days before an early spring storm raised snowpack levels to well above average_ _.__Photo courtesy of Ken James / CA Department of Water Resources._
---
Giant sequoias, those ancient sentinels of the Sierra, have seen it all before. They grow at elevations that straddle the snow line and can handle a bit of precipitation whiplash. But long term, sequoias need adequate winter snow. Especially baby sequoias. With their shallower, developing root systems, saplings require surface water, like snowmelt, to grow. This winter’s white stuff will be a boon to the next generation of sequoias trying to **[regenerate in the wake of extreme fires](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106236977/540856190/-1934251713?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth-day-2025&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZDhhMDBmLWQyMWUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E8BIlUDs5nXa0kT-9RWD2909BBgrL_8nXkLb_22HM-U=&emci=11c7a41e-011c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=96d8a00f-d21e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)**. Deep snow also prevents sequoia groves from drying out as quickly in the summer, essentially shortening the fire season and reducing the risk of future megafires. The good snow news is mostly concentrated in the central and northern Sierra, meaning sequoias in these groves can bask contentedly in their springtime snowpack. Southern Sierra groves haven’t enjoyed quite as much snow cover and may face the risk of wildfire sooner—but Save the Redwoods League is on it. We’ve worked hard to restore fire resilience to sequoia ecosystems in the southern Sierra, including the **[Alder Creek](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106236980/540856193/1941887230?utm_source=ea-mar&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=earth-day-2025&sourceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2ZDhhMDBmLWQyMWUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=E8BIlUDs5nXa0kT-9RWD2909BBgrL_8nXkLb_22HM-U=&emci=11c7a41e-011c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=96d8a00f-d21e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1504551)** and Packsaddle groves. When warmer, drier conditions return, these groves will be better prepared to survive and thrive. If you have the chance, go walk amongst these giants while they’re still wearing their springtime best. You’ll never experience quiet like the stillness of a snowbound sequoia grove. And this Earth Month, raise a glass with us, toasting an extraordinarily average snowpack. See you out there,
---
Save the Redwoods League
---

clean_body: Big trees + deep snow = good news | | | | | | | Winter snows at Alder Creek Grove mean spring snowmelt for thirsty saplings and a reduced risk of wildfire in summer. Photo by Roy E. Williams II. Dear Peter, Our planet is nothing if not transitional. It wobbles and spins on its axis, zooms around the sun, and gradually sweeps across the galaxy as part of the spiraling Milky Way. On its surface, the Earth is a shifting mosaic of intricately connected ecosystems, including one of our favorites: California’s Sierra Nevada, home of the giant sequoia. This Earth Month, we’re sharing some positively average news from the Sierra. Because sometimes, average can be extraordinary. According to the California Department of Water Resources, the was 96 percent of average as of early April. In the northern Sierra, it was well over 100 percent. In the central and southern Sierra, it was at 91 and 84 percent, respectively. This is the third consecutive year California’s snowpack has been near or above average. It’s also the first time in 25 years we’ve seen a three-year streak of winters with near-average snowfall. That’s amazing news, considering 2016 to 2021 saw the state’s worst drought in 500 years. A March 2025 snow survey in El Dorado County days before an early spring storm raised snowpack levels to well above average .Photo courtesy of Ken James / CA Department of Water Resources. Giant sequoias, those ancient sentinels of the Sierra, have seen it all before. They grow at elevations that straddle the snow line and can handle a bit of precipitation whiplash. But long term, sequoias need adequate winter snow. Especially baby sequoias. With their shallower, developing root systems, saplings require surface water, like snowmelt, to grow. This winter’s white stuff will be a boon to the next generation of sequoias trying to . Deep snow also prevents sequoia groves from drying out as quickly in the summer, essentially shortening the fire season and reducing the risk of future megafires. The good snow news is mostly concentrated in the central and northern Sierra, meaning sequoias in these groves can bask contentedly in their springtime snowpack. Southern Sierra groves haven’t enjoyed quite as much snow cover and may face the risk of wildfire sooner—but Save the Redwoods League is on it. We’ve worked hard to restore fire resilience to sequoia ecosystems in the southern Sierra, including the and Packsaddle groves. When warmer, drier conditions return, these groves will be better prepared to survive and thrive. If you have the chance, go walk amongst these giants while they’re still wearing their springtime best. You’ll never experience quiet like the stillness of a snowbound sequoia grove. And this Earth Month, raise a glass with us, toasting an extraordinarily average snowpack. See you out there, Save the Redwoods League | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Gary Sinise
subject: This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
body:
A Memorial Day to Remember
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcRExC-hEGWzkc5E_j2ski6Bxr26fulBe1gmeYK5TxWaJ4wEHXyqZ-3B5oK_3LY9kYwaix0InN6EmwOMQhIMgSWMdqBfvBhCdVVTcDSbBqagFxvqMhQYMJXV1IpxUTclhS11TM-nalc-BMVOF2MFPjr6)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcRvXiXAi14M98N1OcqMT1ttuQHTqro_K0CsQRoN2ponzsWAR3Iik-KSeZlbh5ibssD8-Cb4EQ_WpXftAN2u5C6HWVk4Py9i6vpCadqybu8_4PS7dWR7Fy9vZSe-c5d4mMpFBdjOfZJn1k7papiTgkn1)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcS6kLdTSdPD7t1bdbwkkl_yrg6wNVNyOpJqkWovuJtH8tdtESfvTG-r9ySoSeAzmzHa6NnJxqWJh42cEA6NyOkjQs7zHK-rjYoBm5JCYQZxY44IBGT5TC7ady-fjkBejm_js04vg3tdcZWQF7NBGTDn)
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcSlqB5bILtC95iSnjXPyCXW-FtJ0W-XzcH6yjRpAKO2sYnCBpwqsnM_aRIhHtaoLLRNPdawUje-4h48UFXWvXhFd8kYaCqBBQRVFmR8IS7eG6EWgcyAU8kZkJW_K29ou49MKan1wKtnby5ycDQmjbCG)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhV2m8Lts5AOIv93sMXZYyAer1QLdFVf5ALM8Pooo1m9_Xsb5IPUxgPz_gU0NH4X8yUByAyubntUCPOKtXghJVnV5pxxUqDdIa8kReQiF6aqiCF01D-nvBa2lLIuTXjTbZfncEtbLvfRCqIVfPbbkd7lk534_ZsnwC9CmX1GaMMFed_O_u7QrPIeorHq5VXTycLL2G4khs2Lrr1UPVgAFkgvb_ot47gmXcb_EG8GNMP9E%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcTQH229_yMPyNSROJaOQoOo9yjVcMPa7jCTpAHZkZjAiRm08V3Nnca4utqe4Np7S2AU1KxSTck4vu78Dc5dBwG3323U33thjtpGH2pBDoL2LTzguqR1rhNBPx7U8XnIG7UCGeMFw1WARTQbLL9ry0DW) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcT-zgJZ_SRUzEjYGklXDVNFF7rZJTVEScztoqu2bxQQLfOB1EuXZhZWTlo1yySAXrzrccHBafqkCg3m8B1F7AkuTUOXy-JhkCWU9epN4e2JMr6hRWh8VuOUJyTtTQsfkuIGsC7SG1ISMHwvmg1w3CoD)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcT-K0OevPhjubAqBEWJ0cGDUCbdQ1lmVpC3iHBi8MFVCtlgjKtj7bzaUY0SFHjOuKKC_F6WXqUIPqvLgziGbfSrM70X0ll0HxY_CoUpxxkDeJG94LqRbIOvC2B-V7rCVrMaLitTQo9lyeyBpuW_qtFM)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcSWUqU4MIyNLZw7HKx73sU_CMtNokUvLRtbH9lnCyMoPh9tqmAM2ttEFk8tnZvxSsvWpSZBlHY7qNsP9Ubi4e0JFyV4q3nU_QRvL0VJ0gImKvVfCvb14jl5L26b0DdRy3jPIsIPYJks-8DxkZxNg05B)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=820b38d350a7488bbaa913b6c41e73f3&_e=t4AkHsknRYukgI1DmMt9n8cRjTSiIb1Rnr8cF2rgC244jUHfCQSiapAHlsbvHFZhQyUIX12nqKmFTKSWhq7zZonOpy-SKG-EgU-vS3KD-qBS061aA-cQ54RqoZbUgPI2IlqzIpF8y8yh8385R0IUu4pw_Hd1bsRhfCFi7ol8kcSd0te3dBtgfmDvA9_zyupVLhIKjPRDEyPAa2jwg1fkcSCQghZIEP8CNwi_MsjbqZpEstckvlNRRZzhU7NzQ_G-xu3J3ZPQNJOoWV_pxqZKKtZaN7ZkpdHSfq6r1hmmzIX53D2msEKevRB06GbA4gVv)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Cohen-Sanchez, Zee
subject: Trump just declared war
body:
|
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://owrmxay.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0NTgxMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUyMzExOTYyNjg5MDc5MjIwLFwiclwiOjE1MjMxMjAwNTIwMTQ5NTEwM30iLCJzIjoiYTE0MzgxZjY2YWJjYTYzMiJ9)
---
| Friend,

**Trump just declared war.** No, not against Greenland, or Canada, or Mexico. _At least not yet._ He has declared war against us. Against America.

For starters, Trump sycophant Steve Bannon has declared that**Trump will run for a third term,** a move so blatantly unconstitutional it should be viewed as a declaration of war against the American people.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://owrmxay.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0NTgxMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUyMzExOTYyNjk3NDY3ODMyLFwiclwiOjE1MjMxMjAwNTIwMTQ5NTEwM30iLCJzIjoiOTQzMjQ0Y2RlNGQ2MTE2ZSJ9)
---
| And just last week, Trump was caught on a hot-mic telling El Salvadorian dictator Nayib Bukele that he wants him to build more prisons for “home-growns” aka U.S. citizens. **You got that right, Trump plans to illegally send U.S. citizens to torture prisons in El Salvador without due process.

** This comes as Trump refuses to return illegally deported and imprisoned Maryland father Kilmar Abrego Garcia from El Salvador - in direct defiance of the Supreme Court’s order to have him returned. All whilst the Trump administration continues to target foreign students who protest—sending unmarked cars with masked agents to arrest them.

---
| | [ ](https://owrmxay.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0NTgxMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUyMzExOTYyNzA0ODA3ODY3LFwiclwiOjE1MjMxMjAwNTIwMTQ5NTEwM30iLCJzIjoiZTg0MzdlZjQ4Njk1YzIyOCJ9)
---
|
As Trump continues his all out war on America, the "very smart people" leading our movement in DC are twiddling their thumbs - totally incapable and unfit for this moment.**We can’t afford to wait around until 2028 for the next anointed savior of the party and National Ground Game PAC isn’t planning on it.
**
We just got out of the trenches in the FL special elections, where thanks to the millions of doors we knocked, we **helped Democrats shock the nation** with a 22% (FL-01) and 15% (FL-06) improvement in Dem voter turnout which if replicated across the 2026 midterms will mean dozens of House seats flipping blue.

And without skipping a beat, next week, we will be on the ground at Texas A&M, confronting fascist Charlie Kirk and organizing students to resist the Trump administration on their deep red campus.

**We won’t let Trump wage his war on America without fighting back.**[ ](https://owrmxay.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0NTgxMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUyMzExOTYyNzEyMTQ3OTAzLFwiclwiOjE1MjMxMjAwNTIwMTQ5NTEwM30iLCJzIjoiM2IxYTk1MzYzM2NkMTI5ZCJ9)[National Ground Game has boots on the ground across the nation, doing the only type of organizing that will save our country from the clutches of the fascism (no one else, including our party is doing this) - can we count on you to support our critical work with a donation of whatever you can spare?](https://owrmxay.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjE0NTgxMTIsXCJsXCI6MTUyMzExOTYyNzE5NDg3OTM4LFwiclwiOjE1MjMxMjAwNTIwMTQ5NTEwM30iLCJzIjoiZTNkMjJjNDBkYjYxMjUzMCJ9)

clean_body: But I need you to hear it all the same. | Peter, The other night I sat down to put my thoughts to paper. I didn’t want to fill your email with a lengthy message, so I’ve scanned my letter to a secure page for you to read. What I’m about to say will SHOCK you to your core, but I need you to hear it all the same... BRACE YOURSELF and then please read the letter I wrote for you in full: READ NOW >> Thank you and God Bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust |

### Communication Platforms
Communication is what brings an organization together. Let's talk about some of the platforms we use.
[Facebook](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe1Gk_EbrFGTcorV5gr1Bb_ZThAATOkunbJSLgeI6YUDs&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2025_april_statewide_remind&n=4)\- We have a new page. Make sure you're following us.

name: Jena Griswold for AG
subject: Colorado needs a legal firewall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250421-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250421-email]
Friend,
As Donald Trump ramps up his agenda and threatens sweeping federal mandates, we know what’s coming—unconstitutional executive orders, political overreach, and attacks on the values we hold dear.
That’s why Colorado needs a legal firewall. And that’s why Jena Griswold is running for Attorney General. Will you chip in today to help elect a fearless Attorney General who will stand up to Trump? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250421-email]
Jena has never backed down—whether it was protecting our elections as Secretary of State or standing strong in the face of extremism. As Attorney General, she’ll defend our state from unjust federal mandates, protect reproductive rights, and safeguard Colorado’s elections from political interference.
Trump’s allies are ready to test the limits of power—and Jena will be ready to meet them in court. But we need to build a campaign strong enough to win.
This isn’t just about Colorado—it’s about defending democracy, justice, and the rule of law.
Be part of the team that puts people over politics. Rush your donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2402-q2-jg-launch?refcode=250421-email]
Thanks for standing with us,
Jena Griswold for AG

# BLUE LETTER
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/46e02a47-0c23-4009-9ae3-393bc4553892?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Picture credit: Joe Simon_
### From MAGAs Torching GOPers in Town Halls to Dems' Embracing the Fight--You Can Feel The Zeitgeist Changing
There's a storm brewing--and for once, it's not being led by guys in "Camp Auschwitz" sweatshirts leading a January 6th blitzkrieg of tantrum-prone, truculent traitors on the Capitol rotunda. No, this squall is out in the towns, in the streets, in the _soul_ of a country sick to death of dictator cosplay, cruelty-as-policy, amateur doofus-ry and stuff-your-pants-with-dollar-bills shady.
When a fossil like Chuck Grassley looks like he might yank out his rotary phone to call the cops because he's heckled--cursed out, tbh--**by MAGA Republicans at his own town hall** , there's something happening here, as Buffalo Springfield might say. Especially when **it 's as MAGA a crowd one can find** outside a Klan-bake.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fe001495-6511-4b1a-ab30-e533587ad2b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Even more heartening, they weren't yelling about their own losses--jobs, farms, 401Ks--but Trump's illegal deportation of a Latino man to a torture prison in El Salvador. They were "pissed" at "dictator" Trump and at Grassley, for not doing squat to help Kilmar Abrego Garcia and other victims of the fascist deportation pact Trump cooked up with El Salvador's Bukele.
Oh, but there's more. **[>From Rep. Jasmine Crockett calling Trump a criminal](https://substack.com/redirect/5e6a0804-778a-4cf2-9b92-ae213836e643?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ in broad daylight](https://substack.com/redirect/5e6a0804-778a-4cf2-9b92-ae213836e643?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> As far as I'm concerned, he's a lot less criminal than the person that's sitting in the White House 'cause last time I checked, he doesn't have any criminal convictions. I don't even think he has any outstanding cases, versus the guy that still had cases pending when he was sworn in on January 20th and also has 34 felony convictions.
> So listen, I don't want to hear anything from the Republican Party about how they trying to keep us safe when their fearless leader is actually the biggest criminal thus far that we have seen because I haven't seen anybody with a rap sheet that looks like the president's.
(Again, fellow Democrats: Every time Trump calls someone innocent a criminal, **not making him pay by reminding everyone he 's a convicted felon**, is criminally-negligent messaging) to Americans protesting in over 700 acts of defiance--across the country--April 19th. It's clear: We're done playing nice with criminal wannabe-dictators, and the cloying, cut-rate collops who carry their luggage. It's time for another bloodless revolution, [like the one that vastly improved America nearly 100 yrs ago](https://substack.com/redirect/b3bb9900-9d8d-43c0-8d38-f366609ff016?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), under FDR.
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber**_
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.J-x1SEcjLzTbwuE-e_tEjrkn-JYpho1hz8RoeiHfKN8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161806720)
Democrats, finally, are no longer limited to just a few voices speaking out harshly, but as an entity are starting to act like they've read the script of history--and realize extras, due to their lack of importance, [are eventually eliminated from the film](https://substack.com/redirect/4251a8dc-75ae-4149-aae2-846608aa8aa0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They're calling out our own, including leadership, which led to Chuck Schumer's apologizing and postponing a book tour.
Meanwhile, Democrats jump into primaries to run against incumbents not able or willing to fight. And they're being helped by Parkland mass-shooting survivor, David Hogg's PAC, which is supporting primaries while he serves in party leadership as DNC Vice Chair. An unprecedented act making clear the times we're in. Also, though, it's raison d'etre is unprecedented: It's not about ideology. Be progressive, center-left or moderate, **but be willing to fight** , or David's group will support a challenger who is.
Meanwhile, courage is doing its thing and being contagious. [Chris Van Hollen put boots on the ground in El Salvador](https://substack.com/redirect/6d483f36-47b8-4a4a-8d46-f361b07ce3f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), risking his own safety to spotlight the depravity of Trump's death-by-deportation pipeline. And he's [calling out Democrats dismissing its importance](https://substack.com/redirect/0ddf4ac6-64e0-4d36-a486-112def3f3bbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as an issue. Cory Booker made history to create enough spectacle to get the media's attention with his record-breaking filibuster.
This isn't the "look forward, not back" Democratic Party of yesteryear. There's a new wave of lawmakers and candidates that punch back--or first--,hold the line and get the stakes. And they'll pressure those without the stomach for the fight to find it, or go away. Either way, the party gets stronger, and we end the criminal tyranny hiding in the corpus of a flatulent, fatuous, flaccid, bone-spurred, moron-American who sees rage, insecurity and stupidity as staples of a healthy daily regimen.
**PS: See the huge April 19th turnout below! While it 's great to have MAGA faithful screaming for justice at town halls and Democratic elites in this fight, it's those who cared from the beginning--and take to the streets--who are the top of the spear.**

We can be as one tonight! - U2 | | | Apr 21 | | | | | | | | | | | | BLUE LETTER | | ---|---|--- Picture credit: Joe Simon From MAGAs Torching GOPers in Town Halls to Dems' Embracing the Fight--You Can Feel The Zeitgeist Changing There's a storm brewing--and for once, it's not being led by guys in "Camp Auschwitz" sweatshirts leading a January 6th blitzkrieg of tantrum-prone, truculent traitors on the Capitol rotunda. No, this squall is out in the towns, in the streets, in the soul of a country sick to death of dictator cosplay, cruelty-as-policy, amateur doofus-ry and stuff-your-pants-with-dollar-bills shady. When a fossil like Chuck Grassley looks like he might yank out his rotary phone to call the cops because he's heckled--cursed out, tbh--by MAGA Republicans at his own town hall , there's something happening here, as Buffalo Springfield might say. Especially when it 's as MAGA a crowd one can find outside a Klan-bake. Even more heartening, they weren't yelling about their own losses--jobs, farms, 401Ks--but Trump's illegal deportation of a Latino man to a torture prison in El Salvador. They were "pissed" at "dictator" Trump and at Grassley, for not doing squat to help Kilmar Abrego Garcia and other victims of the fascist deportation pact Trump cooked up with El Salvador's Bukele. Oh, but there's more. : As far as I'm concerned, he's a lot less criminal than the person that's sitting in the White House 'cause last time I checked, he doesn't have any criminal convictions. I don't even think he has any outstanding cases, versus the guy that still had cases pending when he was sworn in on January 20th and also has 34 felony convictions. So listen, I don't want to hear anything from the Republican Party about how they trying to keep us safe when their fearless leader is actually the biggest criminal thus far that we have seen because I haven't seen anybody with a rap sheet that looks like the president's. (Again, fellow Democrats: Every time Trump calls someone innocent a criminal, not making him pay by reminding everyone he 's a convicted felon, is criminally-negligent messaging) to Americans protesting in over 700 acts of defiance--across the country--April 19th. It's clear: We're done playing nice with criminal wannabe-dictators, and the cloying, cut-rate collops who carry their luggage. It's time for another bloodless revolution, , under FDR. Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders telling you what others won 't. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.Please become a paid subscriber Democrats, finally, are no longer limited to just a few voices speaking out harshly, but as an entity are starting to act like they've read the script of history--and realize extras, due to their lack of importance, . They're calling out our own, including leadership, which led to Chuck Schumer's apologizing and postponing a book tour. Meanwhile, Democrats jump into primaries to run against incumbents not able or willing to fight. And they're being helped by Parkland mass-shooting survivor, David Hogg's PAC, which is supporting primaries while he serves in party leadership as DNC Vice Chair. An unprecedented act making clear the times we're in. Also, though, it's raison d'etre is unprecedented: It's not about ideology. Be progressive, center-left or moderate, but be willing to fight , or David's group will support a challenger who is. Meanwhile, courage is doing its thing and being contagious. , risking his own safety to spotlight the depravity of Trump's death-by-deportation pipeline. And he's as an issue. Cory Booker made history to create enough spectacle to get the media's attention with his record-breaking filibuster. This isn't the "look forward, not back" Democratic Party of yesteryear. There's a new wave of lawmakers and candidates that punch back--or first--,hold the line and get the stakes. And they'll pressure those without the stomach for the fight to find it, or go away. Either way, the party gets stronger, and we end the criminal tyranny hiding in the corpus of a flatulent, fatuous, flaccid, bone-spurred, moron-American who sees rage, insecurity and stupidity as staples of a healthy daily regimen. | | | | You know it. We know it. Lizzie knows it: The 2026 midterm elections will be some of the most important we’ve ever faced. And winning back the majority in the House is one of the best ways we can put a check on the Trump administration and the House Republicans who have handed over all of their power to Donald Trump and Elon Musk. Lizzie and our team are dedicated to engaging TX-07 volunteers year-round, ensuring our community stays informed, energized, and ready to take action. That’s why we’re keeping our campaign office open year-round as a hub for organizing, outreach, and community-building efforts. To make this possible, we depend on the support of grassroots donors—and we are especially grateful for those who commit to giving each month. Recurring contributions help us plan and give us the steady funding we need to focus on organizing, not just fundraising. Will you help by starting a monthly donation today? | | | **[BECOME A RECURRING DONOR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106239717/540865903/149676988?refcode=lpfe250421&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDRjYjAwOC1kOTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xg9wincE87rM-DbeFUOoVt2k8FVG_EkHfZ1QV_MjrCU=)**

# [Sign: Demand Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth RESIGN >> ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f4e73a2-d212-451b-8ee5-84a28c33a9b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64874a7a-38f3-48af-ba51-8855894de083/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Last month, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth put our troops in danger when he shared secret details about American military strikes on Yemen in an unauthorized group chat that mistakenly included a journalist from the Atlantic. Now, new reports show that Hegseth shared this sensitive information in ANOTHER group chat that included his wife, brother and personal lawyer. Who knows what other secrets he has shared, and with whom?! Pete Hegseth endangered American troops with his carelessness, ignoring security protocols and posting secret military information within an app available to anyone with a cell phone. With Hegseth as Secretary of Defense, our national security is at risk. Our troops’ safety is at risk. He needs to resign IMMEDIATELY. [Sign your name to demand Pete Hegseth RESIGN >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12992a75-8235-46f6-9bfc-85a828870433/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Last month, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth put our troops in danger when he shared secret details about American military strikes on Yemen in an unauthorized group chat that mistakenly included a journalist from the Atlantic. Now, new reports show that Hegseth shared this sensitive information in ANOTHER group chat that included his wife, brother and personal lawyer. Who knows what other secrets he has shared, and with whom?! Pete Hegseth endangered American troops with his carelessness, ignoring security protocols and posting secret military information within an app available to anyone with a cell phone. With Hegseth as Secretary of Defense, our national security is at risk. Our troops’ safety is at risk. He needs to resign IMMEDIATELY. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Got a progressive cause or organization you want to promote? ) | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: =?utf-8?b?4oCcSG93IHRvIGZpZ2h0IFRydW1w4oCdICh2aWEgVlBQKQ==?=
subject: Bernie Sanders is LEADING the fight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to see this:
| **🚨 BREAKING: DEMOCRATS FIGHT BACK! 🚨** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89191?t=6&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o) Bernie Sanders is LEADING the charge to take on Trump and save our Democracy. We’re _THRILLED!_

**Trump and MAGA Republicans are already attacking him relentlessly, so we’re sending Sen. Bernie Sanders a MASSIVE letter thanking him for all his amazing work!**

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign, friend, so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Senator Sanders now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89191?t=7&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89191?t=8&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o)
---
TO: Sen. Bernie Sanders
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Senator Bernie Sanders,**

__Thank you for all your hard work leading the Anti-Trump resistance!__

It’s easy to feel helpless with MAGA Republicans in charge of the House, Senate, and White House, but you keep us hopeful that we can fight back.

**I know it isn’t easy fighting off Trump and the GOP’s escalating threats to take you down, so please know that Democrats _across the country_ stand with you.**

Your leadership is absolutely critical right now, and we hope more Democrats follow your lead.

[**I can’t thank you enough for all of your work to stop Donald Trump and save our Democracy! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremists like Donald Trump. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89191?t=9&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89191?t=10&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19583%2E878179%2ETNqR9o)

Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a. to request fewer emails. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Today (not tomorrow)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
With things moving so quickly now, Mark can’t count on making up for lost time if we miss our goals. Emails like this are the main way he funds the work he’s doing to notch wins in 2026.
#

That’s right.
We’re asking if you can chip in to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
Not tomorrow, not next week, not in a few months, not two years from now.
[**Please, chip in to Mark’s campaign today so that he has everything he needs to combat the Trump Administration and Elon Musk as they chip away at the foundation of our democracy.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250421-1-500&t=1&akid=6047%2E6688874%2E2Zd6og)

With things moving so quickly now, Mark can’t count on making up for lost time if we miss our goals. Emails like this are the main way he funds the work he’s doing to notch wins in 2026. That’s how we’re going to check Trump’s power — and that’s the only way we’re going to restore some sanity and stability.
We don’t know what’s coming tomorrow, but if you can afford to chip in today, we’re hoping that you will. Whatever comes our way, it’d give Mark a lot of peace of mind to know he’ll have the resources he needs to defend against Elon’s attacks and go back on offense.
On behalf of Mark, we’re humbly and respectfully asking you:
[**Can you make a donation of anything — even $5 or less — to help Mark stay on track to his 30,000 contribution goal for April? That’s not just an arbitrary number. It’s a benchmark he needs to hit to do the work this year.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-apr25.P7mRSa&refcode=em250421-1-500&t=3&akid=6047%2E6688874%2E2Zd6og)

name: Karen Bass
subject: Tune in today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Re-Elect Karen Bass for Mayor 2026 (FPPC ID #1471359)
body:
Friends,

Today, I’ll be delivering my annual State of the City address to update Angelenos on our path forward.

We’ve shown we can do tough things when we confront challenges head on. Homelessness fell for the first time in years after we shattered the status quo. Homicides have dropped after we implemented a comprehensive approach to public safety. In the wake of the largest natural disaster our city has ever seen, we are leading one of the fastest recovery efforts in our state’s history.

Downward economic trends and additional costs mean that we cannot operate as business as usual. We must come together and unite as we prepare to welcome the world for the World Cup, the Olympic & Paralympic Games, and so much more.

2025 State of the City Address
Monday, April 21, 2025
12 P.M.
WATCH HERE [https://mayor.lacity.gov/SOTC2025]

Time after time, we’ve proven our strength when we come together and push for big, bold changes to how the city operates. I know we’ll rise to the challenge once again.

Karen Bass Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP24/1/94612/images/Karen%20Bass%20Signature%20Vector%202.png]
Paid for by Re-Elect Karen Bass for Mayor 2026 (FPPC ID #1471359)
777 S Figueroa St
STE 4050
Los Angeles, CA 90017
United States
Additional information is available at ethics.lacity.gov
info@karenbass.com [info@karenbass.com]
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://act.karenbass.com/p/Gv8tYyzXe0uLjsvflLSnqw2?unsubscribedata=mB5rEXxW5kxkVHrM%2BYsOcM8v8WeerCSypkgmobpENmqqCbns%2B%2FVEGX1wJ5kMopKhcRefAzeKev9KDdLGs3FpCqIhVkfQoshaFPIPFChuMtXUpogLNSIfVK8LPPBQj4NQ1YqadiVmprnh5k%2Br7C6tKSsbKyLxMosaI44PW7SFj7IvAA%2BXmo53X1ia6dyxAaV1zCl%2BDKABZLO1FK5TjUAPCZ0pWdMJvlhdP5MXQwfhdJA%2BDbHjiPLRReqqEhKB%2Fm1ddxEYaXAWJVPzUA3ZrYPUXbbf9IPoCk%2FnbJZJc06VpFXD1y4SaGhLjsuRFru3GpUdkJwuW9vPBjU%2BYml9QNBbWA%2BiQYs5%2BFdczEjBFivgmpP5kJNBBuci1ld4hsfl%2F9INo%2FOUeghx3WuLEIEcuxUWzRX1oUUOsBbc7iDK54srwSk%3D]

name: Gary Sinise
subject: These heroes are counting on you
body:
This could be the last chance to honor WWII veterans on Memorial Day
It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event. It's Gary Sinise here... I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.
| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2x1lXMR0BjKkXjC6majywmbQ0CJBex08lmOYQaaaL7FgDr04bnVp7EBLbF1KCk8OzdvVB2S02Coiwmq-N2RXjQGZ5xSzBrCA52dZ7mduTBqrGf0BSdFozgUWENswkdYWtlfFCnxdhd5_M89Ot_mxVvf)
---
Friend, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 __and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **Now, I'm grateful to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal on the 20th anniversary of this important event.** This year will be a remembrance like no other, as we commemorate the 80th anniversary of victory in World War II and the 250th birthdays of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps. **[Friend, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENTIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2yuwo49yPvl_f0hEeP0-h-lrDKfK7_UdVC8iTAVH1vUnqxVLMYEHxk5wgsRSt_2FDvPlIwPRhwmawODrSCJoYVhYe9GmoIlVUr4nIQWLWR6aC4GZ_Uc1e-WZz154VFEMPL3LZ9y63rTAaREVm2ogAK_)**
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2xkLr89tVf1j2894_M_VrUF003kjp4bai8y_s6FNw1yzn7E8wqBw5oZrIdZ165YDSUh9ZsXQpHJ8LSOgUo55a7jMpAEUIT9VE4wwdsPxInhahmuphqajHe7CShjMhBMt9_PDkxOVxsb4MGf11jEA05n)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2zmAZqlegYu5smXE_hi_YGmrrw9VHOW92ZuE0H0exA9nGXRgmH2MGvmnPx-MAEdPHhXU7eBPHBN2PZdudjsr1baJ1PmJeYFkEwxXdCpTKTi7HR0OEyP9CvbWfabPKe10r06PXIi2HE5j-NtbAjPdpjx)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that 's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ **But I want to reiterate that American Veterans Center does not take ANY federal funding for this event. It is funded _entirely_ by private citizens like you who want to honor those who have sacrificed so much for our country.** Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.

* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzm7zkAii3GhbPQE105XgbrYytLCD5oLX8Am5NA7l5WBs26RNR2Z0AK7SYm6eyZHyO5SPx44u9yZKt-09R0IdGYV6kXLLedmw9wHvduWFM_zE6WEfFOOZ__akJNuF7JjGNVLZ8nmu_pHyL0oXL3oNLNHxOkCqFBuaaJqLt3ZPph6YnRRrjGO8GOouHNw_L8acOeUmJnUx0bIkpDcuthBNWdwwohAWKOqB_RSlX8VKPbT0%3D)[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2zHtjhdGSYvuDw59cTN1jGc4NUTa0z4WUCJj7PFuXOGEP5gJGTgMpVsExnUeS8mritiv-mRJWa5NWqRIVwPLxS_--WuOMwxW7F1cITeuWrcB1MzVDMqxH92rTAn7bhH07PVv6QvoLskkrY5YGwzKFsR) If you've been looking for an opportunity to give back to those who have given so much for our freedom, this is one of the best possible ways you could do it. _And for a special group of veterans, this might be one of the last chances we get._ You see, with each year that goes by, we lose more and more of our World War II veterans, and for the few we have remaining, traveling to Washington, D.C., for the parade is difficult. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. _But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade._** ** **That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. ** So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us.
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2xxgo_1Oen4roMwO_Elpx5VlIQXaVOW0g60P7Ng6_dzBTDCmfMiDwNvWT5BY_aazhXvRC_v3f8FYQQHZ9JmDdMmu9dlFnbz2Q0TRxeVWF1hP_NZDp-74OKJt9nPrO0fEj7oLXW_sQt3pGrXnRvDnY6Z)
---
And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ _**[Friend, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - if you're able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now during its 20th anniversary.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2zYBQdU3hBrVGVSmChaXMuwXL4b6LvDYFLmnObimvPwQUKqTC23uUFgpI7TdAIk2jK71vCYqpC7e_PXgSBuZOdrya6GiGwF41F48_QVO2nyHjJ9AC_rcRX2x7tmXgZwyTUXiG1tPPKdGTuWzwvLJzWX)**_ Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2wQIl_sGW_r49uzkR6-FQmhAU2Cx2m8e8Zp6qNFPZz9Qv2pibZy4yE8200lxyBKnDQyP6LL_wqUekfSNSx9DqnLRnFg_tDsO7mkf6HfjPlmTFbtANwPPgfuOh_-cFqC5aHex1tsVHnotYOm_mRVPtxU)
---
[ **Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_e=nT9ylDKW10LqkECVCr0XujqBadEhsekDe8rpR0uHUJlRrFKkcD34-mnCpkfzXoFzhz1ZoqjDhoEEm-Ml6aLhULGkIdfx9KPQXry6_SdVBDbX6evshUBTOm7nneCGATzHJZQoxbTQB5VbKxzqlKF1Vjfcf1fdwRvfnOhJqNgqx2zQ-WGisk3YKB85cT4YQ8piaXGkoYOK-jltjlekD5-wLOk_efw0qN1mhCBinB2SpJgmYmBO7emizaX-_SMxGn3KWJVu4kAHk2LZg1tNBlRHPKOJZCQVT0NUd65IC3lNeXiaf191sr3jmOOy0EvzTBNO)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

[Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=2ad1505209eb466c96e598f1850742f1&_t=RPywNrfgq8oPqe6sa2W8hVzOoHXjCW3lhFMG6Gbk2lQId3tbISMl3FhMLX_rKZNRhCmnHpYRYWO4GoNGTxI06B30IESYyaEb5a5btgLYIwDrTfuwD0ZZriEfft6hyEkc)

---

WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. That's why we are making a concerted effort to ensure these veterans are at this year's National Memorial Day Parade to honor them one last time. So this year, as we mark the 80th anniversary of victory in Europe and Japan to end World War II - and the 250th anniversaries of the Army, Navy, and Marine Corps - I encourage you to help us honor these brave veterans while we still have them with us. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. ** Sincerely, Gary SiniseHonorary Grand MarshalNational Memorial Day Parade The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Troy
subject: From the scrapbook (8 photos)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
My story’s a little different than most.

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._62OK8Ds3L2NERtQ)
---
Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this.

Peter, it's Troy Downing.

If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that **I only care about three things: God, family, and country.** **[I’m fighting in Congress to defend those three things for myself and every American.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-cHyLzsxA8M3T0g)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._qwA)
---
Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever...

Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point.

**I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG.** I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning._X2LH9Jm5txMg)
---
We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store.

We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto:

**“These things we do, that others may live.”**

I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. **[I’m fighting in Congress to preserve our American way of life, protect our God-given rights, and defend our nation with everything I’ve got.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
I’m fighting in Congress for **GOD** so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **FAMILIES** so our kids have every opportunity to succeed.

I’m fighting in Congress for our **COUNTRY** so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation.

Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight.

[**If you can spare just $5 or $10, that’s all it takes to make a difference – seriously!**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._KCxqB4EZQ) I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me.

I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. **[If everyone reading this chips in $8, I’ll hit my goal!](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**
---
[ **DONATE TODAY**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDQyMV9DVS1WUC4xMTAxMTdfdDE2MjkwODQtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTA0MjFfQ1UtVlAuMTEwMTE3X3QxNjI5MDg0LTI4OTkifQ/qLR1QmCNmY1hQJ0v-SHyTg)
