clean_body: My story’s a little different than most. | | | Never could this young boy have imagined he’d one day be sending an email like this. Peter, it's Troy Downing. If you don’t have much time, all you need to know about me is that I only care about three things: God, family, and country. Growing up, I was a bit of a nerd. I studied mathematics and computer science in college. Then, I started my own business, which merged with Yahoo!. I started other small businesses in insurance and real estate, but then my life changed forever... Like millions of Americans, September 11th was a turning point. I immediately enlisted in the United States Air Force/ANG. I served two tours of duty in Afghanistan as part of a Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) squadron. After eight years of service, I was honorably discharged from the Air Force and returned home to Montana with my wife and kids. We are partners in a local distillery in Bozeman, and when the COVID pandemic hit, our company went above and beyond to help our friends and neighbors. There was a shortage of toilet paper, sanitizing wipes, and hand sanitizer in every store. We quickly turned our whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer production facility to provide free hand sanitizer to families, first responders, and hospitals. In the Combat Search and Rescue (CSAR) Community, we live by this motto: “These things we do, that others may live.” I’ve taken this motto with me in everything I do. I’ve taught my kids to live by this. And now, my public service is not finished. I’m fighting in Congress for GOD so we will never forget that we are one nation UNDER God. I’m fighting in Congress for our FAMILIES so our kids have every opportunity to succeed. I’m fighting in Congress for our COUNTRY so every future generation can still call the United States of America their home and the best country that has ever graced God’s creation. Peter, defending our conservative House Majority and advancing President Trump’s agenda won’t come cheap. Democrats are chomping at the bit to flip the House BLUE so they can turn every state into the next California! I can’t let that happen, but I’m hoping strong, loyal Patriots like you will help win this fight. I don’t have billionaires on speed dial or Hollywood award winners to campaign for me. I depend on like-minded friends and neighbors like you to chip in a few bucks. With your help, Peter, we can save our country and put God, Family, and Country FIRST. God Bless, Troy Downing (R-MT) | | | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. Troy Downing For Congress P.O. | | Dear Peter,
---
A devastating cyclone took away homes, churches, and schools — but it couldn’t take away the **JOY**! It was both humbling and inspiring to sing and dance with the children of Mozambique. They had very little, and lost what they had — yet they carry such incredible joy. **God, make me like one of these.** **WATCH ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎**

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Peter, A devastating cyclone took away homes, churches, and schools — but it couldn’t take away the JOY! It was both humbling and inspiring to sing and dance with the children of Mozambique. They had very little, and lost what they had — yet they carry such incredible joy. God, make me like one of these. WATCH ⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ | | | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship

I understand it is a lot to ask at a time like this. But I promise you-- it will be worth it when we make history once again together! I will never forget when you stood with me when it mattered most. God bless you and God bless America, -- Mayra Mayra Flores Conservative for Congress (TX-28) | | | Paid for by Mayra for Congress PO Box 516 Los Indios, Texas 78567-0516

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Reminder - Commendation Town Hall Tonight
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/Bulletin.jpeg]
Boysko Bulletin: Commendation Town Hall Tonight
Dear Peter,
Tonight, I will be joined by Delegate Karen Keys-Gamarra to present commendations to members of our community.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20April%20Campaign/Copy%20of%202025%20April%2021%20Commendation%20Town%20Hall%20%281%29.jpg]
We will gather at Reston Community Center at Lake Anne (1609-A Washington Plaza N in Reston) at 6:30 pm, Monday, 4/21. We will have time to hear your concerns and answer your questions - there's a lot going on. See you tonight.
Kindest regards,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2024%20February%20Images/electronic%20signature.png]
Jennifer B. Boysko
Member, Senate of Virginia
Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church)
PS If you would like to support my work, please visit my fundraising page [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb27-website] .
Keep in Touch
I am back in District 38 with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, and Juliet Morro. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email Senator Boysko@senate.virginia.gov. Friend me on Facebook [https://bit.ly/2PskgOp] and follow me on X. [https://bit.ly/3uLhVhC]

Friends of Jennifer Boysko

United States

name: Team Moulton
subject: Exciting news out of North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Hey friends — it’s Team Moulton. We wanted to share some exciting news out of North Carolina. **Wiley Nickel is running for the United States Senate!** North Carolina needs bold, new leadership. Wiley will fight hard for working families and won’t shy away from the tough battles — not billionaires and special interests putting all of their energy every day of this administration into robbing from the poor to make the rich richer. **We have a golden opportunity to flip North Carolina's Senate seat by defeating one of the most at-risk Republicans, Thom Tillis. That means your support plays a pivotal role in the outcome of this race.** As a state senator and United States Congressman, Wiley has a proven track record of working to secure a better future for North Carolina — and now, we need him to fight for us in the U.S. Senate. But we have our work cut out for us. This race is critical to our fight to win the U.S. Senate majority, and Thom Tillis’ Republican megadonors are committed as ever to trying to stop Wiley in his tracks. Here’s where it gets interesting: Ineffective, tired politicians like Thom Tillis are underestimating what we can do when we put our weight behind Wiley. When he was elected to Congress, he did it by flipping a Republican stronghold seat blue, so he knows firsthand that it takes a dedicated grassroots movement to win tough races. He’s lived it. That’s why he’s counting on us to help elect him to the Senate any way we can. [**We need all hands on deck to help Wiley retire Thom Tillis, win North Carolina’s Senate race, and do our part in the fight to win a Democratic Senate majority in 2026. Will you help his campaign hit the ground running by pitching in a split donation today between our campaign and Wiley's?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106242823/540876711/-670671768?refcode=250419_MFC_Nickel_ExcitingNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWM0NDcwMi1lMDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIUIj8_GyjEumXBIwbIYZVwvfrWDG5gUESX67pAhpUU=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106242824/540876712/1703389104?refcode=250419_MFC_Nickel_ExcitingNews&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWM0NDcwMi1lMDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIUIj8_GyjEumXBIwbIYZVwvfrWDG5gUESX67pAhpUU=) Thank you, Team Moulton

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Checking in with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
People are tired, frustrated, and looking for leadership centered on compassion, courage, and justice.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1470%2E400544%2EBOTl4x)
Hi, it’s Deb. I wanted to take a moment to check in with you.
We’re going through hard times – from economic uncertainty and stock market instability tanking retirement funds to troubling threats to our national security.
Like so many of you, I’m feeling the weight of it all. People are tired, frustrated, and looking for leadership centered on compassion, courage, and justice.
In times like these, I know our strength. I’ve seen it in communities – in New Mexico and across the country. We show up for one another. We speak out, organize, and fight – not with fear or hate, but with hope and determination.
**I’m ready to stand up to the Trump administration and fight for New Mexicans, but I can’t do it alone.****[Will you chip in $5 to stand with me in this fight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250421_1_checkin?amount=5&refcode=em20250421-1470&refcode2=1470_400544_BOTl4x&akid=1470%2E400544%2EBOTl4x)**

subject: This is how we fight back

body:
| Hi Peter,

Donald Trump is systematically hollowing out our government — replacing career public servants with loyalists who are unqualified, ideological, and in some cases, outright dangerous.

He’s politicized public health, handed power to Elon Musk’s DOGE operation, and already done enormous damage here at home and around the world.

But recently, we proved that public pressure can still make a difference.

**The White House just withdrew its nominee to lead the CDC: Dave Weldon, a former Congressman with deep ties to the anti-vaccine movement.**

At a time when **measles is spreading across the country,** it is outrageous that someone who has spent years undermining basic science was ever considered to lead our nation’s top public health agency.

**This was a dangerous pick — and we helped stop it.** That’s a win. But make no mistake: this won’t be the last reckless nomination, and this administration won’t stop unless we fight back.

As a doctor and a Member of Congress, I’ve spent my career defending public health and evidence-based medicine. And now, as **DCCC Frontline Co-Chair,** I’m working to elect a Democratic House majority in 2026 that can restore **oversight and accountability.**

But I need your help to stay in this fight.

[**👉 Can you chip in $15 right now to help us hit our $4,561 mid-month fundraising goal and keep standing up to Trump’s dangerous agenda?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106243239/540878107/1123237933?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_20250419_FR_MMFR_0_6MO_AmiBera_NA_NA_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmZmZTJlNS1lMTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KYyxMhpt9GWBeXui4EzVH_AqNTvxJYBScx3uvR7THT0=)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Monday News Digest: 4/21/2025
body:
Truth, Trust, and the Call to Rise – A Special Easter & Passover Message
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**April 21, 2025** **MONDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
This Sunday News Digest comes a day late as we gave our team time to observe Easter Sunday with family and community. We begin by joining the global community in mourning the [passing of Pope Francis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), who died this morning at age 88. May he rest in peace.

We also want to extend warm acknowledgment to our Jewish friends and family who observed Passover last week. It’s rare that the final day of Passover aligns with the day America observed Easter—two powerful reminders of deliverance, freedom, and hope.

****To all our readers—whether you observe Easter, Passover, both, or neither—we’re so grateful you’re here. At the heart of these traditions is something we all value:**good will, trust, and truth.**
****
****Truth is the value of Rocky Mountain Voice—but truth leads to trust, and trust is what we call faith. Faith, at its root, is motivated by love—by goodwill.************

In a time when our culture is confused and our politics are divisive, this simple yet profound truth reminds us where to return: **truth grounded in goodness.**

Here in Colorado, we’re watching legislation pass that attacks parental rights, religious freedom, and the very identity of our children. It’s easy to grow discouraged—but Easter, and Passover, remind us that deliverance often comes through struggle, and that light shines brightest in the dark.
In his [Easter message](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), Pastor Drake Hunter reminded us that Easter is not just a memorial—**it’s a call to rise.** He says,__"the tragedy of Easter is that many remember the event without ever responding to its call."

Whether you come to this message through faith, tradition, or a shared desire for a more courageous and truthful world—we hope it encourages you.

Now is the time to suit up—not with fear or bitterness, but with the armor of purpose and clarity. As Pastor Drake says, “It’s not costume jewelry. It’s transformational gear.” Read more from Pastor Drake [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

So today, we don’t just celebrate a risen Savior—we answer the call to live boldly, love without fear, and walk in truth, no matter the cost.

Stay salty. Shine bright. And from all of us at Rocky Mountain Voice—Happy Easter, Chag Sameach, and thank you for standing with us.
In liberty and truth, The RMV Team
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[HB25-1312 and the silencing of parents: What the Rocky Mountain Summit revealed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) From court-ordered gag rules to the looming threat of custody loss, this isn’t hypothetical — it’s happening now. Colorado families gathered at the Rocky Mountain Summit in early April to share what it means to raise children under a system that increasingly treats concern as abuse.
**[The COvid Chronicles: Fifteen days that changed Colorado forever](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado changed overnight. In the first two weeks of April 2020, headlines shifted from public health to public control. Behind the fear and mandates were decisions—made daily—that reshaped lives and redefined freedom.
**[Polis’s $4M legal fund to fight Trump? GOP Senators say it’s a political power grab](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado Governor Jared Polis wants $4 million in taxpayer money to fight off the return of Trump—literally. Under HB25-1321, Democrats in the Colorado legislature are moving to shift $4 million from the state’s infrastructure fund directly into Polis’s office, allowing him to wage legal and administrative battles against the federal government, particularly policies implemented by the Trump administration.

|
---
**LEGISLATIVE SESSION**
**[Outnumbered but not outmatched: House Minority Leader Pugliese’s grassroots push](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) At the Colorado Capitol, House Republicans are outnumbered two to one. But House Minority Leader Rose Pugliese is still swinging—and she’s not swinging blindly.
**[Parents and Pastors Rally at Capitol to Stop HB25-1312 from Becoming Law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A coalition of pastors, parents, and constitutional advocates gathered Thursday on the West Steps of the Colorado State Capitol to oppose HB25-1312, the controversial “Kelly Loving Act” that critics say represents a direct attack on parental rights, religious liberty, and free speech.
**[Colo. Sheriffs call SB25-003 a ‘nightmare’ for rights, businesses and public safety](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE TRUTH ABOUT GUNS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Following Gov. Jared Polis’ signing of the sweeping gun ban measure last week, some Colorado sheriffs, who have opposed the bill all along, are still speaking out against the action.

**[Colorado legislature passes bill punting to local governments on how much restaurant servers are paid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A contentious bill pitting many restaurant owners against workers over how much tipped employees should earn was approved by the Colorado legislature Tuesday, with the restaurant industry feeling like it had achieved a small victory.

**[Ibotta CEO warns impending Colorado AI law ‘makes us look like we don’t get it’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[BUSINESS DEN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Feb. 1, 2026, could be the turning point for Colorado’s tech economy. That’s when SB205, a bill Gov. Jared Polis signed into law last May, goes into effect. The Consumer Protections for Artificial Intelligence legislation aims to proactively prevent consumer harm by regulating the use of “high-risk” artificial intelligence in “consequential decisions.”
**[READ MORE LEGISLATIVE SESSION UPDATES](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**STATE**
**[Colorado’s fentanyl crisis exposes a deadly failure of leadership](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A newly released report from Advance Colorado lays bare the devastating human cost of Colorado’s fentanyl crisis—and the state policies that helped fuel it.
**[Can the America-First movement win in Colorado? Heidi Ganahl and Rasmussen pollster break down Colorado’s GOP identity crisis](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) With Colorado’s 2026 elections on the horizon, Republicans are once again asking the question: What kind of candidate can actually win statewide?
**[Self-defense on hold: House GOP announces letter to AG Bondi at capitol press conference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A young woman in her twenties stood outside Rep. Scott Bottoms’ church recently and asked him for help—she needed a firearm. Not for sport. Not to make a point. For protection.
**[Yadira Caraveo launches bid to reclaim Colorado’s 8th District after razor-thin loss to Gabe Evans](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Democrat Yadira Caraveo has officially launched her campaign to reclaim Colorado’s 8th Congressional District—just five months after losing the seat to freshman Republican Gabe Evans by fewer than 2,500 votes.

_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[In first 100 days, Evans introduces six bills focused on fraud, safety and immigration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado’s 8th Congressional District—a nationally watched swing district—just saw its freshman Congressman, Gabe Evans, cross the 100-day threshold in office. The milestone highlights a flurry of legislative action, bipartisan wins, and scrutiny over constituent accessibility.

**[Yale Study shows Young people ages 18-21 are now overwhelmingly Republican](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[NEWSWEEK](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Young Americans are supporting the Republican Party in greater numbers, a new poll has found, highlighting a large divide among people aged under 30.

**[Hurd, Bacon, Gottheimer, Meeks introduce bill to restore Congress’ constitutional role in trade](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[THE FENCE POST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rep. Jeff Hurd, R-Colo., along with Reps. Don Bacon, R-Neb., Josh Gottheimer, D-N.J., and Gregory Meeks, D-N.Y., introduced bipartisan legislation to return Congress’ constitutionally authorized role in setting and approving U.S. trade policy. H.R.2665, The Trade Review Act of 2025, requires that unilateral tariffs proposed by the executive branch receive congressional authority.

**_[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Home Rule Charter Commission candidates must file by April 24 in Douglas County](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Writing the rules that will shape Douglas County’s future might sound like a job you’d rely on lawmakers to handle. But in this case, it could be your neighbor, your coworker – or you.

**[“Boomers at heart,” Gen Z and Gays Against Groomers: Adams Co. GOP kickoff focuses on unity, youth and shared mission](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Adams County Republican Party held its first general meeting under newly elected leadership on April 17 at the Crossroads Community Center in Northglenn.

**[Rep. Crank’s BLOC Act gains Mesa County’s support: “Align federal funds with public safety”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Mesa County commissioners want federal dollars tied to immigration enforcement—and they’re backing Rep. Jeff Crank’s bill to make it happen.

**[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Enos: What rushed gender and abortion bills say about the legislature’s priorities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Transparency is not really our current General Assembly’s goal. We would like to believe that our state government works for us, but the majority party in charge is more concerned with covering its own tracks to avoid any repercussions of accountability with the voters._
__
**[Garbo: A silent coup threatens democracy and our votes — Gabbard called it. Now we must act.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In a revelation that shakes the very foundation of our republic, Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has dropped a bombshell during a recent Trump Cabinet meeting: our election systems, the bedrock of our democracy, are riddled with vulnerabilities so severe they could undermine the legitimacy of every vote cast._
**[Tristan: Politics came between me and my daughter – love and faith brought us back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _A fundamental hallmark of the saga of human history, has been and continues to be, invention. Take communications for example. Less than 200 years ago, we relied on the Pony Express to send and receive communications over long distances._
**[Hunter: Faith-driven schools are proving that clarity and character create safe campuses](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In the face of rising cultural concerns over student safety and institutional trust, a quiet but significant shift in Colorado’s educational landscape is rooted in moral conviction, sustained by ethical character, and bearing fruit in meaningful outcomes._
**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming a RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com)](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**✈️ DID YOU KNOW?** In 1930, registered nurse and licensed pilot Ellen Church pitched a novel idea to Boeing: if women couldn’t be pilots, they could still serve in the skies as **flight attendants**. At the time, airlines hired only male stewards, but Church convinced them that female nurses were uniquely qualified to comfort anxious passengers and provide care in flight. Her idea took off—literally—and the role of the flight attendant was born. The nurse requirement lasted until World War II, when nurses were called to serve in the military.
|

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Students are being disappeared. Congress must act.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Donald Trump’s fascist government is ramping up its political attacks on
pro-Palestine activists by criminalizing dissent.

Students and protesters are being disappeared and threatened with
deportation simply for speaking out against the Israeli military’s
genocide in Gaza – a terrifying violation of their First Amendment rights.

Activists like Mahmoud Khalil and Rumeysa Ozturk were abducted by
plainclothes ICE agents off the street and have been in detention for over
a month without due process.

The administration's game plan is clear: crack down on and criminalize
speech they disagree with, scaring us all into silence. It’s fascism, and
it’s about time our elected officials fight back. We’re calling on
Congress to:

* Immediately demand the release of detained activists like Mahmoud and
Rumeysa;
* Compel the directors of the Department of Homeland Security, ICE, and
Customs and Border Patrol to testify before Congress about what is
happening;
* Launch an investigation into these politically motivated arrests and
visa revocations.

The time for silence is over,
Peter. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140770?t=1002&akid=36600%2E1203867%2ErtO6Wf ]Will you join us by sending a letter to
your members of Congress demanding the release of illegally detained
protesters and calling on the heads of DHS, ICE, and CBP to testify?

Send a Letter

Sending a letter will only take a minute and will strengthen the public
pressure to urgently address this administration’s authoritarian attacks
on our freedom of speech.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Pete Hegseth needs to RESIGN
body:
If Pete Hegseth stays in the job he is going to get good people killed.
#

Peter, there are all sorts of people in the United States military. They come from all walks of life. Some come from wealthy families, some didn’t come from much at all. Some are first generation immigrants, some are indigenous.
Wherever they came from, they signed up to serve our country. We owe everyone in uniform good civilian leadership — effective, experienced, competent leaders with integrity and a strategic vision for the force. What they have right now from Pete Hegseth and his clown show is an absolute travesty. It’s an insult to the military, and it’s putting everyone in our country at risk.
Hegseth had his Department of Defense use unsecured Signal chats to discuss classified military operations. Those chats could be accessed by our adversaries at any time. And in the last 24 hours we learned that it’s actually worse than we thought.
**Hegseth shared classified strike details in a personal text group with his wife, his brother, and his personal lawyer.** This man is continuously putting our troops at risk, and chaos in the world’s most lethal fighting force is an open invitation to our enemies. Mark my words: **If Pete Hegseth stays on the job he is going to get good people killed.**
It’s time for Hegseth to go.
[**Join me and sign our petition: Demand that Pete Hegseth resign his post as Secretary of Defense. This is amateur hour, and we all deserve better — especially the folks serving in uniform.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/pet_em_250421/?source=em250421-1-90&akid=3829%2E734936%2EPm9x_U) The only way we’ll get this guy out is if we make enough noise about this. We’ve got to make ourselves heard. Thanks in advance for signing on. Semper Fi, Ruben

subject: This moment requires more than politics as usual
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Sharice’s actions have turned her into a target

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106245158/540884634/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJhOGFlMS1lNTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xYY0Aqaa2rcJRCHwHy7G_u7tJt-kYXY2toTi0Scy8c=) Yes, this is going to be one of _those_ emails. But please hear us out: Sharice is working day in and day out to push back against extremism, protect Medicaid and Social Security, uphold the rule of law, and hold National Republicans accountable for their actions. **She understands that this moment requires more than politics as usual, which is why she’s using every tool available to her to fight back against National Republicans and slow down their dangerous agenda.** But the truth is, those actions have turned Sharice into a target. name: Team Long Run
subject: Sign on now: Pete Hegseth must resign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Now is the time to put maximum pressure on the Trump administration to force out Hegseth
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/hegseth_em_apr25/?refcode=em250421-1-300&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
Team, if this NPR report is true, it means that now is the time to put **maximum** pressure on the Trump administration to force out Hegseth.
[**If you agree that it’s past time for Pete Hegseth to RESIGN from his role as Secretary of Defense, sign on to our petition right now to help us show the people are fired up and demanding accountability.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/hegseth_em_apr25/?refcode=em250421-1-300&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/hegseth_em_apr25/?refcode=em250421-1-300&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
Friend, we’re only three months into this administration and the amount and severity of scandals are simply staggering.
For Hegseth, it started before he was even confirmed as Secretary of Defense, when details emerged around credible accusations of sexual misconduct and substance abuse.
Then just a few weeks ago we learned that Hegseth included an outside journalist in a group chat where top-secret plans for airstrikes in Yemen were discussed among the highest security officials in government.
Now we’ve learned that Hegseth texted these war plans to a group that included his wife, brother, and attorney from a personal phone, just minutes after being updated by a senior military official.
We and many others warned from the start that Pete Hegseth is unfit and unqualified to serve at the head of the largest military in the world. Hegseth has proved those warnings right (and then some) in just a matter of weeks on the job. **_It’s time for him to go.**_
[**Please, add your name and help us make this final push to call on Pete Hegseth to resign. His unprofessional and reckless behavior has no place in such an important role.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/hegseth_em_apr25/?refcode=em250421-1-300&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/hegseth_em_apr25/?refcode=em250421-1-300&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
We’re looking to get at least 10,000 signatures by this afternoon to show huge grassroots support behind this push.
Thank you for your help, as always,
The team at The Long Run

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=5526_196590_SNS3Ao&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=5526%2E196590%2ESNS3Ao)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

## Pontiff died of stroke that led to coma and heart failure, Vatican says
Pope Francis died of stroke and heart failure, the Vatican has announced. The cerebral stroke led to a coma and irreversible heart failure, a death certificate which was published by the Vatican has revealed. The pontiff's autopsy has come just 12 hours after it was announced that he died at 7.35am this morning. name: Katie Porter
subject: 🚨 90% cuts at the CFPB
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
This only benefits fraudsters and cheaters
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39657%2E3422442%2E0zeIPc)
Dear Derek,
Last week, we found out that Trump and his allies want to cut 90% of the staff at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em_ms_kp_20250421_1_ak?source=em20250421-39657&akid=39657%2E3422442%2E0zeIPc)
Trump’s goal is to make it impossible for the CFPB to fulfill its mission as a watchdog for consumers.
Congress created the agency in the aftermath of the 2008 financial crisis. The agency exists to advocate for consumers, fighting against scammers and cheaters. **Since its creation, the CFPB has returned nearly $20 billion to Americans.**
The CFPB isn’t just good for consumers, it protects businesses that play by the rules, by cracking down on bad actors. The only people who will benefit from gutting the CFPB are scammers and fraudsters—and the rest of us will get hurt.
**As a commercial law professor, I sounded the alarm in the mid-2000s on the predatory practices that ultimately led to the foreclosure crisis.** I remember what it was like before we had the CFPB looking out for us and for the stability of our economy.
We need our leaders to stand up for what everyday Americans need, not what their cronies want. **On Friday, a judge paused the mass layoffs and scheduled a hearing for the end of this month.** Right now, the fate of the CFPB lies in the hands of the courts and the Trump Administration.
**[Can you sign my petition to protect the CFPB from Trump and DOGE’s attacks?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em_ms_kp_20250421_1_ak?source=em20250421-39657&akid=39657%2E3422442%2E0zeIPc)**
[Sign On](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/em_ms_kp_20250421_1_ak?source=em20250421-39657&akid=39657%2E3422442%2E0zeIPc)
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250421-39657&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39657_3422442_0zeIPc&akid=39657%2E3422442%2E0zeIPc)**

Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[got swarmed by a mob of woke reporters](https://substack.com/redirect/f84a51e6-e8cb-4e4d-88d9-38c26d9c0c78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** blasting him with questions about Trump's rapid deportation of illegal alien terrorists.
But he knows exactly how to handle them, watch him GO OFF, completely unfiltered:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f84a51e6-e8cb-4e4d-88d9-38c26d9c0c78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f84a51e6-e8cb-4e4d-88d9-38c26d9c0c78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Does the administration expect that those migrants that were sent to El Salvador to that prison,..." one reporter began to ask.
"You mean the terrorists?" Homan corrected. "If you ask me if I'm in favor of returning terrorists to the United States that are gang members,... no I'm not."
Homan praised President Trump's fast action on undoing President Biden's mass influx of million of undocumented people into the U.S. under his administration. "The most secure border in the history of this nation, President Trump was able to do that in a matter of weeks!"
"I don't care what party you are affiliated with,... I cannot believe there is any Democrat politician that does not want public safety threats out of their communities!!" Homan exclaimed.
The former I.C.E. Director sited a case in Washington state where two illegal aliens torched a woman in the process of robbing her and demanding her ATM information. "They are gonna go to El Salvador!!"
Watch Homan handle the media like a BOSS:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/f84a51e6-e8cb-4e4d-88d9-38c26d9c0c78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Neil Armstrong's SHOCKING Apollo 11 confession
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,

You won't see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in any history book...

But after becoming the first man to set foot on the moon, Neil Armstrong reported a **[strange encounter](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he had in space during a post-mission debrief. And he wasn't the only astronaut to experience it.

NASA did their best to keep it secret, but now, unearthed **[NASA audio](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is blowing the lid off of everything.

**[This official Apollo recording](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is only seconds long, but it will chill you to the bone.
[Listen Now](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Of all the moon landing conspiracies, **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** could be the most incredible. Get the full truth **[HERE](https://substack.com/redirect/8f3b83d6-8eba-4d56-a9d0-ce1eadc8a34e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** now while it's still publicly available.
* * *
# **Wesley Hunt SHUTS UP Jerry Nadler for accusing Republicans of anti-immigration agenda in tense hearing**
GOP Rep. Wesley Hunt **[slams Democrat Rep. Jerry Nadler](https://substack.com/redirect/c93c48c3-3807-48eb-85ca-1dbbdb0c3716?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for lying about Republicans' immigration agenda.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c93c48c3-3807-48eb-85ca-1dbbdb0c3716?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c93c48c3-3807-48eb-85ca-1dbbdb0c3716?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Republicans are using this hearing to lay the foundation for their own anti-immigration agenda," Nadler accused.
As soon as Hunt got the chance, he fired back, outlining the Demcrats' underhanded actions to import millions of illegal immigrants into the U.S. and grant them permenant protected status for political reasons.

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: Big Brother
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Department of Homeland Security has announced that they will be monitoring the social media accounts of non-citizen residents to track their statements about Israel and Palestine.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1603%2E791427%2EsIjL-X)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250421-1-180&t=2&akid=1603%2E791427%2EsIjL-X)
Friend — This is Big Brother in action.
The Trump administration is already deporting legal US residents, some of them permanent residents, for exercising their first amendment right to speak out against the genocide in Gaza.
Now, the Department of Homeland Security has announced that they will be monitoring the social media accounts of non-citizen residents to track their statements about Israel and Palestine.
And we know from the deportation of Mamoud Khlail and other activists that any speech that is critical of Israel’s military actions and/or supportive of Palestinian liberation and self-determination will be used as a grounds for arrest and deportation.
Friend — Ilhan Omar has always spoken out against Israel’s apartheid, settler violence in the West Bank, and the destruction of Gaza. But this is about even more than that.
This is about Trump using the federal government to monitor legal residents, put a chilling effect on free speech, and enforce their far-right position on Israel and Palestine. It’s a warning to anyone who is not a full citizen that they can be scooped up by ICE and deported at any time over a tweet or Facebook post.
And if they can do this over the issue of Israel and Palestine, they can do this over anything. It’s the same lawless thinking behind accusing people of being “gang members” without evidence and sending them off to a prison camp in El Salvador. **It’s fascism, and it must be stopped.**
Ilhan is continuing to do everything she can as a member of Congress to hold this administration accountable and build our grassroots opposition. But she’s going to need the help of everyone reading this to keep up the fight.
**[If you want to join us in our fight against this kind of Big Brother, authoritarian rule, please make a contribution today and power our work. Every donation goes a long way towards growing our movement in defense of democracy.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250421-1-180&t=3&akid=1603%2E791427%2EsIjL-X)

[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=161764409&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxNzY0NDA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDUyNjU2NzksImV4cCI6MTc0Nzg1NzY3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lX9Iqj95bwr4MS7xseBsWAALd_bGHHJx6B1WetV90Dc)
#### _This piece is co-written with two nationally recognized public health experts, Pari & Eve, co-creators of _[Repro Ready](https://open.substack.com/pub/pariandeve?utm_source=mentions). _Join me, subscribe to their newsletter to advance science-based health policy._
[ Subscribe to Repro Ready](https://substack.com/redirect/da989227-ca77-4952-8c93-f29efd616c68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We used to think the worst-case scenario was someone _ignoring_ public health. But now, thanks to Health and Human Services (HHS) Secretary Robert F. Kennedy, Jr., (RFK), we're living a cruel reality where the person in charge of protecting our health is actively _destroying it_.
Let's be clear: RFK isn't running a public health agency. He's running a near $2 trillion disinformation machine. Since stepping into the top job at HHS, RFK has gutted essential services, fired infectious disease experts, canceled critical vaccine meetings, and surrounded himself with a herd of unqualified "wellness" personalities rather than actual scientists. And here's what he's gotten us: Deadly outbreaks, shuttered clinics, and zero faith in our country's health infrastructure. Here's what you need to know about the state of our national public health policy, and how best to protect yourself going forward. **Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..3ievkIiDkRYGh6MXf7hCwsCIm40n6lwzPcvCMBMBvHM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161764409)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71f5893b-c1b6-4234-b00f-af0a75d9bf16?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
March for science protest sign. [Credit: Credit: [Another Believer/Wikimedia Commons](https://substack.com/redirect/24509191-144f-47eb-a075-2b4ab18be61f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [CC BY-SA 3.0](https://substack.com/redirect/9d0c317b-d492-41d2-a3d3-dd4c78455b00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)]
## **RFK 's War on Public Health Infrastructure**
HHS is supposed to _enhance the health and well-being of all Americans_. Keyword: _all_. But RFK's priority seems to only serve the holistic medicine crowd that's heavy on conspiracy and light on facts. Under his leadership so far:
* More than 10,000 federal health employees have been laid off, initiating a brain drain while the COVID pandemic is still decimating lives.
* Lifetime FDA food inspection experts have been replaced with less experienced [contractors](https://substack.com/redirect/333c462f-657a-4da0-b908-acf5b754f4ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* NIH research grants on vaccine hesitancy have been [cancelled](https://substack.com/redirect/54070205-60a4-4be0-82c9-445e2cc6779b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* Offices focused on women's health, the health of minority communities, and HIV/AIDS have been significantly defunded.
* Five regional HHS offices--including those in major public health hubs like San Francisco and New York? [Closed](https://substack.com/redirect/689bbdf4-f0cd-4286-ab7e-c8abdc4a88cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* The CDC lost key staff, including the experts tracking U.S. outbreaks of bird flu, rubella, and foodborne illness.
* We are currently suffering the worst measles outbreak in modern American history.

And don't be fooled by bureaucratic buzzwords. When RFK says he's "streamlining" operations and "eliminating redundancies," he means slashing services people depend on to survive.
## **The Entirely Preventable Measles Outbreak**
In case you're wondering what happens when your top health official believes vaccines cause autism (they don't), just look at the current measles outbreak. This devastating and wholly preventable outbreak has already claimed three lives, including [two children](https://substack.com/redirect/79f49674-3425-4c13-93d4-7f23860bfedc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That's right, the "pro life" crowd has now killed two children by acting on the anti-science anti-vaxx advice of an HHS Secretary who is himself vaccinated, and whose children are all vaccinated. RFK has spent decades platforming one of the most dangerous, debunked medical conspiracies of our time. And perhaps most tragic, this is not the first time his conspiracy theory propagation has taken lives. In 2019, RFK advanced his anti-vaxx conspiracy to the country of Samoa during a (you guessed it) measles outbreak. As Samoan's panicked and stopped using the measles (MMR) vaccine, the outbreak killed [83 people](https://substack.com/redirect/4278c34d-645a-463b-8ede-be2c5c7c83cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (mostly babies).
Let's be blunt: **every measles death is preventable**. RFK's vaccine disinformation is killing children.
## **RFK is Undermining Vaccine Access**
And it's not just the MMR vaccine. While RFK says he's not anti-vaxx and won't prevent people from getting wanted vaccines, he has actually been responsible for:
* FDA cancelling its annual flu vaccine planning meeting;
* CDC postponing its advisory committee on new vaccines;
* NIH slashing 40+ grants for vaccine hesitancy research; and
* Putting a $600M contract for bird flu vaccine development "under review."

So now, in the middle of [rising bird flu cases](https://substack.com/redirect/ebe6540e-28a5-4068-9651-28354cb0d138?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that have already infected humans, we find ourselves entirely unprepared.
## **He 's Coming For Our Tap Water**
Fluoride is a natural mineral. It prevents tooth decay. Yet, RFK also wants our teeth to rot as he crusades against fluoride in drinking water. The addition of fluoride to our water was a landmark public health intervention that's been safely preventing cavities for decades. It was [named](https://substack.com/redirect/f0beb244-e999-48a8-be18-16d7c97ce087?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) one of the top 10 public health achievements of the 20th century. To date, only [15% of Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/0a309d0a-d7da-47f8-a121-55302c7c7f55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (wrongly) think it is harmful--and most of them probably heard that on an RFK Fox news interview. Removing fluoride from drinking water will devastate dental health nationwide.
## **His Dangerous COVID Conspiracies**
RFK has claimed--again, with _zero_ evidence--that COVID-19 was engineered to spare "Ashkenazi Jews and Chinese people." Not only is this completely false, it's racist pseudoscience that ignores what we _do_ know: COVID disproportionately harmed marginalized groups due to systemic inequities in healthcare access. But RFK never lets facts get in the way of a viral soundbite.
The fact is RFK isn't leading a health department, he's dismantling it. He's leading a dangerous movement that prioritizes wellness grift and anti-government paranoia over science, safety, and actual public health.
This isn't just a policy difference. It's a full-on public health crisis, and Americans--especially the most vulnerable--are paying the price.
## **What We Can Do**
While the road is uphill, we have meaningful actions available to us to protect our health. Here is what we encourage your readers to do going forward:
1. **Hold media accountable** : Use social media or write to editors demanding fact-checks on RFK and more airtime for real medical experts, not disinformation peddlers.
2. **Share trusted info** : Post updates from credible sources like the CDC, WHO, or local health departments, and follow independent experts like [Pari & Eve, MPH](https://open.substack.com/users/215799239-pari-and-eve-mph?utm_source=mentions), and find [Pari](https://substack.com/redirect/2460d116-b5d2-4cbd-8581-8279c6ef65ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Eve](https://substack.com/redirect/be20e7c9-6a86-4117-a562-f9ef1bb473fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on social media.
3. **Speak up against falsehoods** : Challenge health misinformation when you see it--whether in family chats, online, or in your community.
4. **Protect your circle** : Stay current on vaccines and ask your doctor to check antibody levels during checkups. Help loved ones book appointments or get to clinics if needed. Speak to your dentist about how to ensure your dental health should fluoride be removed from drinking water.
5. **Engage locally** : Support school boards and public health departments in promoting vaccine access. Join public forums to raise awareness about local health concerns.
6. **Support public health** : Donate to, volunteer with, or uplift groups like the American Public Health Association, Partners In Health, or GAVI.

## **Conclusion**
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. didn't just walk into a powerful role--he hijacked it to serve a fringe ideology that's actively endangering lives. Under the guise of "freedom" and "choice," he's stripped our nation's health infrastructure to the bone, empowered conspiracy theorists, and turned HHS into a factory of pseudoscience and public harm. The result? Preventable deaths, growing distrust in science, and a healthcare system crumbling under deliberate sabotage.
But we don't have to accept this dystopia as normal. The truth still matters. Facts still matter. Lives still matter. And that's also why voices like Pari and Eve collectively at [Pari & Eve, MPH](https://open.substack.com/users/215799239-pari-and-eve-mph?utm_source=mentions) are more essential than ever. They are trained public health professionals who have dedicated their careers to keeping our communities safe. And over the coming weeks they will be providing deep dive analysis on the Federal Government's changes to public health, and how you can best ensure your health and safety for your family and loved ones.
[Subscribe to Repro Ready](https://substack.com/redirect/da989227-ca77-4952-8c93-f29efd616c68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Follow them. Learn from them. And share their work. Support those on the front lines. Because we all benefit when actual experts--not conspiracy theorists--are guiding public health conversations.

body:
Abortion is healthcare. Full stop [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106246549/540889734/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmRmZmEzMC1lYjFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_GOd4b-sfdvuDsHJGgjoyg62lNGMIIRhXL97Wra3Rg0=&emci=a883190f-cb1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=42dffa30-eb1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

One year ago, the Supreme Court ruled that mifepristone— _a safe, effective medication used in more than half of all abortions_ —could remain widely available, despite extremists' attempts to take it off of shelves and out of the hands of medical professionals.

As a doctor, I breathed a sigh of relief when SCOTUS's ruling came in. As a woman, I felt the weight of what we’re still up against. And as your representative, I knew the fight was far from over. Let me be clear: **Abortion care is healthcare. It is personal. It is private. And it is not the business of politicians—or judges—to make medical decisions for women.**

_But Republicans across the country don’t see it that way._

They are passing dangerous, extreme laws—some banning abortion outright, others criminalizing doctors or patients—all in the hopes that one of these cases will land in front of a 6-3 extremely conservative Supreme Court. And what keeps me up at night is that we’re just one case away from losing access again. The mifepristone decision showed us something important: there’s still a line even this Supreme Court won’t cross.

But we cannot count on them to do the right thing next time. We need to fight like women’s lives depend on us—because they do—in Congress, in the courts, and in every single election. That’s why I’m asking: [**Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us protect abortion rights and take back control of this fight? clean_body: Abortion is healthcare. Full stop Peter, One year ago, the Supreme Court ruled that mifepristone— a safe, effective medication used in more than half of all abortions —could remain widely available, despite extremists' attempts to take it off of shelves and out of the hands of medical professionals. As a doctor, I breathed a sigh of relief when SCOTUS's ruling came in. As a woman, I felt the weight of what we’re still up against. And as your representative, I knew the fight was far from over. Let me be clear: Abortion care is healthcare. It is personal. It is private. And it is not the business of politicians—or judges—to make medical decisions for women. But Republicans across the country don’t see it that way. They are passing dangerous, extreme laws—some banning abortion outright, others criminalizing doctors or patients—all in the hopes that one of these cases will land in front of a 6-3 extremely conservative Supreme Court. And what keeps me up at night is that we’re just one case away from losing access again. The mifepristone decision showed us something important: there’s still a line even this Supreme Court won’t cross. But we cannot count on them to do the right thing next time. We need to fight like women’s lives depend on us—because they do—in Congress, in the courts, and in every single election. That’s why I’m asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Peter, I channel my experience as a doctor into this job. I’ve sat with women as they’ve made deeply personal decisions about their health, their bodies, and their futures. I trust women, and I respect their decisions. But Republicans have made it clear: they don’t. And they won’t stop until they control what we can and cannot do with our own bodies. We need to organize. We need to elect leaders who trust women. And we need to make sure this fight isn’t left up to judges who see justice through a partisan lens. = With gratitude, Kim Rep. name: Chris Pappas
subject: I’d be the first gay man in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
When I was a kid, reading this kind of headline would have been unimaginable
When I was a kid, reading this kind of headline would have been unimaginable, Peter:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87952?refcode=em20250421-8889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8889%2E614464%2EyVE3Zc)
Growing up as a gay person in New Hampshire, I never imagined I could live openly — let alone run for U.S. Senate. **But my community showed me what's possible.** You helped me win _four times_ in one of the most competitive congressional districts in the country.
We’ve made tremendous progress since I was younger. But there’s still something we’ve never done. **We’ve never elected a gay man to the Senate.**
To be clear I’m not running for Senate just to make history. I’m in this race for the people of New Hampshire – **_all of us._** But the prospect of moving the needle of progress forward is deeply meaningful to me.
This is an opportunity for representation in the Senate. It’s also important that LGBTQ+ people have more seats at the table at a time when our rights are coming under attack.
**We can win this election for the people of New Hampshire, charting a path forward for our shared future – and we can tear down barriers and make history at the same time.**
**[Will you split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots right now to stand with me in this historic fight?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87952?refcode=em20250421-8889&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8889%2E614464%2EyVE3Zc)**
**Thank you for supporting me in this campaign, Peter.** No matter who you are, who you love, who you pray to, or where you're from — know that I'll always have your back.
With gratitude,
Chris

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

name: Laura Gillen
subject: Bringing more transparency and accountability to public office
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
While House Republicans continue to hide from their constituents and refuse to hold town halls, I remain committed to promoting greater transparency and accountability in public office.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106247048/540891409/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-04-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWVlOWMwYy1lYzFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CV52_ccye9AfkyZZhVlz2xmZy8D6vspcvSvs4qHZGvM=)

| Peter,

Last week, I hosted a town hall in Hempstead to continue the conversations we started on the campaign trail – about what it means to fight for and deliver results for Nassau County.

I’m honored to represent NY-04, and I’m grateful for every opportunity to meet with Long Islanders face-to-face (or virtually!), listen to your concerns, and respond directly to the issues that matter most to you.

While House Republicans continue to hide from their constituents and refuse to hold town halls, I remain committed to promoting greater transparency and accountability in public office.

It’s clear that Long Islanders are fed up with Trump’s reckless policies and tired of House Republicans sitting by and enabling his extreme agenda.

Right now, we have an administration that is starting reckless trade wars, freezing federal funds and grants, indiscriminately firing federal workers, and pushing for cuts to critical programs like Social Security and Medicaid to pay for tax cuts for the rich, while working families struggle with skyrocketing costs.

That’s why I’m not just showing up – I’m fighting back. I’m in the halls of Congress every day to find real solutions that will help support working families and stop Trump’s dangerous agenda before it does even more harm to our communities.

_**[If you’re with me, I hope I can count on you to chip in anything you can today so we can defend this seat, take back the House, and hold Trump and his allies accountable!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106247049/540891410/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-04-21_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWVlOWMwYy1lYzFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CV52_ccye9AfkyZZhVlz2xmZy8D6vspcvSvs4qHZGvM=)**_

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Almost 100 Days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a8ef73add7&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good afternoon!

Tomorrow will be the legislature’s 100th day of session. Let me tell you: there is no end in sight. At the end of last week, the governor told the legislature not to send her any more bills or she will [veto](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e9f8551a21&e=a7ab36849c) all of them until we solve the development disabilities supplemental funding issue, and then, onto finalizing what the Proposition 123 extension proposal looks like for the 2026 ballot before we even start holding small group budget meetings.

The [Finance Advisory Committee](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3b09e30920&e=a7ab36849c) (FAC) convened last Thursday to discuss the uncertainty of our state and the US economy, including the tariff policies, spending cuts, and proposed tax cuts taking place at the federal level. If you click on the link above for the Finance Advisory Committee you can see the briefing materials discussed during the meeting.

The State Senate will convene its legislative work Tuesday through Thursday of this week. There have been some questions about what pre-emption is. According to Article 13 of the Arizona Constitution, cities and towns in Arizona are subject to statutes enacted by our state legislature, and as such, are considered political subdivisions of the state. Thus, cities and towns are subject to the laws of the state.

What is a "political subdivision?”

A political subdivision is any governmental entity operating under the authority of this state and governed by an elected body, including a city, charter city, town, county, school district, community college district or other district organized under state law. Municipal governments in Arizona, encompassing cities and towns, are considered political subdivisions of the state.
This means cities operate under the authority of the state government **and** are subject to state laws. The state legislature authorizes these units of local government, and they are governed by elected officials.

In the past, Arizona court decisions have leaned towards tipping the scales toward the legislative body as having preeminence in authority. For instance, in _City of Tucson v. State_ , the Arizona Supreme Court stated: “Nineteenth century case law and legal commentary generally viewed cities and towns as entirely subordinate to and dependent on the state’s legislature for any governmental authority."

The Arizona Legislature has passed many pre-emption laws over the years. In 2000, the state legislature enacted preemption laws to strengthen and provide consistent firearm regulations across the state. Several years later, Arizona lawmakers introduced a bill declaring the minimum wage to be a state matter. That same year the governor told our cities and towns they would lose their share of state revenue if they didn’t halt efforts on employment policies.

Also, in 2016, our state legislature preempted local governments from enacting firearm regulations. Arizona enacted the pre-emption law to nullify Tucson’s ordinance allowing the Tucson Police Department to destroy unclaimed and forfeited firearms and instead required the firearms to be made available through resale. _Arizona's law is clear:_ municipalities are prohibited from enacting local ordinances on firearms more restrictively than state law.

Just this year, bills have been introduced to eliminate the municipal food tax, banning photo radar, and prohibiting governing boards of universities and community colleges from enacting any policy preventing the carrying of concealed handguns by law abiding citizens.

Cities or counties violate preemption laws when they enact **or **enforce laws that conflict with state statutes. This ensures consistency and fairness in the protection of your rights, no matter where you are in Arizona. Cities are political subdivisions of this state. Period. Any power can be given, or power can be taken away or amended by the legislature at any given time.

**Bolick Bills Signed into Law by the Governor**

**[SB 1206](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0391a4ad2b&e=a7ab36849c)**
banks; special deposits; requirements

[**SB 1220**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f3409b87fd&e=a7ab36849c)
victims’ rights; audio recordings; appeal

**[SB 1424](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0aa3fe96a9&e=a7ab36849c)**
impersonation; veteran; armed forces

**[SB 1659](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f9f40400d5&e=a7ab36849c)**
state board; allegations of misconduct

**Bolick Bills Vetoed by the Governor**

**[SB 1721](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c53e4d99b8&e=a7ab36849c)**
egg-laying hens; housing size standards

**Bolick Bills Discussed During Caucus**

[**SB 1103**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=859f0c3a55&e=a7ab36849c)
penalty assessment; victims’ rights enforcement

[**SB 1107**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8f420c8a62&e=a7ab36849c)
motorcycle safety fund continuation

[**SB 1226**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8bc6f3f77d&e=a7ab36849c)
school policies; wireless communications devices

[**SB 1343**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4728d84f62&e=a7ab36849c)
probation supervision; transfer

[**SB 1405**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=947e15b5b0&e=a7ab36849c)
mental health transition program; extension

**Bolick Bills Ready for the Committee of the Whole**

**[SB 1449](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d1828c3f16&e=a7ab36849c)**
lifetime injunction; undesignated offenses

**[SB 1527](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=cfa789c33e&e=a7ab36849c)**
occupational boards; renewal extension

**[SB 1658](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f6e3e30912&e=a7ab36849c)**
animal cruelty; failure to treat

_Bolick Legislation in the News_

[https://www.fox10phoenix.com/video/1625720](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ec31136d1c&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://www.azcentral.com/story/news/politics/legislature/2025/04/16/stolen-valor-bill-heads-to-arizona-governor-after-gop-spat/83014445007/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a0448407d8&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://www.thecentersquare.com/arizona/article_07e07b0e-4e39-41c6-99d0-d12c3fe93c50.html](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=11c67b3d6b&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://pro.stateaffairs.com/az/legislative-report/education/cell-phones-public-schools](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0cca5f11fa&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/04/17/stolen-valor-bill-passes-senate-as-feud-between-2-lawmakers-simmers/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4f3647512c&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://www.fox10phoenix.com/news/gov-hobbs-signs-stolen-valor-bill-sad-update-az-hatchet-attack-victim-nightly-roundup](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=056e1189a6&e=a7ab36849c)

If you live in Legislative District 2, [**please sign my online nomination petition**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8c361e987b&e=a7ab36849c) ensuring my name appears on the Republican primary ballot. To qualify from the Republican ballot, I need to collect more than 500 signatures from registered Republicans and Independents. It only takes a minute or two to login to sign your name on my online nominate petition.

Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

name: Ro Khanna
subject: TAKE ACTION: Return Abrego Garcia to the US
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
On March 15, Kilmar Abrego Garcia of Maryland was illegally detained by ICE agents, deported, and imprisoned without trial in a maximum-security prison in El Salvador, despite having no criminal record in either country. The Trump Administration later called it an “administrative error,” but the Trump administration has falsely claimed Abrego Garcia does not deserve due process.
Trump and Vance have defied orders [https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-ignoring-supreme-court-order-2060919] from the Supreme Court and a federal judge to facilitate Abrego Garcia’s return. In response, J.D. Vance posted a statement on X defending their actions and rejecting the constitutional right to due process [https://www.commondreams.org/news/jd-vance-due-process] guaranteed to every person in the United States, regardless of citizenship.
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1912238191740088408 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1912238191740088408]
Trump and Vance pose a dangerous threat to our Constitution and our system of checks and balances.
It’s critical that we put a stop to these lawless, unconstitutional actions now.
Sign the petition: Return Kilmar Abrego Garcia to the United States. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abrego-garcia-petition?contactdata=6PJ3VrC57Lzd2ERkOeE1lT7oT2h1ICD2USVrQ5yQdjxNTducz+eqtij2/ABRl8K9tKplHJuTpBYyXc/Q5GGnyInf28asCfLEGb5JO8eFug0AUPcCRTrVHJM7E8mxTfEPBqCZzLSUovLRTV75C7d7VezWcF259r7lbwb2afxF7VKH3aw2fDHRJi/oz80u4oMI]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/abrego-garcia-petition?contactdata=6PJ3VrC57Lzd2ERkOeE1lT7oT2h1ICD2USVrQ5yQdjxNTducz+eqtij2/ABRl8K9tKplHJuTpBYyXc/Q5GGnyInf28asCfLEGb5JO8eFug0AUPcCRTrVHJM7E8mxTfEPBqCZzLSUovLRTV75C7d7VezWcF259r7lbwb2afxF7VKH3aw2fDHRJi/oz80u4oMI]
Thank you for your activism and everything you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–

clean_body: [] Peter, On March 15, Kilmar Abrego Garcia of Maryland was illegally detained by ICE agents, deported, and imprisoned without trial in a maximum-security prison in El Salvador, despite having no criminal record in either country. The Trump Administration later called it an “administrative error,” but the Trump administration has falsely claimed Abrego Garcia does not deserve due process. Trump and Vance have defied orders [] from the Supreme Court and a federal judge to facilitate Abrego Garcia’s return. In response, J.D. Vance posted a statement on X defending their actions and rejecting the constitutional right to due process [] guaranteed to every person in the United States, regardless of citizenship. [] Trump and Vance pose a dangerous threat to our Constitution and our system of checks and balances. It’s critical that we put a stop to these lawless, unconstitutional actions now. Sign the petition: Return Kilmar Abrego Garcia to the United States. [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Thank you for your activism and everything you do. In solidarity, Ro Wait! One more thing– Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. # **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=76a0dc284f&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=9d16d6e444&e=5bd167f239 "Public Sentiment Shifts at the Reality of Trump's Unhinged Deportations")
---
**Public Sentiment Shifts
at the Reality of Trump's Unhinged Deportations**
The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 11
| Chuck Rocha joins Mike Madrid from sunny Palm Springs to tackle the biggest stories shaking American politics—and the Latino community—in real time. From the **recent visit of El Salvador's president to the White House** and the **implications of unhinged deportations** to the Trump administration’s move to label international gangs as terrorist organizations, and what that means for **due process and TPS holders** just trying to build a life here. Chuck shares a deeply personal story about his business partner's struggles with TPS, while Mike lays out the constitutional crisis unfolding in real time.

They also break down **rising grassroots energy, the shifting tide of public opinion, and what recent fundraising numbers from AOC and Bernie tell us about the electorate’s mood. Plus, a preview of the high-stakes Arizona special election in the 7th Congressional District and the launch of the new Campeones PAC!**

It's not just political analysis—it’s a call to action. Listen, subscribe, and get ready to make some noise.
---
|
