name: Jason Johnson
subject: Police officer used as a pawn for a special election
body:
Soros playbook uses innocent officer as a pawn| |
---
| | I’m reaching out to you today because another brave police officer is being targeted by a vicious political attack -- one that could cost him everything.
---
| |
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9b690320a64040ed80098036955819a8&_e=8msjibZiyrzJZ0skfcMFtKJ70qysomZi9e8tMDmdsweMhc1ktOgPWZNkFv79IvzxkMpGPeiWT8h3QDhRuET0s1C-aAjtveikNPW645MgNaWTnJMt2L6tScsCJVHaeb5nx2PT-u8ZUkCW93yl9KlIEy2qskL2lPlY0aQw8oFaZdc_kyINimHQ-my23AoXpRArj6RDY3j-BRHjNe8HpK7NIHVe5VzveRxnfnrLOtoxsx9zZaWVN2g_1sfY0JmlkMnEQrSqSTHgMKKSBE_4j90CO1czDie_Pzw7Gdl-O6ETRIbT9lrJBVbpPYXyBwibmv20vnI2m39mSUTBubab9PCUh3vsfg6nbcBV35IUkQPK4G2MsJcKB8yXCiWEpJ9pJmTIjher5I9SucPUeNrP_Gm5cA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,I’m reaching out to you today because another brave police officer is being targeted by a vicious political attack -- one that could cost him everything.Sergeant Robert Warrington is **facing unjust charges of Attempted Second-Degree Murder and First-Degree Assault** , because a Soros-backed prosecutor saw his case as an opportunity to advance her political agenda.**[We’re running out of time to act, and your response is critical](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9b690320a64040ed80098036955819a8&_e=8msjibZiyrzJZ0skfcMFtKJ70qysomZi9e8tMDmdsweMhc1ktOgPWZNkFv79IvzxkMpGPeiWT8h3QDhRuET0s1C-aAjtveikNPW645MgNaWTnJMt2L6tScsCJVHaeb5nx2PT-u8ZUkCW93yl9KlIEy2qskL2lPlY0aQw8oFaZdc_kyINimHQ-my23AoXpRArj6RDY3j-BRHjNe8HpK7NIHVe5VzveRxnfnrLOtoxsx8kOgi9qc5tFYnUVMggHDvbzScpml3cDw355MQ3SvRpWcrRrlzLJnT2uV5W3CkWhNJhJ9DyuHJZoie3I3Wzj83Oo8Thk1uBFHvFq_BUpY4VxdJHe9puotIE_yLL1EXY1J6dL5jUyznSbnIXVolKE2sJm9IFatMuJtANuoQ8YTggKA%3D%3D),** but first let me share what happened.Last September, while on routine patrol, Sgt. Warrington noticed a car pulled over on the side of the highway and stopped to help.As he approached, he saw a man walking toward the car with his hand suspiciously near his waistband.Sgt. Warrington asked the man if he was there to help, but the man didn’t respond.Just as the man passed, he suddenly turned toward the officer and reached into his coat, pulling out a black object. Fearing for his life and acting on his training, Sgt. Warrington drew his firearm and discharged a single shot. It didn’t hit anyone.Afterwards, he discovered the man was unarmed. But with mere seconds -- either react or be killed -- his training and experience told him to act fast.Now, he is facing trumped up criminal charges that fail to recognize the facts of the case.Friend, the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) is doing everything we can to scrape together enough money to help Robert with his legal fees. **[**Will you help us defend this honest man with a $35 donation today?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9b690320a64040ed80098036955819a8&_e=8msjibZiyrzJZ0skfcMFtKJ70qysomZi9e8tMDmdsweMhc1ktOgPWZNkFv79IvzxkMpGPeiWT8h3QDhRuET0s1C-aAjtveikNPW645MgNaWTnJMt2L6tScsCJVHaeb5nx2PT-u8ZUkCW93yl9KlIEy2qskL2lPlY0aQw8oFaZdc_kyINimHQ-my23AoXpRArj6RDY3j-BRHjNe8HpK7NIHVe5VzveRxnfnrLOtoxsx8KfwxxMQNBrhD44R9BE-oXjCY_jigQrxJtM5f4Hnbww0e3SukBOqHGFrlX8LwG-QskUgSg7X-taBmxfomHhJAUORgQWJzCZYeLkhJpzOGWux46plKbpHmAmpC0LjK81JsGDApe3bbDZMgpOnlIIyiHu6i1fppCyAvnZFab8R6gHQ%3D%3D)** _Robert's case is as political as it gets._ A Soros-backed prosecutor, looking to make a name for herself during a special election, decided to make him the target of her campaign by charging him with attempted murder.This is a corrupt abuse of power.And now LELDF is doing everything they can to clear Robert’s good name.As a non-profit we support and defend law enforcement officers who have devoted their lives to upholding the Constitution and serving the United States and its citizens.We also educate the public about the many risks and threats to law enforcement officers -- like sham prosecutions by left wing prosecutors.Sgt. Warrington is being used as a pawn in a political game.**[**Will you take a stand against Soros-backed prosecutors who abuse their power to target police officers?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9b690320a64040ed80098036955819a8&_e=8msjibZiyrzJZ0skfcMFtKJ70qysomZi9e8tMDmdsweMhc1ktOgPWZNkFv79IvzxkMpGPeiWT8h3QDhRuET0s1C-aAjtveikNPW645MgNaWTnJMt2L6tScsCJVHaeb5nx2PT-u8ZUkCW93yl9KlIEy2qskL2lPlY0aQw8oFaZdc_kyINimHQ-my23AoXpRArj6RDY3j-BRHjNe8HpK7NIHVe5VzveRxnfnrLOtoxsx8H5wZP7I7aoYMXxXsPP6J9I0z82-W-ajanfomTLZn53F8yGc_Mn6ZwmansQooOaT3EhRNiqETqaSBewB3SCGhtdRq77BdqRNa4U0Xtx1f4THXeXwJdRGcBVH-WmwZKZv9fXHPlhkDCxpFYnn_R9M6CBMaetzEuz7J-Y9ouhkadYA%3D%3D)** Friend, Robert was born and raised in Bowie, MD and has served his community in the Bowie Police Department for 12 years, earning multiple awards for his dedication and service.He’s no stranger to hardship and sacrifice. In 2020, he tragically lost his wife to a long battle with breast cancer.Now, he’s facing down political attacks that could destroy his career and his life.Robert’s trial starts this September and to give him the best defense possible, we need your help.**[**Stand with Sgt. Robert Warrington by supporting his defense with a donation of $35 or more.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=9b690320a64040ed80098036955819a8&_e=8msjibZiyrzJZ0skfcMFtKJ70qysomZi9e8tMDmdsweMhc1ktOgPWZNkFv79IvzxkMpGPeiWT8h3QDhRuET0s1C-aAjtveikNPW645MgNaWTnJMt2L6tScsCJVHaeb5nx2PT-u8ZUkCW93yl9KlIEy2qskL2lPlY0aQw8oFaZdc_kyINimHQ-my23AoXpRArj6RDY3j-BRHjNe8HpK7NIHVe5VzveRxnfnrLOtoxsx_Lu-FbY-OvVibUpOdJxZfwvhmJkxUKq4n_WqS4zPKp7yORycUqApbgolfC6L9UecDyXos5O9yexF8ZrvcCFB7OT0u6rw_Bbx7xC2eQkoFYx5PwErUyKKbniR0P_Orxjn24z1XKcwOSdgXPs2lYTLluCnQ6X4E4VgHmxPn0ZjvKHg%3D%3D)** Your support will ensure that he has the resources needed to fight these politically motivated charges. We can’t let our men and women in blue be sacrificed for the sake of political agendasThank you for your time and for being a patriot who backs the blue.Sincerely,

JohnsonPresident, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for willface similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! **** | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 |

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12927640?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

Before we get into today’s newsletter, I want to take a moment to reflect on the egregious act of violence that took place at Florida State University this past Thursday. My thoughts and prayers are with the family and friends of those who were killed and the students and faculty who were on campus. I also want to thank our law enforcement for their quick action to prevent further harm.

I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Easter weekend as we celebrated the resurrection of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ. I pray that this sacred day impressed on our state and nation a renewed sense of love, joy, and hope for the future.

As we enter the final weeks of the regular session, I look forward to keeping you updated on our progress. Stay tuned!

As always, my office is here to serve you. Please do not hesitate to [**contact my team**](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=fc3f5e22af&e=d1c1b9864f) if you need assistance with anything. We would be happy to help in any way we can!
---
| | **Committee Meetings: Week 7**
---
| With the legislative session coming to a close very soon, committee meetings are winding down, and we are spending more time in session. Click below to read the meeting packets from the committee meetings I attended last week.

**Week 7 Committee Meetings:**
* [Justice Budget Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=bb9025122c&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Ways and Means Committee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=912eefe77d&e=d1c1b9864f)

---
| | **Week 7: Update on My Legislation**
---
|
---
| I’m pleased to share that my bill, [CS/HB 4067 - Equestrian Sport Facilities in Marion County](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=59a331604b&e=d1c1b9864f), passed favorably in the **State Affairs Committee**. It now heads to the House Floor for a full vote!
---
| | **Meetings in Tallahassee**
---
|
---
| **Episcopal Children’s Services** (ECS) stopped by my office while celebrating Children’s Week in Tallahassee. Their programs, such as “Head Start” and “Early Head Start,” continue to play a large role in helping kids succeed in school. It was great to learn more about ECS and how to continue to help them serve our children.
---
|
---
| **Lorena Fulcher** , the new acting director for the **Agency for Persons with Disabilities** (APD), came by last week to introduce herself. It was a pleasure to meet her and talk about how APD continues to support individuals and their families by creating multiple pathways to possibilities and assistance.
---
|
---
| I had the incredible opportunity to meet with **Florida Student Power** , an organization empowering youth to learn more about the legislative process and get involved. They asked me important questions about my minimum wage bill, [HB 541](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=6059078173&e=d1c1b9864f), which could potentially affect them. I always appreciate hearing from the next generation.
---
|
---
| I appreciated the **Florida Network of Children’s Advocacy Centers** for taking the time to meet with me to talk about opportunities to continue supporting their work to help children who are alleged to be victims of abuse or neglect.
---
| | **Receptions & Events in Tallahassee**
---
| My staff and I attended various receptions and events in Tallahassee last week, including:
* **Children’s Week Farmers Market**
* **Teach for America Legislative Reception**
* **FL Juvenile Justice & DJJ Legislative Reception**
* **RSA Tampa Bay Lightning vs. FL Panthers “Watch Party”**
* **Cuban Heritage Day**

---
| | **Florida House: Week in Review**
---
| We had a productive week in Tallahassee last week, and I want to ensure the district stays informed and knows that the Florida House is working hard for you. Please click [here](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=792687a294&e=d1c1b9864f) to read the **Florida House’s Week in Review** newsletter to learn more about what we accomplished for our state and communities.
---
|
---
| | Thank you for reading, and I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=fad5ccbdc8) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=fad5ccbdc8).

---

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Big money is how we got Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
I want us to understand that this constant pressure that we feel in our lives — of the water rising up to our throats, the impossibility to afford anything easily, the fear of speaking up or being who we are in public, the bitter divisions driven more by online algorithms than the truth, the crumbling of our rights and protections — this, right now, is what it feels like to be governed by billionaires.
This is what oligarchy feels like. Not someday. **Right now**.
Big money is how we got Donald Trump.
His whole presidency began with bribery: meme coins and crypto to fleece normal people and move money in the dark; extortion settlements for media companies and law firms who gladly paid the price; removing duly elected officials from the inauguration — even Republican ones — to make room for the unelected billionaires who sat right behind him.
They have one central economic mission: **to make billionaires richer at the expense of the United States of America**.
I know that it can feel impossible for Republicans to be defeated. But that is not true.
I can tell you: **miracles start with the faith of mustard seeds**. And that is what each and every one of you represents. Small miracles of faith in ourselves, in each other, and in the refusal to give up.
Because we are here for the long haul. We are here for the school boards and the community associations, for the small business groups and town councils, for public art and gestures of inclusion. And we will build from there.
So you know what that means. **We start working _now_**.
We start working small. And we _will_ replace them with brawling Democrats who fight for the working class.
Because this is the path to guaranteeing healthcare to every American, to establish a living wage, to tackle skyrocketing rents and mortgages, to take on the climate crisis, and **establish a country where the American Dream is possible for all of us**.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250421.igWg4b&refcode=em20250421-8657-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250421.igWg4b&refcode=em20250421-8657-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250421?refcode=em20250421-8657-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=8657_2526796_4obk3A&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250421-8657-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=8657%2E2526796%2E4obk3A)

Derek, once again Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has endangered our military by sharing classified information. Just look at this headline:
_**CNN: Hegseth shared detailed military plans in second Signal chat that included his wife and brother**_
Hegseth shared _highly classified information about a U.S. military strike in Yemen_ with his brother and wife on another Signal group chat—this time on his personal phone.

This report comes just weeks after it was revealed that top members of Donald Trump’s cabinet, including Hegseth, sent details about the same U.S. military airstrike in a different Signal group chat that accidentally included a journalist.

_This continued, irresponsible behavior is an outrageous national security breach—and a huge threat to our military._

But the Trump administration is standing firmly in their support of Hegseth—praising him and claiming this is “just fake news.”

Derek, this isn’t fake news, this is reality. And we need to hold Hegseth accountable.

**That’s why Chris Deluzio is calling on Pete Hegseth to resign as Secretary of Defense—and he needs as much support in Pennsylvania as possible to show that thousands of Americans agree.**
[_**Join Chris and sign his petition today to urge Pete Hegseth to resign →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106248475/540896171/516942248?refcode=email_042125_hegseth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjFkNzc4MC1mMTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WaWZD-tqbq1CpR6yV5yx2RtYAUtmzt1jk203iWuFIHY=&emci=6b4663d0-ee1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=521d7780-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13185894)

name: Wes Moore
subject: Work, wages, and wealth
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106248512/540896250/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjIzYzZhZC1mMTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IZjytI5YnxUylkTubU3gb1yZ8xVV6IWtEsWV36aAwE8=&emci=c223c6ad-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=cf23c6ad-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
The path to work, wages, and wealth can look different for everybody. Maryland has world-class colleges and universities. But for many, there’s a myth that you _**have**_ to attend a traditional four-year institution to be successful. **That wasn’t the path I followed.** I got my start at Valley Forge Military Academy, which was a turning point in my life. At first it was hard, but the structure and responsibility I encountered there led me to a career in public service. That led to further studies at Johns Hopkins, then Oxford, and then to leading soldiers in combat in Afghanistan. Careers can take all sorts of different paths. That’s why we’re not taking a one-size-fits-all approach to realizing economic opportunity in Maryland. This month, I signed the RAISE Act into law — to create opportunity for both employees and employers to succeed. The RAISE Act invests in apprenticeships to give Marylanders of all ages options for great, well-paying careers. It means more skilled workers, more job opportunities, and a stronger workforce. **No matter the path folks take in their lives, our administration is prioritizing building more economic opportunities for them — and a stronger Maryland.** **[If you’re with us in this mission to build a better tomorrow, will you chip in $10 to our re-election effort today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106248513/540896251/1077344677?refcode=em20250421-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjIzYzZhZC1mMTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IZjytI5YnxUylkTubU3gb1yZ8xVV6IWtEsWV36aAwE8=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: The path to work, wages, and wealth can look different for everybody. Maryland has world-class colleges and universities. But for many, there’s a myth that you have to attend a traditional four-year institution to be successful. That wasn’t the path I followed. I got my start at Valley Forge Military Academy, which was a turning point in my life. At first it was hard, but the structure and responsibility I encountered there led me to a career in public service. That led to further studies at Johns Hopkins, then Oxford, and then to leading soldiers in combat in Afghanistan. Careers can take all sorts of different paths. That’s why we’re not taking a one-size-fits-all approach to realizing economic opportunity in Maryland. This month, I signed the RAISE Act into law — to create opportunity for both employees and employers to succeed. The RAISE Act invests in apprenticeships to give Marylanders of all ages options for great, well-paying careers. It means more skilled workers, more job opportunities, and a stronger workforce. No matter the path folks take in their lives, our administration is prioritizing building more economic opportunities for them — and a stronger Maryland. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Elevate, Wes

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Withdrawal from the 2025 Lieutenant Governor Race
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

It is with a very heavy heart that today I am announcing the end of my 2025 race for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia. Since my heart surgery on March 13th and the subsequent complications, I have been working hard to regain my strength and return to the campaign trail. As I learned and was enjoying prior to my surgery, a statewide campaign requires significant travel, multiple appearances per evening, being “on” all of the time and incredible stamina. I have come to the realization that my ability to get back to the 150 percent that I was giving to run a statewide race and that will be necessary to win in November is not possible at the near future. Realizing that I can’t give it my all for the ticket, my supporters and donors is already causing me great stress. I believe making this decision now is in the best interest of both my health and the ticket.

I have heard greatly exaggerated stories from across the Commonwealth about my health. I can assure you that I did not have a stroke or heart attack and I am walking over three miles a day and climbing stairs. As we reported on March 14th, I had heart surgery to repair a genetic defect. Unfortunately, in the weeks since the surgery I have had several complications that have impacted my recovery time. My doctors are still predicting a full recovery but I have come to realize it will be much slower than anticipated. Unfortunately, the 150 percent effort required for a statewide campaign would also significantly delay my recovery, put undue stress on my health and come with some risk, hence my decision to end the 2025 campaign now.

As you heard me say repeatedly on the campaign trail, my campaign was less about me and the Lieutenant Governor position and more about doing well in Northern Virginia so we could elect Winsome Sears as our Governor and reelect Attorney General Jason Miyares. It remains critical that we elect Winsome as Governor so we can continue Governor Youngkin’s legacy of accomplishments and avoid a return to one party rule. If not, Virginia will lose its competitive edge with forced unionization, our neighborhoods will be less safe, education standards will again be lowered, California will determine what cars we drive and electricity will continue to be both more expensive and less reliable. Attorney General Miyares has made great strides in keeping Virginians safe - a direction we must continue. I remain committed to the mission of making sure Winsome and Jason do better in Northern Virginia so we can keep Virginia on the right path.

It has been an extreme pleasure and honor to meet so many great people and leaders as I traveled the Commonwealth early in the campaign. I have learned so much about Virginia and its very different challenges. I have been extremely humbled by the generous welcome and the support I received on the campaign trail. It is an experience I will not forget and will put to good use in my continued public service. I remain committed to serving the residents of Fairfax County as the voice of balance and common sense on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors.

Very truly yours,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County

---

body:

Peter,

My opponent just announced his campaign, and it couldn’t get any better.

He was a “Republican” who ATTENDED and SPOKE at the DNC, bashing on Trump and siding with the Radical Left in their Trump Derangement Syndrome. He OUTWARDLY supported and voted for Kamala Harris last November. Now, he’s officially joined the Democrats and plans to run against me in the general election.

If I lose this race, I think it would be time to retire to the pasture for me. I couldn’t be more confident in Alabamians’ decision to vote for me once again.

But, I do have an inkling of worry in the back of my mind. I know how much money the Radical Left raises on a daily basis, and there’s no doubt that they’ll be chipping in to his campaign. He already rallied with and voted with Democrats; there’s no reason to think they won’t throw everything against me to defeat me.

[**So, I’m coming to you to ease my worries. I am humbly asking you to chip in just $10 towards my midnight fundraising deadline so I can ensure I have enough money to beat my opponent in a landslide victory.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eb8a23267930485a9f940920518293a9&_e=BRTL9YkxBYaazO4HUJvVg5F8W5quyoywxbgU51rMDUR6jXRkl5YvdsM3nDgBIwCDowvXZFqe2W5UeW0aYxOugLJMgryZd7bcGBdVqDtPIO34k8RPyC_10Eur5GYjRMk785Y4dKPK6hagbr9GRVQ3KxEj---qZacSI1_06fsnllDp5OkVVFJzo2Rmk1_5yDesx_uq_lWVVZN_F9XEw8imRmIvl6oHitCLkdQ6bSaNZgZYDCQkkbKRiZHIQejSGbeTxhn9WD4sa9ev8ALHuq6SOAEw8GuqnAf85zfgyz4E3ymJt_pni26YCH18tOwIxutNpBWy4yZT9LxUuKM9_PFmRA%3D%3D)

The Left has been attacking me throughout my whole political career. I’ve seen SEC college football fans be kinder to me while we were on the road when I was Auburn’s head coach than the Radical Left is to conservatives.

_I’ve faced death threats in my political career, but I’ve never received them in my college football career._

That’s why I need your help. This race is not your typical Republican vs. Democrat election. He’ll be trying to swing some Republicans to his newly found Leftist side. It’s imperative that I have the resources to reach out to them before he does.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=eb8a23267930485a9f940920518293a9&_e=BRTL9YkxBYaazO4HUJvVg5F8W5quyoywxbgU51rMDUR6jXRkl5YvdsM3nDgBIwCDowvXZFqe2W5UeW0aYxOugLJMgryZd7bcGBdVqDtPIO34k8RPyC_10Eur5GYjRMk785Y4dKPK6hagbr9GRVQ3KxEj---qZacSI1_06fsnllDp5OkVVFJzo2Rmk1_5yDesqTjEnGOyYwiMHhweGMrs8rkhKkxZ6jH189jbvBHdZCwpEdalezbFeBCtwufn-PDAICbpSS7b02TDAj4GsIM5IHPnycqRN0_aL-L6SLd7eoxewQnVoPeK33OUa_44Tyq-5UspSxUhQEJVVM3AQe7VFQ%3D%3D)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: What these protests have shown us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=Hvy8cM3fHZW1J2YxrySXdS7smznFlrFPj6PGffXF/RD7RYsuRA/vSZMEX9TCkO3MmiO1HmW3pDkcm5TSwS0Ff1TuWuqLPzgwgxY5gHL6p3w=]
Team,
In a world that increasingly feels siloed and fractured, the protests we saw across the country Saturday -- and in the weeks previous -- show us how much of a community there is out there, working every day to invest in the future of our democracy.
We can't let the antics of opponents of voting rights at the federal and state level make us feel less empowered to create the change we want to see at home in our communities.
It's something even our team has struggled with -- how, as just one person, it can feel almost inconsequential as you try and fight these seemingly titanic forces. But even the small things, in your neighborhood, at your school, in your community, with your friends and family -- they all make a difference.
Don't believe us? Look up when the next election is where you live. It's probably before the 2026 primaries. Just knowing when the next election is gives you knowledge and time to tell neighbors, tell friends, register a family member, and so much more. We have a whole suite of voter tools you can use to inform yourself and register others. [https://voteractionproject.org/voter-tools/]
Elections are won by those who show up. Speaking up at a town meeting makes your voice heard and might change the course of events. Registering one more voter might change the course of a local election. Ask yourself: What can you do today, or this week, or before the end of the month to make a difference? How will you show up?
Thank you for all that you already do,
The Voter Action Project Team
P.S. We're still a nonprofit entirely funded by grassroots donations from supporters who get these emails. We can't afford to miss a chance to ask: Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today to make sure every vote counts in our elections? >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2]
Donate Now [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=Hvy8cM3fHZW1J2YxrySXdS7smznFlrFPj6PGffXF/RD7RYsuRA/vSZMEX9TCkO3MmiO1HmW3pDkcm5TSwS0Ff1TuWuqLPzgwgxY5gHL6p3w=]

name: Team Chrissy
subject: SIGN ON: Protect our national parks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Sign our petition before midnight tonight to protect national parks!
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106249531/540899844/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzM5YWI0NC1mNDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d1i-HfIk3UxNeMJ66qvo9KGKcbUubAOf7WFYYwNDuBI=&emci=52461a6d-d01e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a339ab44-f41e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=21278485)
Derek,

Here in Berks and Chester Counties, we're so fortunate to have such beautiful parks and open spaces – and even more fortunate to have incredible community members who work so hard to keep our air clean, our water safe, and our outdoor areas accessible to all.
**But as you read this, President Trump and Elon Musk – with the support of Congressional Republicans who have the power to stop them – are working to DISMANTLE our national parks. They've already fired 1,000 National Park Service (NPS) employees and have directed NPS managers to reduce payroll by another 30%, putting the future of these public spaces at risk.**
**Have you called the White House? Called your U.S. Senators? Great. Now more than ever, we urgently need your help to protect our public lands and the dedicated workers who care for them. In honor of National Park Week and Earth Day, will you do one more thing?**

**Taxes here in Jersey are too damn high, and raising a family here is too damn expensive.**

Trump’s reckless tariffs are doing nothing but raising the already high costs for Jersey families. As your “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs,” Governor, I will fight back on these policies in Trenton to make sure Jersey is a place where everyone can afford to live.

**[Primary Day is rapidly approaching, and I need your help to get this message out to voters across Jersey. Can you chip in $10 or any amount right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106249677/540900481/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250421_FR_TrumpTariffs_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDY1OWM4NS1mNTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCi559ObHqSlab0LcuGoXSA58VCxyJp04bSuGwE2nCU=&emci=c3f868ef-ee1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=a0659c85-f51e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=37438246)**

Josh

clean_body: | | Team, Trump’s tariffs are hurting seniors, families, and small businesses – driving up costs and gutting retirement savings. There’s no strategy. It's just pure chaos – plain and simple. I’m leading the fight to stop Truck’s reckless policies and lower taxes and costs for our Jersey families, but as Primary Day approaches, I need your help. | | | | | | | Taxes here in Jersey are too damn high, and raising a family here is too damn expensive. Trump’s reckless tariffs are doing nothing but raising the already high costs for Jersey families. As your “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs,” Governor, I will fight back on these policies in Trenton to make sure Jersey is a place where everyone can afford to live. Thank you, Josh | Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign , or to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 United States

clean_body: | | | Hey Peter, Have you heard of the Research indicates that nonviolent protests are twice as likely to succeed as armed conflicts – and those engaging a threshold of 3.5% of the population have never failed to bring about change! Earlier this month, we hosted one of over 1,300 events across the country, protesting Trump’s authoritarian assault on our democratic values. This powerful moment of solidarity saw millions of Americans standing together, demanding a government that works for We The People not billionaire donors -proof that transformational change begins locally. Right here in Hesperia, we had 600 people standing up against the Trump administration - the largest turnout in High Desert history! We are on the cusp of achieving the 3.5% critical mass that will STOP MAGA and usher in positive change. The resistance is rising, and so is our determination! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Countries around the world joined the protests, showing their solidarity. We, the people of our communities, our country, and our world are demanding that Trump, along with his MAGA minions and DOGE, be held accountable for their wickedness. The work ahead of us is monumental, with countless local seats to be contested and won. Building political power at the local level is not just an option; it is a necessity for the survival and flourishing of our democracy. In these challenging times, we are at the forefront of a nationwide movement to restore our democracy from the ground up. We work to empower local leaders who truly represent the values and aspirations of their constituents. Never doubt that a small group of thoughtful, committed citizens can change the world; indeed it’s the only thing that ever has! -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. body:
Reps. Ansari and Dexter are leading the charge against the Trump administration |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106250317/540902633/-1686146655?refcode=WUENE446_20250421_ConCrisisKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055977&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNjYTAzOS1mODFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lceez4XH8-BoGLkPGqQiwMSdW6VV3F984EhqOxogHdg=) Have you seen this update, Peter? [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106250319/540902634/-1686146655?refcode=WUENE446_20250421_ConCrisisKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055977&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNjYTAzOS1mODFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lceez4XH8-BoGLkPGqQiwMSdW6VV3F984EhqOxogHdg=) [_NPR_ , 4/21/25]

Today, a group of House Democrats — including two EMILYs List women, **Rep. Yassamin Ansari**(AZ-03) and **Rep. Maxine Dexter** (OR-03) — are in El Salvador, demanding the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Maryland man who was wrongfully deported and is now imprisoned in a brutal foreign facility.

Despite a unanimous ruling from the U.S. Supreme Court ordering his return, Donald Trump has refused to comply. **The Trump administration is acting like it's above the law — but EMILYs List women are fighting back.**

We're proud to stand with Reps. Ansari and Dexter as they lead the charge against this blatant authoritarian overreach.

Thanks for being in this fight with us,

the EMILYs List team | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106250322/540902639/-1686146655?refcode=WUENE446_20250421_ConCrisisKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055977&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNjYTAzOS1mODFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lceez4XH8-BoGLkPGqQiwMSdW6VV3F984EhqOxogHdg=)

_—Original Message—
Sent: Thurs., April 17, 2025
From: EMILYs List_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106250326/540902640/-1686146655?refcode=WUENE446_20250421_ConCrisisKicker_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055977&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWNjYTAzOS1mODFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lceez4XH8-BoGLkPGqQiwMSdW6VV3F984EhqOxogHdg=)
Last week, the Supreme Court of the United States issued a _unanimous_ 9-0 ruling: The Trump administration must facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Maryland man who was wrongfully deported and sent to a dangerous prison in El Salvador.

Donald Trump and his top advisers have refused.

This is not a policy disagreement. This is ignoring the highest court in our land — a brazen rejection of the Constitution, the rule of law, and the balance of power that we all learned about in middle school civics.
Trump is showing us that he thinks he's above the law.

But like every bully and tinpot dictator, he only wins if we give up. And that's not us.
EMILYs List is committed to electing pro-choice, pro-democracy women up and down the ballot and across the country. As we build state centers of power, one focus is the courts — they're becoming the last line of defense against the tyranny of this administration. _And we can win._ Look at Justice-elect Sarah Crawford beating back Elon Musk's millions in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election this month.

We're fighting to elect women at every level who will uphold our rights, protect our freedoms, and push back against authoritarian overreach.
Thanks for being part of it.

– EMILYs List

Donald Trump and his top advisers have refused. This is not a policy disagreement. This is ignoring the highest court in our land — a brazen rejection of the Constitution, the rule of law, and the balance of power that we all learned about in middle school civics. Trump is showing us that he thinks he's above the law. But like every bully and tinpot dictator, he only wins if we give up. And that's not us. EMILYs List is committed to electing pro-choice, pro-democracy women up and down the ballot and across the country. As we build state centers of power, one focus is the courts — they're becoming the last line of defense against the tyranny of this administration. And we can win. Look at Justice-elect Sarah Crawford beating back Elon Musk's millions in the Wisconsin Supreme Court election this month. We're fighting to elect women at every level who will uphold our rights, protect our freedoms, and push back against authoritarian overreach. Thanks for being part of it. – EMILYs List = EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. EMILYs List P.O. Box 96612 Washington, DC 20077 United States Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible. | ---|---

subject: This Administration is neglectful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106250550/540903296/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250421_PT_EarthDay_0_3MO_BonnieWatsonColeman_NA_NA_EarthDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM5YWM5YS1mOTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNlgzI0_exCOOY34kO79saeFfq0pbRxszDyGlc0baGg=&emci=b946a394-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3139ac9a-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098) | Tomorrow is Earth Day! I hope we can all take a breath of fresh air outside and enjoy the beauty of our Earth.

But we must remember, as we appreciate all of the beauty our Earth provides, that climate change is one of the most pressing emergencies we face globally. Our current Administration refuses to acknowledge these facts, doing the opposite by dismantling critical climate protections.

**_[For too long, the Trump administration has been neglectful of climate change. We need 500 signatures on our petition before the end of Earth Day to call for action to defend climate progress. Click here to sign on>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106250551/540903297/1285906222?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250421_PT_EarthDay_0_3MO_BonnieWatsonColeman_NA_NA_EarthDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM5YWM5YS1mOTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNlgzI0_exCOOY34kO79saeFfq0pbRxszDyGlc0baGg=&emci=b946a394-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3139ac9a-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)_** | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106250552/540903298/1285906222?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250421_PT_EarthDay_0_3MO_BonnieWatsonColeman_NA_NA_EarthDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM5YWM5YS1mOTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNlgzI0_exCOOY34kO79saeFfq0pbRxszDyGlc0baGg=&emci=b946a394-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3139ac9a-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)
---
Fighting climate change is a collective responsibility. We all need to play our part to protect our precious Earth, and that includes using our voices to call out those who contribute the most to the environment’s destruction.

**But it is first and foremost the government’s responsibility to hold corporations accountable and push for policies that will protect the Earth.**

As a member of the Sustainable Energy & Environment Coalition, I am committed to advocating for legislation like the Green New Deal that will help reduce our carbon footprint, promote renewable energy, and create a future of hope and promise for Americans.

**_[If you’re with me, sign our petition to stand against climate change and call on the government for increased action to protect our planet.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106250553/540903299/1285906222?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250421_PT_EarthDay_0_3MO_BonnieWatsonColeman_NA_NA_EarthDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTM5YWM5YS1mOTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CNlgzI0_exCOOY34kO79saeFfq0pbRxszDyGlc0baGg=&emci=b946a394-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=3139ac9a-f91e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=30096098)_**

Thank you for standing with us,

Bonnie
* * *

---
Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

name: Mark Warner
subject: [Urgent]: Sign my grassroots petition calling on Donald Trump to fire Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106250756/540904049/29488987?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_PT_Hegseth_250421_T1_2&ms=MW_ATA_EM_PT_Hegseth_250421_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEyNmRhOS1mYTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwIRXNrh4ZXv6e7vY2OXaRU66JBANqoY8eWLoAePojM=) Derek, I won’t beat around the bush:

**If Pete Hegseth won’t resign, Donald Trump needs to fire him.**

We can’t allow this level of incompetence to continue to harm our national security any longer – so I need you to make your voice heard with me at this critical moment. [**_[1,000 signatures needed before midnight]: Sign my grassroots petition calling on Donald Trump to fire Pete Hegseth >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106250757/540904050/-1599880283?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_PT_Hegseth_250421_T1_2&ms=MW_ATA_EM_PT_Hegseth_250421_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEyNmRhOS1mYTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwIRXNrh4ZXv6e7vY2OXaRU66JBANqoY8eWLoAePojM=&emci=e5079789-ef1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ac126da9-fa1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4568237) __********[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106250758/540904051/-1599880283?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_PT_Hegseth_250421_T1_2&ms=MW_ATA_EM_PT_Hegseth_250421_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzEyNmRhOS1mYTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iwIRXNrh4ZXv6e7vY2OXaRU66JBANqoY8eWLoAePojM=&emci=e5079789-ef1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ac126da9-fa1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4568237)********__ Earlier today, I went on both CNN and MSNBC to talk about how completely incompetent Pete Hegseth is as Secretary of Defense.

The fact that he shared sensitive military plans on his private phone with his family members who had no basis for having exposure to that kind of information...

The fact that a former senior official at the Department of Defense has defined the past four weeks as “total chaos at the Pentagon” under Hegseth’s leadership...

It’s unacceptable.

**This is a guy who’s so far in over his head in a job that’s much too big for him. So now the question remains: At what point do my Republican colleagues – who claim to care about our national security – join me?**

Derek, I hope I can count on you to join me in this fight.

[_**Will you sign my petition calling on Donald Trump to fire Pete Hegseth? We can’t allow this level of incompetence to continue to harm our national security any longer – so I need you to make your voice heard with me at this critical moment. [[1,000 signatures needed before midnight]: Sign my grassroots petition calling on Donald Trump to fire Pete Hegseth >>]() ********** Earlier today, I went on both CNN and MSNBC to talk about how completely incompetent Pete Hegseth is as Secretary of Defense. The fact that he shared sensitive military plans on his private phone with his family members who had no basis for having exposure to that kind of information... The fact that a former senior official at the Department of Defense has defined the past four weeks as “total chaos at the Pentagon” under Hegseth’s leadership... It’s unacceptable. This is a guy who’s so far in over his head in a job that’s much too big for him. So now the question remains: At what point do my Republican colleagues – who claim to care about our national security – join me? Derek, I hope I can count on you to join me in this fight. I hope you all had a blessed Easter weekend, celebrating with family and friends. I have 2 special guests on today's show that give us expert insight into the economy, global trade, tariffs and U.S. manufacturing. First I talk to Kevin Hassett, the Director of the National Economic Council, to walk us through recent developments within the Trump administration. As country after country lined-up to make a deal with President Trump, the president put a pause on all tariffs except China. President Trump has now raised the tariffs to 145% in relation to China. Essentially isolating China with the most extreme tariffs set the stage for other countries to decide how they wanted to respond. Hassett says 15 countries or more will come away with a good deal in the coming days and weeks. Hassett walks us down Main St. for American consumers and small business owner as to what they can expect to pay for goods. With 2 outstanding jobs reports and a reduction in inflation, the only question yet to be answered is will China come to the table? After that, Mick Mulvaney, the former Director of the Office of Management and Budget as well as the former White House Chief of Staff gives us his insight into global trade and the budget. Are the tariffs more effective as a negotiating tool or a real source of income for the United States? Can domestic industries that have been squandered be brought back to life? The Senate only cut $4 Billion in spending, showing they aren't interested in saving money as the GOP is making a push to make the 2017 tax cuts permanent. Stick around to the end for a tour of the White House press briefing room!
Featuring:
**Kevin Hassett**
Director of the National Economic Council
https://www.hoover.org/profiles/kevin-hassett
**Mick Mulvaney**
Former Director of Office of Management and Budget
Former White House Chief of Staff
Former Congressman | South Carolina, District 5

name: Team Tina
subject: These tariffs…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter — whether you’re an economist or a small business owner in rural Oregon, everyone is speculating about the impacts of the tariffs proposed by the Trump administration. Almost everyone agrees: these tariffs could have devastating and long-lasting impacts on our economy. When we have unpredictability and instability from the federal government, Oregon businesses — and Oregon consumers — take the hit. **[Add your name right now to stand with Tina against Trump’s tariffs.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106251260/540905876/1166680278?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU5MjJmNS1mYjFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrtE8Pyt1Ayj4NjOJCupGu0MJ0OdPFdfJl8rC98RMDo=&emci=a476f3de-c01e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=305922f5-fb1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106251265/540905877/1166680278?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU5MjJmNS1mYjFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrtE8Pyt1Ayj4NjOJCupGu0MJ0OdPFdfJl8rC98RMDo=&emci=a476f3de-c01e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=305922f5-fb1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)
---
Oregon is known for many great things — including excellent food, coffee, agriculture, wine, and timber. These industries fuel local businesses, support manufacturing jobs here in the state, and provide Oregon-made goods around the world.
Situated on the coast, we’re one of the most trade-dependent states in the country. Our ports do billions of dollars worth of business each year, and support local jobs in the area. These tariffs could have disastrous effects on our businesses and consumers and increase costs of living around the state when they’re already too high as it is.
**Everything could be more expensive.** At a time when people are struggling we need the President to be focused on making lives better, not worse.
**[Simply put, we can’t afford this, Peter. Tina is standing up against these devastating tariffs. Will you add your name right now and show her you’ve got her back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106251267/540905882/-1239637173?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU5MjJmNS1mYjFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrtE8Pyt1Ayj4NjOJCupGu0MJ0OdPFdfJl8rC98RMDo=&emci=a476f3de-c01e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=305922f5-fb1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106251269/540905884/1166680278?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU5MjJmNS1mYjFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrtE8Pyt1Ayj4NjOJCupGu0MJ0OdPFdfJl8rC98RMDo=&emci=a476f3de-c01e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=305922f5-fb1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15353729)

clean_body: | Peter — whether you’re an economist or a small business owner in rural Oregon, everyone is speculating about the impacts of the tariffs proposed by the Trump administration. Almost everyone agrees: these tariffs could have devastating and long-lasting impacts on our economy. When we have unpredictability and instability from the federal government, Oregon businesses — and Oregon consumers — take the hit. | Oregon is known for many great things — including excellent food, coffee, agriculture, wine, and timber. These industries fuel local businesses, support manufacturing jobs here in the state, and provide Oregon-made goods around the world. Situated on the coast, we’re one of the most trade-dependent states in the country. Our ports do billions of dollars worth of business each year, and support local jobs in the area. These tariffs could have disastrous effects on our businesses and consumers and increase costs of living around the state when they’re already too high as it is. Everything could be more expensive. At a time when people are struggling we need the President to be focused on making lives better, not worse. Thanks for stepping up today, Team Tina | Tina Kotek is working hard to make Oregon a better place to live and work for all Oregonians – and making real progress on issues like housing and homelessness, education and child care, and mental health and addiction services. Can you chip in any amount now to support her work? | = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

That’s not cutting waste—it’s cutting off opportunities for over 9 million students who rely on financial aid to afford college. Instead of investing in our children’s future, he’s tearing it down.

This time, he set up the chat including his wife, personal lawyer, and brother in the conversation. This reckless behavior puts lives at risk and undermines our national security. **But let’s be clear about one thing: Pete Hegseth may have lit the match, but it was Senator Thom Tillis who handed him the box.** Every disaster under Hegseth’s reckless leadership is a direct consequence of Tillis’s failure to stand up for what’s right. Peter,

While Americans are freaking out about what Trump’s tariffs will mean for them, Trump is bragging about manipulating the stock market for his billionaire friends with his tariff reversal.

**It’s unnecessary and cruel.** Every day, hardworking people wake up in fear of how much more expensive everyday items will get. Prices should not be determined by Trump’s whims on any given day.

**And here’s the thing that really stings: Republicans in Congress _could_ decide to put a permanent stop to Trump’s tariffs, but they won’t. They care more about serving Trump than the constituents who elected them.

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

There is an overwhelming frustration that the Democratic establishment is
failing to build a True Opposition that will STAND UP and DEFEAT Trump,
and Bernie isn’t mincing his words about Establishment Democrats:

“If we waited on them to defeat Trumpism and move our country forward,
we'd be waiting forever. So it is up to us.”

Last week, David Hogg, a DNC vice chair, announced that his PAC, Leaders
We Deserve, is launching a $20 million campaign that will include
supporting younger, progressive candidates to run in primaries against
incumbent Democrats.

It’s a bold initiative, and we want to understand how our movement feels
about primarying Democratic incumbents who lack the grassroots support and
fighting spirit needed to defeat Trump.

Here’s the first question: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25353?source=email-20250421&t=1011&akid=8310%2E5885482%2E9wL0Iv ]Do you think Our Revolution should support
primary challenges to incumbent establishment Democrats who are not
generating the grassroots energy needed to defeat Trump?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25353?source=email-20250421&t=1012&akid=8310%2E5885482%2E9wL0Iv ]YES
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25353?source=email-20250421&t=1013&akid=8310%2E5885482%2E9wL0Iv ]NO

A recent poll confirms that the vast majority of Democrats agree with
Bernie—72% support abandoning a cautious, centrist approach when
confronting Trump and his far-right allies.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25353?source=email-20250421&t=1014&akid=8310%2E5885482%2E9wL0Iv ]Headline reading: As AOC & Sanders draw crowds, 72% of Democrats want
party to abandon centrist approach to Trump.

If we're going to meet the urgency of Trump’s renewed threat, we cannot
sit back and wait for the Democratic Party establishment to get serious
about building the kind of inclusive, energized movement our moment
demands: we have no choice but to transform the Democratic Party from
within.

Now we urgently need to know where Our Revolution members stand. Take our
survey and let us know: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25353?source=email-20250421&t=1015&akid=8310%2E5885482%2E9wL0Iv ]Do you think we must actively hold
establishment Democrats accountable through primary challenges if they're
not generating real grassroots excitement and serious progressive energy?

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Peter, I have big news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I’m officially running for Congress to win back Colorado’s 8th District.
| [](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=nm7Ib7yh6s7o&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=25)
---
Hi Peter, I want you to be one of the first to know:

I’m officially running for Congress to win back Colorado’s 8th District.

I was proud to be the first person to represent Colorado’s 8th – and the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

[_**I’ll explain more about why I’m running, but if you’re with me, will you split a donation between Fight For Progress and me to get our campaign off the ground? This will be one of the most competitive House races in the country, so every dollar makes a difference.**_](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=YWIK7I9ITXY3&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=25)
| [ DONATE >> ](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=ja0zT7cZJQ0Y&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=25)
---
Let me start from the beginning: my parents’ dream.

My parents came to this country from a small town in Mexico. They didn’t come with much, but they came in search of the American Dream. They raised me to believe that with hard work, perseverance, and care for others, anything was possible. That belief led me to become the first in my family to graduate from college and later, become a pediatrician in Adams County.

But as a doctor, I saw families struggling with the rising costs of healthcare and prescription drugs, and I knew I needed to do more. The American Dream my parents worked so hard for was slipping away for too many.

So, I took that fight to the state legislature and then Congress. I forced Big Pharma to lower prescription prices, helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin, and pushed to allow Medicare to negotiate lower prices.

**But our representative in Congress, Gabe Evans, is trying to rip away health care from tens of thousands of Coloradans, including the very families I served as a pediatrician.**

I won’t stand by while Gabe Evans makes life harder for working families, all while giving tax cuts to billionaires. So I’m getting back in the ring and running for Congress, and I hope I can count on your support.

[_**CO-08 was one of the closest House races in the country in both 2022 and 2024, so if we’re going to win what’s bound to be one of the toughest races in 2026, we need a strong grassroots team from the very beginning. Will you split a donation between Fight For Progress and me to help us launch this campaign?**_](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=tYS2EM3so5Ef&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=25)
| | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=4Xlem1QX70T8&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=5)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=e8z9rcsxh5ov&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=10)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=0w9IKmwIV4C3&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=25)
---
| [ CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=MUZuU1c04azC&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1&amount=50)
---
| [ OTHER AMOUNT ](https://fight4progress.org/caraveo?t=QEDTsXL3Cyg7&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-21_1)
---
Thanks,

Yadira
* * *

name: Maj. Gen. Paul Eaton, U.S. Army (Ret.)
subject: This has gone on long enough.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Tell Pete Hegseth: It is time for you to do the right thing and resign. Thousands and thousands of VoteVets supporters agree, and I hope you’ll add your name to the list.
#
Paul Eaton here.
The Department of Defense has been pulled into complete chaos, and this is happening as a direct result of Donald Trump and the man he nominated for Secretary of Defense, Pete Hegseth.
In three short months Hegseth has made a mockery of the finest Military force the world has ever known. **This has gone on long enough.** Pete Hegseth has to resign, and if he won’t leave willingly we’ve got to exert enough pressure to ensure President Trump fires him.
I need you to join VoteVets on this. **[Add your name and demand Pete Hegseth’s resignation.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250421_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?source=em250421-1-120&akid=34365%2E3013755%2Em46GIL)
| [HEGSETH: RESIGN](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250421_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?source=em250421-1-120&akid=34365%2E3013755%2Em46GIL)
---
This all started well before Hegseth took the job. He was unprepared and unqualified on day one. We warned them about this, and it’s important to highlight something there: Trump forcing through an unqualified nominee does not help his administration accomplish their goals. All it does is weaken the force and our national security.
Republicans in the Senate knew this, and they confirmed him anyway. Within weeks, Hegseth was sharing extremely sensitive strike plans in unsecured, hackable texting groups. At the time that story broke, we said it was a virtual certainty that Hegseth was sharing critical national security secrets in other unsecured channels.
Yesterday, that was confirmed. The Secretary of Defense shared sensitive and detailed plans for Yemen strikes with his wife, his brother, and his lawyer on March 15th. The information isn’t coming from the press this time, either. A half dozen high level staff at the Pentagon have resigned or been fired over the last week, and they are the ones breaking this news.
Let me be clear: Missing an exit on the highway is a mistake. This is not a mistake. Sharing information like this with uncleared individuals is criminal recklessness, and exposes the U.S. Military to unacceptable risk. Moreover, it is now an established pattern of behavior.
I spent decades in the Army. I have never seen anything like this. And this is personal. My fighter pilot Father was lost, almost certainly to hostile fire over the well defended Ho Chi Minh Trail in Laos during the Vietnam War. You get my drift.
Bottom line: **The Secretary of Defense is a national security threat.** Each day he stays at his post is another day that the men and women serving our country are in danger. We should never have faced this problem in the first place, but the next best time to solve it is today.
I’m asking you to join me in speaking directly to the Secretary of Defense now. **[Tell Pete Hegseth: It is time for you to do the right thing and resign. Thousands and thousands of VoteVets supporters agree, and I hope you’ll add your name to the list.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250421_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?source=em250421-1-120&akid=34365%2E3013755%2Em46GIL)
| [HEGSETH: RESIGN](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250421_vv_em_hegseth_resign/?source=em250421-1-120&akid=34365%2E3013755%2Em46GIL)
---
Thank you for your help.
Respectfully,
Paul Eaton
Senior Advisor, VoteVets
Major General, U.S. Army, Retired

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34365%2E3013755%2Em46GIL).

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Trust
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Donald Trump is destroying Brand America

Donald Trump's tariffs are destroying relationships that have taken decades to build, and he's doing it in real time.
But even if Donald Trump undid these tariffs tomorrow, he has already undermined the most important commodity our country has had with much of the rest of the world ... and that is trust.
**[Watch more here:](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4153?t=1&akid=2327%2E4767699%2E7xVR20)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4153?t=2&akid=2327%2E4767699%2E7xVR20)
That is one reason I am proud California is the first state in the nation to file a lawsuit to stop Trump's tariffs. Not only are they illegal, but we need countries and businesses around the world to know that they can count on our system of government even in the most difficult of times.
Thank you for reading and watching,
Gavin Newsom
* * *

i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
Before you go, we are humbly asking you to support Gavin Newsom's Campaign for Democracy with a contribution. If you believe Democrats need to go on offense, even in Red States, we're asking you to donate $20 to help Gavin Newsom get it done.
If you care about abortion access, voting rights, and the future of our democracy, please take a minute to donate today. name: Rep. Pat Harrigan
subject: Whether you’re a Democrat or a Republican, this should bother you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
put America FIRST and don’t spend years trying to throw someone in jail for winning an election.
Radicals spent four years straight shredding constitutional freedom after constitutional freedom.

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=690429be73814388a6cab9ea2ff27389&_e=vhLUM3CqvuoBnzq4mbjtj_UVJ-NA4xBO2eCtMdtZKMXGfF3ijL5_yEU7hnf4oqkXByeskIO0ZvbrnlCTiYsYpaj3E_m09GfQhc5E7Id5Tmmmebq3u0yDsD5KRidNrKRq1K9Wtb6JYQVcYVMw9OsGOW52Wc-GsSuf1vIkTIHzuLoSeQWtJ5hQjJqSjrnZikdRnbbs1xW9xkVT8Q_d8svEh-NGr6eIkKGt1fjGSdzLyHaNDc_Ra-82UGmMdmfwL1UfB5PLI1hGqq3lUMdTd4yIetaIr3HYq39EdJXqHT64_yOfc9RaznCyZxGhOCLmPoWZ4yVAInyGxswnXffwwsHPq0UfdzH8p_OdLZBUhRRLvic%3D)
---
Patriot,

**I just had to share this with someone else who will understand.**

The result of what the Democrats have done to our country over the past four years is absolutely **APPALLING**. What they've done to destroy our great nation is just totally and completely unacceptable.

Radicals spent four years straight shredding constitutional freedom after constitutional freedom in favor of their woke policies, like DEI, Bidenflation, and Catch-and-Release.

**Whether you 're a Democrat or a Republican -- the state of our country as a result of those far-left politicians should bother you.** I want to live in a country where we can all offer different perspectives, but at the end of the day, put America FIRST and don't spend years trying to throw someone in jail for winning an election.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Trump and his chemical industry buddies want to profit off poisoning our air and water.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Standing up to Trump and corporate polluters, Earth Day and every day. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW84vbWZDXqrBr_d94m52H2TTJsN-MWKvF7foGiGEvRveKNiRjjz6B0ZEL-oHPNuRLgaKa8gfFErRp-zxal_ZTpFvd5zCoH1gCLGHFg3rmxuXfYQSvhPHZVv6GWLVT2HJyF4iNZ5lDYv1CmNBVvteNxTVHFY3ZSApP9wnM6V9WDxV_IdVu7Dvb9o_-oDaFP29-YOhUAQ079aPFxHWaTqJoxt1ATTYQCH3jZQVApcEN_8XoqsfL25qD2086Z4YPxwfOphmlnHfDvnDGPJbvd2o85qwWpIuBrzj3-pfcESsFO65__I19Qa6TyKm9K6-Nte9W/4fu/bHq_a1UyQjij6FFWml_-MA/h0/h001.g_bb0XxICJxnEbaQNmDDnDFaV0zvAdTaPPMfRcwYPA0)
---
Friend, With Earth Day tomorrow, we’re shining a light on how Trump is poisoning our air and water—and how we can fight back. Trump has appointed EPA staff who have lobbied for chemical corporations and opposed bans on asbestos. He’s also illegally firing workers who clean up toxic contamination and focus on environmental justice. His administration also terminated an agreement to protect majority-Black communities from raw sewage, and exempted nearly 70 coal plants from Biden-era protections against mercury and arsenic. This is unacceptable. For decades, I’ve worked with movements to bring about environmental justice. Under the Biden administration, **I helped push for historic drinking water standards to protect families from toxic chemicals known as PFAS.** **These “forever chemicals” cause cancer** , harm immune and reproductive systems, and damage children’s development. They accumulate in our bodies and they never break down or biodegrade. **Now Trump’s taking steps to roll back Biden-era plans and regulations to limit PFAS chemicals.** **He’s also trying to reverse hundreds of state and local PFAS bans** , which have protected people from PFAS in consumer products like cookware, food packaging, clothing, firefighting gear, playground equipment, and cosmetics. [**Please sign if you agree: Federal lawmakers must protect states’ ability to ban these cancer-causing toxic chemicals. The time is now for Congress to act, including cleaning up PFAS contamination, stopping PFAS from polluting our drinking water, and banning PFAS in products.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTNxsH5hTNHNfYdc_iq5xrW6cyFz6qyxuOAR3sqd8pvQgb-FCoXoJxH2bzLpZ648iEheylmun3vo_AOpeLlwuewSu_GOTQU3NEDbttINe-DIN1JypvnAVT4V7WQoHQNX4pFsDxi0x7o4xCa26TkVdDlKcLw2eatxMniajo4cZNVQjEkiqrnEmFEGrwdxmLU45favOkbEfGQ02Lnzzz-WhQvuAhrCImDfBSvWjO5r0ub9W48N79GZcogWgC9v9pTChSz2hXcYR-tABNkF657JVyS5J8R7eONcvNFXYnZ3JJDN9BityQk9-NnLoYqc1qVb1_IUI-K6qv6yAXxtlQxaD9szZWZmoZDErLU6wl-aAxnDYazBObpOV-F_AnMmb87VYK5kk_2fB_COW03q8_Ip_aE1u3IlyR4hSZyM5_QWWqrkuAMU5WtFZI9UCdBc-AfTYXxFHSGZ13v2xw1Lghso6IvU/4fu/bHq_a1UyQjij6FFWml_-MA/h1/h001.47QgwLOULu6q_oWBZRVZp8nhAKU0RhmkaqQvtwn3FkU) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTNxsH5hTNHNfYdc_iq5xrW6cyFz6qyxuOAR3sqd8pvQgb-FCoXoJxH2bzLpZ648iEheylmun3vo_AOpeLlwuewQWSGoVyDlIsW6mc04AVDATCkzHbGmzPcEE_0vZ__jNh3glrxZAhCea6HFevGF9_ZUjrPG_oPnBB-QjR67XX9STH-3HtGWQYr5sPyKXoBY2kDmHZjfAbPUWYIYDIt9vDfqinec7g5JE-_CHjYrA0SFRRj75d2ayjAp-Wj9GyhvzMK4OGowguaMsBky83O4yOzFRC4RriGLhnDU7rlRDCrtGedKvnreZwg9gPIX-3hXx9nkvgHXhAEPesFnZq7SViBOIkBKs9VMdW5PvyGhb-RXFjsj1jM4GGa6jiXkkEaLMOhXu9UigJeU5k4lkHlbLSZ_0z0FPYl6rfI9zDYXf5uSNVugQw7H7jhG6JSgsyWv1SYaU_GvuNplK5kFvwTvo_3Q/4fu/bHq_a1UyQjij6FFWml_-MA/h2/h001.LsYkdhTDYC5plPlPgI0wS0n_g0gsjfojeAKZBhmbiLE)
