The DuPont corporation knew as early as 1961 that PFAS chemicals (shorthand for per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) were toxic and caused serious health effects. In order to continue profiting, DuPont buried that information and made tens of billions of dollars for decades while the rest of us were being poisoned.
My state of Michigan has more known sites contaminated with PFAS than any other state.
I’ve worked alongside my constituents to clean up these “forever chemicals,” including pushing for cleanup funding, holding community town halls with environmental leaders, and using my position in the House Oversight Committee to push the FDA to safeguard our food and hold chemical companies like DuPont accountable for the harms of PFAS.
I also passed an amendment to prioritize cleaning up PFAS in frontline communities that have been disproportionately impacted by pollution, climate change, and environmental destruction.
As part of protecting the human right to water, I’ve also passed amendments that would provide $23 billion to fully replace dangerous lead pipes. And I successfully pushed the EPA to adopt a historic requirement to replace all poisonous lead service lines that carry water to people’s homes... but if the EPA staff who’d implement this policy are all fired, it won’t happen.
That’s why Congress needs to push federal agencies on these issues. When Congress passes a law, it’s much harder to overturn than policies enacted by presidents within federal agencies.
[**Sign now to urge Congress: Protect Americans from toxic chemicals like cancer-causing PFAS. Pass legislation to defend states’ abilities to ban these chemicals, clean up PFAS contamination, stop PFAS from polluting our drinking water, and phase out non-essential uses of PFAS.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9jzJnep0tjRIZRggydvVqTNxsH5hTNHNfYdc_iq5xrW6cyFz6qyxuOAR3sqd8pvQgb-FCoXoJxH2bzLpZ648iEheylmun3vo_AOpeLlwuewRWMo6NS5yL42ajQYzYncuDyuw2cxYAtnlVOe4ogp4Jb8BbGkNAwMDWlGbq3A0pupzUOK7uKzis1hXp8In4kflJO--R0JW_iI9ljFQAhIQM4a162to-WtNK5OcDKfbx3fAouZg91YEVRyhp2VP23AQ6KuNqZkAzPZBQ5d9R-mCuf3obZxw1OHitPSy20rBl-MjbH8-oiV5a_yyEPCwN32y_3-1Lb8QI9cVNFiTJUiACLYwKWHizAL5ONKzh_KqtlGn87XNpx1wmdx31r1oGVq-L8yGBCfUiXD086beLAE7F39ZTVbI1E7GxT2Y0HhJFRY0HdF_sJG6nMArws80mtRuNpdKdjAhlF5JWjODV6nMUqz7ha8p_yEK7llHQ3JaMoiI/4fu/bHq_a1UyQjij6FFWml_-MA/h3/h001.WM_aL_KJiUQ_Y-d76V3Ju6efSJwZUiwSwJYsjAjTHEk)
Thank you for taking action. We can’t let the water we rely on be sacrificed for corporate greed. That includes protecting water from oil and gas pipelines.
Unfortunately, Trump is also**** fast-tracking permits for the destructive Line 5 pipeline under the Great Lakes, which would threaten drinking water for more than 40 million people. I’ve met with Tribal leaders who’ve kept up the fight to shut down Line 5, reminding us that “water is life.”
I will continue standing up to corporations that exploit our water and violate our Indigenous neighbors’ rights. Together, we will demand our government respect the human right to breathe clean air and drink clean water.
With you in the fight for our environment and our rights,
Rashida

clean_body: Standing up to Trump and corporate polluters, Earth Day and every day. | | | Friend, With Earth Day tomorrow, we’re shining a light on how Trump is poisoning our air and water—and how we can fight back. Trump has appointed EPA staff who have lobbied for chemical corporations and opposed bans on asbestos. He’s also illegally firing workers who clean up toxic contamination and focus on environmental justice. His administration also terminated an agreement to protect majority-Black communities from raw sewage, and exempted nearly 70 coal plants from Biden-era protections against mercury and arsenic. This is unacceptable. For decades, I’ve worked with movements to bring about environmental justice. Under the Biden administration, I helped push for historic drinking water standards to protect families from toxic chemicals known as PFAS. These “forever chemicals” cause cancer , harm immune and reproductive systems, and damage children’s development. They accumulate in our bodies and they never break down or biodegrade. Now Trump’s taking steps to roll back Biden-era plans and regulations to limit PFAS chemicals. He’s also trying to reverse hundreds of state and local PFAS bans , which have protected people from PFAS in consumer products like cookware, food packaging, clothing, firefighting gear, playground equipment, and cosmetics. | The DuPont corporation knew as early as 1961 that PFAS chemicals (shorthand for per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) were toxic and caused serious health effects. In order to continue profiting, DuPont buried that information and made tens of billions of dollars for decades while the rest of us were being poisoned. My state of Michigan has more known sites contaminated with PFAS than any other state. I’ve worked alongside my constituents to clean up these “forever chemicals,” including pushing for cleanup funding, holding community town halls with environmental leaders, and using my position in the House Oversight Committee to push the FDA to safeguard our food and hold chemical companies like DuPont accountable for the harms of PFAS. I also passed an amendment to prioritize cleaning up PFAS in frontline communities that have been disproportionately impacted by pollution, climate change, and environmental destruction. As part of protecting the human right to water, I’ve also passed amendments that would provide $23 billion to fully replace dangerous lead pipes. And I successfully pushed the EPA to adopt a historic requirement to replace all poisonous lead service lines that carry water to people’s homes... but if the EPA staff who’d implement this policy are all fired, it won’t happen. That’s why Congress needs to push federal agencies on these issues. When Congress passes a law, it’s much harder to overturn than policies enacted by presidents within federal agencies. Thank you for taking action. We can’t let the water we rely on be sacrificed for corporate greed. That includes protecting water from oil and gas pipelines. Unfortunately, Trump is also** fast-tracking permits for the destructive Line 5 pipeline under the Great Lakes, which would threaten drinking water for more than 40 million people. I’ve met with Tribal leaders who’ve kept up the fight to shut down Line 5, reminding us that “water is life.” I will continue standing up to corporations that exploit our water and violate our Indigenous neighbors’ rights. Together, we will demand our government respect the human right to breathe clean air and drink clean water. With you in the fight for our environment and our rights, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8496%2E5257348%2E1jqVyV)
Derek, last month, we learned of the “Houthi PC Small Group” chat, where top Trump officials shared sensitive information about an impending military operation in Yemen. We learned of this because a reporter was mistakenly added to the thread.
There was backlash and uproar across the political spectrum. **But ultimately, Republicans in Congress did nothing to demand accountability or oversight into the sharing of sensitive military information over text messages. And Trump did nothing to punish his top-ranking officials for serious national security lapses.**
Which is why we cannot be surprised that Signalgate somehow got worse:
**According to the _New York Times_ , Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth shared information about the military strike in Yemen in a different group chat — this time, one that included his wife and brothers who have absolutely zero “need to know.”**
Derek, this is outrageous. This is a fireable offense. In fact, I called for Pete Hegseth to be fired the first time we learned of Signalgate. Frankly, he should never have been confirmed in the first place.
Donald Trump has got to get rid of Pete Hegseth — before the week is out.
**[If you agree that it’s time for Pete Hegseth to resign — or be fired — add your name today. It’s high time we see some accountability from the Trump administration.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-hegseth.nQschC&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8496%2E5257348%2E1jqVyV)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-hegseth.nQschC&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8496%2E5257348%2E1jqVyV)
---
The willingness of top Trump officials to message in unsecured group chats about military operations demonstrates both a kind of dangerous incompetence and arrogance.
**They think they’re above the law.** They’ve done away with FBI background checks for top people and standard safety measures to keep our intel out of the wrong hands.
Conversations that should happen in the Situation Room shouldn’t be happening on an unsecured group chat.
**Derek, I was the former Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee. And it’s hard for me to capture just how serious a f*ck up this is.**
**[Hegseth has got to go, I don’t care whether by resignation or firing by Donald Trump (he used to love firing people on The Apprentice, how about now?). If you agree, add your name. Let’s put pressure on the president to act.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-hegseth.nQschC&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8496%2E5257348%2E1jqVyV)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202504-hegseth.nQschC&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250421_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8496%2E5257348%2E1jqVyV)
---
Derek, this level of incompetence is dangerous, and there must be consequences for this massive breach of security from the Trump administration.
More soon,
Adam

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Tonight →
body:
---
Derek, we're reaching out to ask if you can contribute $3 to the DNC tonight. Here’s why: It’s been less than 100 days since Trump took office. In that time, Trump has:
* Chaotically enacted tariffs that have increased costs and tanked the stock market.
* Rolled back a Biden-Harris program to lower drug costs for millions of Americans.
* Given an unelected billionaire access to sensitive information about millions of Americans.
* Supported Elon Musk’s plan to fire government workers without cause and dismantle federal agencies like the IRS and Social Security — which hold sensitive taxpayer data and pay out millions of dollars to Americans every month.
* Threatened to illegally send American citizens to Salvadorian prisons.

**Democrats are fighting back. But we have to do more than just resist Trump’s agenda.** If the beginning of the Trump administration has shown us anything, it’s that we _must_ build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. That’s why we’re asking for your help today. The more contributions we receive now, while Trump’s term is just beginning, the more effective we can be in investing in state parties all over the country, in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. clean_body: Derek, we're reaching out to ask if you can contribute $3 to the DNC tonight. Here’s why: It’s been less than 100 days since Trump took office. In that time, Trump has: Chaotically enacted tariffs that have increased costs and tanked the stock market. Rolled back a Biden-Harris program to lower drug costs for millions of Americans. Given an unelected billionaire access to sensitive information about millions of Americans. Supported Elon Musk’s plan to fire government workers without cause and dismantle federal agencies like the IRS and Social Security — which hold sensitive taxpayer data and pay out millions of dollars to Americans every month. Threatened to illegally send American citizens to Salvadorian prisons. Democrats are fighting back. But we have to do more than just resist Trump’s agenda. If the beginning of the Trump administration has shown us anything, it’s that we must build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. That’s why we’re asking for your help today. The more contributions we receive now, while Trump’s term is just beginning, the more effective we can be in investing in state parties all over the country, in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you for your help, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

name: GOTV PAC
subject: How we won in “Trump Country”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
April 1st wasn't just an ordinary election day in Wisconsin — it was a warning shot across the bow of the Trump Republican machine.
Despite Donald Trump winning Wisconsin in 2024 — and despite Elon Musk pouring tens of millions into right-wing causes in the state — Democrats won big in the 2025 State Supreme Court election.
Why?
Because of turnout.
Because of engaged, motivated voters.
And because organizations like GOTV PAC knew what was coming — and acted.
Our early modeling flagged what many missed: this wasn't going to be about persuading swing voters. It was going to be about who showed up.
So we did what we do best. We invested in turning out the voters who often go overlooked, and Susan Crawford's victory margin? Roughly 70% of it came from turnout advantage.
That's not a fluke. That's the kind of strategic work that GOTV PAC exists to do.
But this win didn't just secure a court seat. It gave us a blueprint for our next elections — specifically in Virginia, where we'll be working to flip the House of Delegates, and in Pennsylvania, where we'll work to hold three state Supreme Court seats.
But we need to replicate this success.
Will you chip in $25 or more today to help us drive the same kind of turnout in the districts and states that matter most in 2025? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04212025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04212025]
The other side is relying on billionaires and Trump holdovers. We're relying on you.
Let's keep showing up — and let's keep winning.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: Mike Rogers
subject: They thought I’d close down and disappear never to be heard from again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate

It didn’t work on Pres. Trump & it won’t work on me.

I spent years as an FBI special Agent, coming face to face with some of the most corrupt and dangerous human traffickers, mobsters, and politicians. ** ** _I saw the dirtiest, most disgusting side of politics._** ** _But I’ve never seen something like the far left’s total war on President Trump. _

Hardly a “liberation,” Trump is engaging in economic self-sabotage that could plunge the US and the world into a recession or worse. He has been wielding an ax not just against a historic magnolia tree at the White House, but against our allies, our economy and the very Constitution that upholds our democracy. His reckless actions, including sweeping tariffs that have thrown our trade and stock markets into chaos, threaten the economic stability of countless Americans. This is how you sabotage the world’s economic engine. Now more than ever, we need your support to elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will DEFEAT Trump’s insane agenda and prioritize our communities over the interests of the super-rich. Friend, Let’s be clear about what we’re up against.

My opponents aren’t just running against me—they’re knowingly lying to voters about my record. One of them even kept repeating a quote he knew was fake—after the reporter who made it up admitted it and deleted it.

**This is what desperation looks like. And they are DESPERATE to bring their far-left, anti-police, pro-criminal rights agenda back to Virginia.**
__
---
[ HELP ME FIGHT BACK ](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/G8PIUZy1e2pbTIAD3RD3sqLB1c2X3ZK0ks4-RpfNa-6b7aWzUrar85QYyGOFg1GikgjAYq4rT_UINGWrjVIirhK8k9lbFSzCCBLpD6TUJFEphcVtQfjt-poVH96U-Z_FiZS5UhvkVjtDPUldNmfVzyQWBO_7x-pi9x6411cn90aIg0nAreRQOGMiOpZUg1ecMy1ad5zi9MV3MPxt35Z9iYHZKEhgj-3r_NRGal0DdMdrlipP4JePZfl7UFK_-yT0STRdg4k5b7pH2kcyUcCWbEItKXTdBwbCwwr6j1C3sBg8OR90gyr5OLAlhzdQsd3VSAruBqOj91VRJGLdcVsuNq7piwZNw4O7JT3X-NGpOWOJn5g_76sELb1DUTU/oPLlOatBte95wcGECoIb0SYCVlv_QFAD/8)
---
They’ve already raised over **$1.5 million** from liberal donors across the country. And now they’re gearing up to blanket Virginia in attack ads.

Why? Because they know I’ve delivered real results:

✔️ A 23.3% drop in overdose deaths
✔️ A 30% drop in murders
✔️ Billions recovered from Big Pharma
✔️ Government overreach stopped cold

_As the first Hispanic elected statewide in Virginia, I’ve stood strong for the rule of law, and I’ve made real progress. That’s why they want me gone._

They have radical progressive donors and DC special interests. But we have something better:_**** you._

**This month, we’re aiming to activate 50 grassroots donors to help us fight back. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to jump in—this is it.**

_**[Chip in now and be 1 of our 50 this month »](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/JyROvROkts0vHZy1a6LGp98vWUEpWMCu-Dv7m1DbQEzgFFJtnCWfj8iCGS0KVqZk4NXNwUiQwixbwrK_vUUakuOlJY0JatbB1eCMw1mfFJWOK5Gl_EBbNo83LjtkliWid9c_3FACuZvcj7gpQ1j-_chZCKm8LeM2uGOB_9hh-qmtebjs840ormSY--_upm5EvoEzf-2Ss8Z90aXCzCYmW_M2udfgcwKo2y9aSnHdYNlwxPeyhX_ipmclwn57bD-GK_8EcNfzvgW5xZkRipujnI7RB9ZMWVNg1XaMbKolO5XuGjYGlDbIUaH6__xQy-k4HEcvJBY2Z7E_y6FAZWhHVmh0dniiON-4CpPa3ZmHAauHQzCWWgtFt9Prbm4/ot93c6RpicZOOZoskXKddqMJOPk5Zci8/8)**_

Let’s show them that truth, character, and courage still win in Virginia.
---
With gratitude,Jason MiyaresAttorney General of Virginia _P.S. I don’t need millions from the coasts. I just need committed Virginians like you. Let’s reach our mid-month goal—50 donors by midnight tomorrow. Are you in?_

name: Logan Spena
subject: Stand with The Babylon Bee
body:
Some elected officials can't take a joke.
| |
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/8SGqtazMIm5OQQsLPCpDpmEhd1VDz4-imcidNtv2y8dzS70pc-9nUxTbS9vjjypOYr_5dAix-L5_P7CBvJk6c7MDiNhXliR8ZCSH5ffZawSFaZLoPiyJympXNYszN95VlbH7D-QH3-KDJ_rdd65Xhc-1t8iqX9H4ljKAFA8RKiutF98PFyajk62loUg_7t6TYovz5KzDwGYyUDV1fZ5EcZg1r2QyuruXg8Hly59kLIN-1nywxVl-O31ut27PJzYoiTNAOLTIPfpOuxFR3r8AZVr4bBRu1hS743spP_HxJovaFyxNnzpTjae7j7u11IKZilAhCvBt5jXU6xO6nuagloDpXdYS_ioQNFiaSqr5WtG4_HVOQFQ7ERIZnqFeWp2kgUNQWr9dKY8X_hFvxtcBFbGDxA1ckHQTbpywxdWUtSHOD6sUrWKgWwsV6LBfSiPPo6gN/oOQBwP9pHaQ-Gwdsm5nhWqnNzbC7UrWq/8)
**[Why Did California Censor _The Babylon Bee_?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/8f6wKPkQ7rGgVxLZYrOK4pleL4i5AI3WhAwolN4M0gKccPzfXPe-tlUOsGUEdZD6yUOz-h4CgtNEeBVsmS8TphJnLzq_b70DbCdjAiuKqKIhIbe8YUkTskY262uWMH6e1kEvPiZoe5UYIujhByuf6VewU79AhRb1sQGYtzOpU0mPOXRe-P7DynY9ZPHUQLsGArR0_UbAS7SfclNke3lF08VCncr5-xIt5ugo-Y3szqBa4YpssqR8tlk_3les7IOkRAC2dJ-MUzSIFxNukwWbA9cUMaglWgC7BUAzfBk5SuwCvq-HLeo7m1pI9XWcI6kSnLJ4_Np4O-NgBWAmRcMw7QOvCueaD672iS9nsvzKk69PUl8Ag-nGmIuYYqwDe9eWn6ZSHoZ8o1QpnXh2A79WFuKFVR8tBGXHgmrLWMZ7TAU0zsRGlJjP3_RFjqKow9hT9RjX/60GdRCodcWgOQ6USzfpQQo2kBtfrwaSh/8)******
Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Where do you stand on the issue of free speech and humor?

Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech. The Babylon Bee and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians. Where do you stand on the issue of free speech and humor? ** Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260 .

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2045admnstveiedta035ibzz1z7iqkmcbpmkx6h3iqngnh2dcokw5clm8kb5b2x4k0t6t3fqhrmnp3un1bc&__stmp=sv3c3f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

| |
---
| | | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans – it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC._

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it's $5 or $500 – the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---
– STEVE SCALISE
---
| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.
---
Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to %%Email__c%% because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=33g5tc4p3i82c9cyue5hodevdu2i1ujlv3gk712wtfiyzwaoztjsxujzrb3dybrzh32w21tamvgmybc0pcv91p3p4qib4hg587ut10heeyaxwkxaurrqubyd1qju4lf4hr6whhg51acycb48brwap7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv3c3f&__onlt=h)

body:
Thousands of supporters submitted responses to our survey – and after reading through every single response (yes, really), I wanted to answer some of your questions: | | |
---
| |
---|---
👋 Hi, it’s Audrey, Email and SMS Manager at the DLCC. Last week, my team sent out a survey asking for feedback on our program, our work, and how we can improve the content we send you. [If you haven’t had a chance to take the survey, you can share your thoughts by clicking here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzRBi1I12trvGpCMAmsq3z7IFbylhmZe7hYMlUYNiCy8aORqbUDKnMb1ecFRC9bI8DjtKaNIYPspH4hsMhUTTjeHzRx79_4jQujkVpFSMBnfSu91e_kIIs4vkP1AimNKGcVszrzoyxBvEOP4rvUeFEusqsytdD0JswD0-k_6IBsismfnN_lI_yRNoqjHcdhUnFVRLljxOF0xSpDh5-iRipgg7jjBmB4GzjzAQhqMQczIWhZxmzkS8neCkijKoS73KPBTyYcHxG8VuGIZllAnYPADCT_A4XTGt1IW7SjPgyisSfj2eoY8yLd-juPk-eT3uRfineRXxy_0H_BoGN0y3ExlSPAH9drhz_tJQ-3NCr8h/4fu/W5RJxjSAR0iiapMlGBmW_A/h0/h001.fIdd5tPX9Uw6R5G7SjNoOWMDaHPXe049oIJYX8P6PPA) Thousands of supporters submitted responses to our survey – and after reading through _every single response_ (yes, really), I wanted to answer some of your questions: **Q: What, exactly, is your mission?** The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee (DLCC) is the campaign arm of Democratic state legislatures. Our sole mission is to increase Democratic power in America’s state legislatures by winning elections, making the most effective investments, and fighting to elect legislators who will deliver a future we believe in. **Q: Will you read my responses, even though I'm not donating today?** _Absolutely_. We’ll never require you to donate to make your voice heard. We always appreciate when supporters take the extra step to contribute after sharing their responses, but it is not required or expected. **Q: What is your main focus? How do you use contributions?** The DLCC is focused on winning elections and building power in our state legislatures. Republicans have held a decades-long advantage at the state legislative ballot level, and the DLCC is committed to evening the playing field by creating lasting, Democratic infrastructure in the states. We make data-backed decisions to build our list of target chambers, identify vulnerable GOP-held seats, and strengthen state caucus programs through our investments. Our team offers state caucus programs critical operational support, which can include assisting with candidate recruitment, budget planning, digital fundraising operations, and more. Grassroots contributions make this vital work possible and sustainable. [If you’d like to read more about our work in the states, click here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW3bzmLUjyoeC_WFWvyrTvxCeHOL7Zmmh5khlmG-fzcORI6lhc4DDoHFDvQjKeG2JNMCFFnFip-OTeRbEJPywkxM9FYejSLim8I7rjAKAvd0GQc-EORQRjCgot_7agLDVk-L4ZUZ9vd3rMeHUysj8oRdggb--DyT2EBh5e-kOVrhLhiqB5vhFIodYo6yypnQja97UCtPH_zzC9KLsKjapU2WpjAXWZSw7VTNlEZ_BjjLhEIgc1xtF9NTtkKtXUuDG3DXhUsJF_6AlYE-2gpKZbu0LckiilUdyVWW_9ZCL1Lvkni5ZfM5moaxVBiB8Gw04iLfd8p0RvrQUTjUgCmSHTX8n6vETs2HPhqcMCXkd8WT5XLjO_zEJtO0zTxDjWIsYhRR6bhRTkN851w9X7BwUMYw/4fu/W5RJxjSAR0iiapMlGBmW_A/h1/h001.MI5q1shYaCu5zhnHVgDRnLxHcZYS3i7FUVxLLkpocAM) **Q: Why do you send so many emails asking for money?** State Democrats are constantly facing special elections, and majority-defining races are happening nearly every week. Already this year, we’ve defended Democratic majorities in the Virginia House, Virginia Senate, Pennsylvania House, and Minnesota Senate in special elections. The consistent stream of special elections _and_ off-year elections in battleground states like Virginia means that we’re investing continuously. Online donations from our emails give our movement the necessary resources to fill critical funding gaps. We know it can be overwhelming to see donation requests from Democratic candidates, organizations, and PACs in your inbox. We’re working hard to come up with a solution that keeps our organization sustainably funded while cutting down on the amount of emails you receive, but [if you’d like to pause fundraising asks for two weeks, please fill out this form → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVrvNwaJ-e3Y_qvd1qEqo3f4EwYqa9k3kILSGjSNhZGAQs8epgjCtQrS9h7-2eR5vHj3QALzsTW_5TAYxrJnDgdfICej0GG4FMx_p-7JOgHmybdWELUJBL1g3PJ4rnNicygPwRLllwt7iJrcLyKYnvUqHrH0bNCBR-HcclhCF70m7Fa7guHm-ikEEiTTw5Ieq6KiggaPhJcW08B6YiY4vXZ-tL-lCmTCxV3FanNL_VRmx0omuRxdL2PD_muKF7XHKXsImUI7T4jhaBN6mFUI8x3o-GY_bzaDUsv9UH4ZaC6-BU-S99Qk1hWR_Rz3r1PKPunYbH2-gRFgowzzCSGKacudtdTG-rMgmB2NHNB4vAhLTvsFHe8Crq1lBkybC3t7eUn0s6k-2RvA2Scaq2apaIzaURVT8cJYBcadpIOw42UjDgaggQPPqsBDRxX-6_enZ_MdhGYsZM9qoNjhVYVypZumgRBN2UCB3zVUOfsCLtJs/4fu/W5RJxjSAR0iiapMlGBmW_A/h2/h001.xbqs2vnd1ES9gO39T6sDZE7i8kQew4OYiMp390HmzP8) Thank you so much for reading this email. Your support of our movement means the world to our team. Together, Audrey Audrey Holzrichter
Email & SMS Manager
Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee

**[DONATE »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0LhYINxaih7zxENC755ZMU-_whNaMyNtn764iZpBXlahwyXFlAR50zgsdPSDZh9Z-VcEkyVZNFd4X2ssHC1I8GoDfYmGXycHRXkrsTNsv3dBp_z7EYNAdfMsZgW6dz_4TIN1XKa9fqQUmqsvqTJw89oNN5_X7VUzm1dlSbnUoAdE2oNH95eNmEhG1oeepYEKNhu2UadPBQ8owBMS6RDkrfCYYLFcUFlLJayR4fyZUSkXzEMQ3g56TLfOzREDf9H8KMvsFx4IHGm60FKdOZPDoF-VRLcGg_ArbivyMUOYyymaPzN5x2Hm_-Z6SZSZEfvayLL2SOs4P9lMNoNy6R54a9WG--F5pAuWQcSLS_t9eJhM4/4fu/W5RJxjSAR0iiapMlGBmW_A/h3/h001.747PQdZ4JS6AKSj9OMVJKx9fqOxHlnNCVWmW8KSr2pc)** **[MAKE IT MONTHLY »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDtHysyYRsWdw0IY6Mh-2Lvs2BQPf9RoMGZ-LzBGOnRmRwJyh9B632kbgba_2cTnbA3pJ12blL88mebua58zfWGcvmsrIdxcNrEb6KX0pxJRpgzdwdeylhJW0cICX48fOpvL_aOKP3Pcar6lfEUolqqGAnM1oPSAi1mbe45TXR4uS0tEDC8meA-mnfnGkGUZYMqYdjbM-IbZv8ktJ9IbwczJnrwGImhU_KNmX3qf_bUzC4ECfZakilHdKg6d8P_HLbL3wJxizlsjNTfwU9yotzi03mLTnqAS_kOsT-tBKqbK9hpqASEAiQjDeiDET_nGTZKmyj5cZj4UhlF84rDqN_wdFB8dw8KGKqp94V2EeU_UIODxN7wLOLXqNuuB9av3zsPqvTJjPqKuTVNOlmDML7yQ/4fu/W5RJxjSAR0iiapMlGBmW_A/h4/h001.rJDRgiaIcj9yKjEx46SX1gO38wXINhhQ8WeYliHZxrk)**

name: Mantra Dave
subject: Hello!
body:
Introducing myself.

| | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106254836/540917160/-1071877382?&refcode=E12987-20250419-MantraIntro-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGIzYzVlMWItMDYxZi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VyPmtP6_RvyOroXhKPK5qjHjuYl6fG0VCGhTPUFcuiE=)** Hi Peter, My name is Mantra, and I’m excited to be joining Josh Harder’s campaign as his new Finance Associate. Today I want to introduce myself and tell you a little bit about why I’m proud to work for Josh this cycle. [_**Then I’m going to ask you to chip in to support the work we’re doing to keep this seat blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106254837/540917161/-1071877382?&refcode=E12987-20250419-MantraIntro-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGIzYzVlMWItMDYxZi1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VyPmtP6_RvyOroXhKPK5qjHjuYl6fG0VCGhTPUFcuiE=) Before I got into politics, I co-founded a nonprofit organization that provides scholarships to underprivileged students. It was a passion project of mine and I loved giving back to my community. However, I also learned through the experience how hard it is to make change on the ground without smart federal policies. What we’re seeing now at the federal level is absolutely devastating. I’ll tell you what, no one in my community is benefiting from these terrible funding cuts, especially to the Department of Education. And don’t get me started on what cutting healthcare would mean for our community. That’s why Josh’s story really resonated with me. He decided to get involved in politics when Republicans tried to take away healthcare from people like his brother. I feel like in a way I’m following in his footsteps - using the skills I have to make a difference. **I couldn’t be prouder to join this team to help Josh fight back. I realize the hours will be long and the work is going to be hard, but I believe in Josh’s vision. This race here in California is the lynchpin for Democrats taking back power in 2026.** [_**This is where you come in! Josh doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, we’re counting on support from grassroots donors like you to help us reach our ambitious goals. name: John Fetterman
subject: this is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)
| | |
---
Hey Derek, it’s John, and **this one is personal.**
The Trump administration just placed almost every AmeriCorps member on administrative leave. That means good folks who volunteered to serve their communities – and live on a stipend of about $13 a day – are now being forced to the sidelines.
This makes *no* sense. I can tell you firsthand: _AmeriCorps makes the world a better place._ 💯
I joined AmeriCorps in 1995 and served at the Hill House in Pittsburgh’s historic Hill District. I taught GED classes and helped set up the neighborhood’s first computer labs. It changed my life. And it helped my neighbors in my community.
**👉 AmeriCorps isn’t “woke.” It’s not some culture war bullsh*t. It’s national service. It’s the best of us.**

And Trump wants to gut it – why? So he can give himself + his billionaire cronies _another_ tax break? Ridiculous.
**🚨 [If you’re with me, will you sign my petition right now + demand they let AmeriCorps folks get back to work? I'm trying to get 5,000 signatures before midnight tonight, and it would mean a lot if you were one of them.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51013?code=jtk72-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=2&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)**
| | [Sign the Petition >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51013?code=jtk72-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=3&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)
---
Nobody joins AmeriCorps to get rich. They do it because they *care.* Because they want to serve. Because they want to give back to their communities and build a better future for our country.

Responding to natural disasters. Supporting veterans. Building affordable housing. Covering gaps in our health care system. Tutoring our kids.

AmeriCorps workers do good work day in and day out, and now Republicans are telling them to f*ck off.
We need to stand together now because there's strength in numbers. We have to tell Trump and his administration: **Put AmeriCorps workers back on the job.[Stop screwing with people who are *actually* trying to help their communities.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51013?code=jtk72-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=4&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)**
| | [Sign the Petition >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51013?code=jtk72-su-fl&email=&zip=&t=5&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)
---
Thanks for having their backs. I know they'd have yours.

John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk72-su-fl-footer&t=6&refcode2=10051_434096_eHOrSh&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=10051%2E434096%2EeHOrSh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Bryan
subject: April 21 Campaign Update
body:
It's been 100 days since Republicans took control in Washington, here is how we've delivered for the American people.

| | | | | [](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=77d464f18c&e=e907534017)
---
| | | | | **April 21, 2025**
---
| Here’s an update from our campaign:
---
| | | | |
# 100 Days - Delivering Meaningful Results
---
| It’s been 100 days since Republicans and President Trump took control of Congress and the White House. We’ve delivered meaningful results for American families by securing our border, safeguarding our elections, and reigning in spending. Here are some of ways we moved America forward these past few months.
---
[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=64bbd11875&e=e907534017)
| **Securing our Border**
One of the most significant achievements of the last 100 days has been the dramatic reduction in illegal border crossings. Under President Trump’s leadership, the U.S. is seeing the lowest levels of illegal immigration in [**over a decade**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=29abff32f9&e=e907534017).
Our strengthened border security measures, including increased funding for border enforcement and construction of the border wall, are having a [**real impact**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=76b4d5aa1e&e=e907534017). In March, just **7,181** illegal aliens were apprehended at the southern border. That’s a **95% reduction** compared to March of 2024, when Joe Biden allowed that number to reach over **137,000.**
In addition, the administration’s focus on pursuing criminal illegal aliens has resulted in a [**doubling**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=7bd16dfd4d&e=e907534017) of the arrest of criminal illegal aliens, including removing more than [**120 repeat offenders**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=ed1804710c&e=e907534017)**** in March of this year.
These efforts are not only ensuring the safety of American citizens, but are also protecting our economy from the strain of illegal immigration. As Congress works on the upcoming budget, I will continue to prioritize securing our border and supporting the men and women of border patrol.
---
| **Safeguarding our Elections**
It should be easy to vote and hard to cheat. That’s why I’ve worked hard in Congress to ensure safe and secure elections and to restore trust in our system.
Earlier this month, the House voted to pass the [_**SAVE Act**_](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=1f14a491c0&e=e907534017) _._ This strong election integrity measure ensures that _**only**_ U.S. citizens are voting in our elections by requiring proof of citizenship and strengthening voter ID standards. I was proud to lead this effort and support [**President Trump’s executive order**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=9b3bd33e06&e=e907534017) on election integrity from earlier this year.
---
[](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=2d825c6dcb&e=e907534017)
| I’ve also continued my investigation into potential fraud and abuse in left-wing fundraising platforms like [**ActBlue**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=38a81e9b72&e=e907534017) and partnered with **Jim Jordan** to hold any bad actors accountable. We’ve already seen ActBlue employees leave the company amid our Congressional investigations into [**fraud,**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=f095777b71&e=e907534017)****[**foreign contributions** ,](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=27e2dd135a&e=e907534017) and [**potential ties to terrorism**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=1516eb4dfc&e=e907534017)**.**
I look forward to sharing updates on our important work in the coming weeks.
---
| **Reigning in Government**
Congress is already working to craft a budget that will reduce waste, fraud, and abuse in Washington while protecting important programs like Medicare and Social Security. We have already identified wasteful spending and onerous regulations that cost American families [**thousands of dollars.**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=37f24f0334&e=e907534017)
As part of this work, I’m dedicated to ensuring that Congress acts to prevent a [**$4.5 trillion**](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=b29aa6ebb4&e=e907534017) tax increase on American families. At a time when Wisconsin families are still struggling from the devastating fallout of _Bidenomics,_ they should not have to worry the federal government increasing their taxes to fund waste, fraud, and abuse.
---
| **On Wisconsin,** Bryan Steil
---
| [DONATE](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=07b5c470c2&e=e907534017)
---
|
---
| | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/steilforwisconsin/march-14050421?e=e907534017)
Steil for Wisconsin, Inc. * PO Box 103 * Oak Creek, WI 53154-8618 * USA
[update your preferences](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&e=e907534017&c=cdf0797fe7) or [unsubscribe](https://bryansteil.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5855432ef30dec79be4122095&id=5ab9944a1c&t=b&e=e907534017&c=cdf0797fe7)
---
|

name: RobBonta.com
subject: Our April Issues Survey is here →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
Let Rob know what your top priorities and concerns are in this moment.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250421&t=1&akid=1747%2E1088799%2EkKWKwP)
We know _a lot_ is happening in the news right now. Donald Trump is unleashing lawless attacks on our government services and vulnerable communities, creating fear over the direction of our economy and uncertainty about where we are headed as a country.
These are scary times, but Rob is fighting to protect the rights and futures of all Californians, and he wants to know what matters most to you in this moment.
**[Take a minute to complete our April Issues Survey to let Rob know what your top priorities are this month →](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-survey-aprilsurvey-20250421?source=em20250421-1747&akid=1747%2E1088799%2EkKWKwP)**
Every time we send a survey, we watch the results closely. **Here’s what people like you said was most important in March:**
1. Voting rights and our democracy
2. Climate change and the environment
3. Affordable and accessible healthcare

From protecting our Constitutional rights and free and fair elections, to securing the future of our planet, to lowering the costs of living, it’s clear there is a wide range of issues at stake. Rob is committed to making progress on each and every one of them.
**[So, can you take our April Issues Survey and share what concerns you the most right now? Rob is looking forward to reading your input.](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-survey-aprilsurvey-20250421?source=em20250421-1747&akid=1747%2E1088799%2EkKWKwP)**
**[Take the Survey](https://act.robbonta.com/survey/em-survey-aprilsurvey-20250421?source=em20250421-1747&akid=1747%2E1088799%2EkKWKwP)**
Thanks for your insight,
Team Bonta
* * *

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: A story that hasn’t gotten enough attention (it ends well)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
Louisiana voters said no to them all, y’all. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106255269/540918714/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20250421_f_Louisiana_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODFjODNkMC0wODFmLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pklEct8AZIu2O52ZX4cbK3nAl50-glO1oRl-1dLXKps=&emci=ad5162ca-081f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=381c83d0-081f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=1037277)

| | You may have seen a lot of news stories about election results lately — but one state that went to the polls recently hasn’t been getting enough attention. The story ends well. Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry led the charge to try to pass four significant constitutional amendments through ballot measures in March, when voter turnout is typically lower than in regularly scheduled November elections. It was an attempted power grab by political insiders — one amendment would have given politicians more authority to send kids to adult prisons and jails. And elites were acting like they could sneak major policy changes past voters. Maybe they expected something like what happened in December, when four other constitutional amendments were on the ballot, only about 11% of Louisiana voters turned out, and all four measures passed. Not so fast. The No To Them All, Y’all coalition came together to make sure Louisianans knew what was on the line. They mobilized against all four amendments. They fought to get out the vote. And as they got information in the hands of as many voters as possible, we were proud to partner with them — because everyone should be empowered to participate in their democracy. Shortly before the election, Governor Landry was overheard at a White House event telling House Speaker Mike Johnson that although he’d expected 12% turnout, “it looks like it may be 18%,” which Johnson said would be “huge” “for an amendment vote.” Governor Landry was wrong about how wrong he was. In the end, voter turnout exceeded 21% — almost twice as high as in December’s amendment election. **Over 60% of Louisianans voted no, no, no, no to all four amendments — a resounding defeat for an attempted power grab. Black voters led the way, heading to the ballot box at a higher rate than their white counterparts.** | **_The Guardian: “Louisiana voters reject far-right governor’s constitutional amendments”

WGNO: “Louisiana voter turnout higher than expected as constitutional amendments fail”

WDSU: “Voter turnout was the highest it's been in a while for the March 29 election”_**
---
Three quick takeaways:
**1\. Don’t sleep on Louisiana.**
**2\. When more people vote, our democracy grows stronger.** It’s galling that some leaders want to win by having fewer people make their voices heard. And you know something’s wrong with a politician’s agenda if they hope that not too many people will notice it and not too many people will vote.
**3\. These victories could motivate anti-voter leaders to try even harder to silence the will of the people.** We already see extremists pushing the SAVE Act in Congress, a modern poll tax that could disenfranchise 21 million Americans — and that’s on top of a nationwide wave of voter suppression legislation.
No matter what attacks come our way, we will continue working to make sure Americans can make their voices heard — in the South and around the country.
And we’re grateful for this grassroots team’s support, which makes our fight possible.
Thank you — and stay tuned for more on what’s around the bend in Louisiana.

clean_body: Louisiana voters said no to them all, y’all. | | | You may have seen a lot of news stories about election results lately — but one state that went to the polls recently hasn’t been getting enough attention. The story ends well. Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry led the charge to try to pass four significant constitutional amendments through ballot measures in March, when voter turnout is typically lower than in regularly scheduled November elections. It was an attempted power grab by political insiders — one amendment would have given politicians more authority to send kids to adult prisons and jails. And elites were acting like they could sneak major policy changes past voters. Maybe they expected something like what happened in December, when four other constitutional amendments were on the ballot, only about 11% of Louisiana voters turned out, and all four measures passed. Not so fast. The No To Them All, Y’all coalition came together to make sure Louisianans knew what was on the line. They mobilized against all four amendments. They fought to get out the vote. And as they got information in the hands of as many voters as possible, we were proud to partner with them — because everyone should be empowered to participate in their democracy. Shortly before the election, Governor Landry was overheard at a White House event telling House Speaker Mike Johnson that although he’d expected 12% turnout, “it looks like it may be 18%,” which Johnson said would be “huge” “for an amendment vote.” Governor Landry was wrong about how wrong he was. In the end, voter turnout exceeded 21% — almost twice as high as in December’s amendment election. Over 60% of Louisianans voted no, no, no, no to all four amendments — a resounding defeat for an attempted power grab. Black voters led the way, heading to the ballot box at a higher rate than their white counterparts. | The Guardian: “Louisiana voters reject far-right governor’s constitutional amendments” WGNO: “Louisiana voter turnout higher than expected as constitutional amendments fail” WDSU: “Voter turnout was the highest it's been in a while for the March 29 election” Three quick takeaways: 1\. Don’t sleep on Louisiana. 2\. When more people vote, our democracy grows stronger. It’s galling that some leaders want to win by having fewer people make their voices heard. And you know something’s wrong with a politician’s agenda if they hope that not too many people will notice it and not too many people will vote. 3\. These victories could motivate anti-voter leaders to try even harder to silence the will of the people. We already see extremists pushing the SAVE Act in Congress, a modern poll tax that could disenfranchise 21 million Americans — and that’s on top of a nationwide wave of voter suppression legislation. No matter what attacks come our way, we will continue working to make sure Americans can make their voices heard — in the South and around the country. And we’re grateful for this grassroots team’s support, which makes our fight possible. Thank you — and stay tuned for more on what’s around the bend in Louisiana. The Fair Fight Action Team = = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. body:

Hi, Peter, I didn’t come to Washington for the so-called perks. I don't need fancy cocktails – heck, I distill my own whiskey. I came here to serve, just like I did when I wore the uniform.I’m a combat veteran who’s now serving Montana in Congress. And my mission hasn’t changed: _**protect this country from those who want to destroy it from the inside out.**_ That mission is on the line and I’m still short of the goal we need to defend the House and stop the radical Left.[**Can you chip in any amount today to help us close the gap?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)

body:
Once again, the most unqualified Secretary of Defense in modern history leaked classified intelligence in an unclassified channel
#

Peter -
Pete Hegseth must resign in disgrace.
Once again, the most unqualified Secretary of Defense in modern history leaked classified intelligence in an unclassified channel–this time to multiple people who had no reason to have access to it.
**With each passing day, his stupidity puts our troops’ lives at even greater risk.**
In his less than three months on the job, Hegseth has proven time and time again he has no business being in his position. Even top Pentagon officials are speaking out: His incompetence is making our country less safe and putting servicemembers at risk.
He is a liar. He is dangerous. He threatens our national security. And he must go.
**We must keep up the pressure to ensure Republicans can’t just look away from his colossal mistakes. I won’t let them forget that these security breaches endanger our troops, but I can’t do it alone.**
[**Please join me and Ruben Gallego in our work defending our military from the threats people like Pete Hegseth pose by contributing $5 to my campaign. We need to meet this moment to pressure Hegseth and the White House into action, and your donation helps me do just that.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-duckworth-em-split.pm_cCr&refcode=em250421-2-90&t=1&akid=3830%2E734936%2ELis4E9)

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Did you know data centers aren’t paying their share?
body:
The POWER Act (HB 3546), one of our Energy Affordability & Utility Accountability priority bills, is up for a vote in the House tomorrow! Take action to help it move forward.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106255416/540919236/528557569?contactdata=zrP0Yi8X/pZFGh6mL8fr9vJ/pOWZKxncZgmKYN6bRZkQNGxJFdYKpEBO8e/xLGiXjR38X5IlQfLLA40ffhRBUdRZuf6YQrLdUdbyK7V+6tKqk5QaFdTM8GfvhyDxgja4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwOTYwMmEzLTBhMWYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k6nW06b2rE4uEfwwtXFiksZi0zgXD9yOuW-Mv7Brqko=&emci=897f82b6-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=009602a3-0a1f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
Hi Peter, Tomorrow, one of our priority bills, [HB 3546 A](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106255417/540919237/-445438303?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwOTYwMmEzLTBhMWYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k6nW06b2rE4uEfwwtXFiksZi0zgXD9yOuW-Mv7Brqko=&emci=897f82b6-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=009602a3-0a1f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230) — the [POWER Act](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106255418/540919238/328829851?usp=sharing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwOTYwMmEzLTBhMWYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k6nW06b2rE4uEfwwtXFiksZi0zgXD9yOuW-Mv7Brqko=&emci=897f82b6-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=009602a3-0a1f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230), is up for a vote on the House floor. The POWER Act, championed by Representative Marsh, is here to tackle the growing demand and rising cost for energy across the state, mainly due to the strain large energy users like data centers and other big tech are putting on the energy system. Large energy users are paying less, although they are using more energy, and burdening Oregon households with the cost. It’s time to hold them accountable with the POWER Act! [**Do you have a moment to ask your legislators to yes on the POWER Act?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106255419/540919239/528557569?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwOTYwMmEzLTBhMWYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k6nW06b2rE4uEfwwtXFiksZi0zgXD9yOuW-Mv7Brqko=&emci=897f82b6-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=009602a3-0a1f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
[ **Send your message here** ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106255420/540919240/528557569?contactdata=zrP0Yi8X/pZFGh6mL8fr9vJ/pOWZKxncZgmKYN6bRZkQNGxJFdYKpEBO8e/xLGiXjR38X5IlQfLLA40ffhRBUdRZuf6YQrLdUdbyK7V+6tKqk5QaFdTM8GfvhyDxgja4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwOTYwMmEzLTBhMWYtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k6nW06b2rE4uEfwwtXFiksZi0zgXD9yOuW-Mv7Brqko=&emci=897f82b6-f11e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=009602a3-0a1f-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=2107230)
---
In the past few years, Oregon households have seen their energy bill increase up to 50%, and are sometimes paying even more than twice as much as large energy users. The POWER Act will hold these large energy users accountable by instating policies that create a different category of customer for data centers, cryptocurrency, and other big tech. That way utilities can ensure that large energy users are paying their share, and in turn protecting Oregon households and businesses from shouldering the costs. Not only this, but the POWER Act will also require utility companies to be transparent about the costs that large energy users are adding to the grid, as another measure to ensure that they are paying their way. It’s unfair that Oregon households and businesses pay the cost that these large energy users impose on our grid. The POWER Act is here to protect Oregonians. clean_body: The POWER Act (HB 3546), one of our Energy Affordability & Utility Accountability priority bills, is up for a vote in the House tomorrow! Take action to help it move forward.| | | Hi Peter, Tomorrow, one of our priority bills, — the , is up for a vote on the House floor. The POWER Act, championed by Representative Marsh, is here to tackle the growing demand and rising cost for energy across the state, mainly due to the strain large energy users like data centers and other big tech are putting on the energy system. Large energy users are paying less, although they are using more energy, and burdening Oregon households with the cost. It’s time to hold them accountable with the POWER Act! In the past few years, Oregon households have seen their energy bill increase up to 50%, and are sometimes paying even more than twice as much as large energy users. The POWER Act will hold these large energy users accountable by instating policies that create a different category of customer for data centers, cryptocurrency, and other big tech. That way utilities can ensure that large energy users are paying their share, and in turn protecting Oregon households and businesses from shouldering the costs. Not only this, but the POWER Act will also require utility companies to be transparent about the costs that large energy users are adding to the grid, as another measure to ensure that they are paying their way. It’s unfair that Oregon households and businesses pay the cost that these large energy users impose on our grid. The POWER Act is here to protect Oregonians. Sincerely, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: They just can't help themselves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
If it’s a day that ends in Y, Washington politicians are probably trying to raise your taxes. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=e95cdbee0c&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e53fe3d04855/they-just-cant-help-themselves?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=d1f4e30101&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

**First,** politicians wasted your taxpayer dollars and irresponsibly spent their way into a massive, multi-billion-dollar shortfall.

**Then,** they tried to implement a brand-new, untested, and potentially unconstitutional wealth tax--despite major concerns from some of our region's largest job creators.

**Now,** far-left politicians are trying to raise every tax they can imagine.
[**STAND WITH ME AGAINST NEW TAXES**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=110eaf5e77&e=77eef70c61)
They want to:
* INCREASE the capital gains tax
* INCREASE business taxes
* Create a NEW sales tax on services
* INCREASE sin taxes
* INCREASE surcharges on companies

I could go on, but here's the deal--they just can't help themselves. If it's a day ending in "Y," far-left politicians in Olympia and Seattle are probably trying to raise your taxes.

I sometimes feel like the lone voice of sanity in our region, calling on local and state governments to prove they can spend responsibly before increasing the cost of living for Washington residents. I'm fighting every day against these irresponsible tax increases--but I could sure use your help.

**_[Would you be willing to make a small donation of $35, $25, or even $20 to my campaign today to help me get the message out that WA residents don't want their taxes increased?](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=07018ed669&e=77eef70c61)_** \----------
[**DONATE NOW**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=57f2dad16d&e=77eef70c61)
\---------- Every dollar we raise from this email will go directly to my campaign, where I am focused on stopping this insane--and seemingly never-ending--list of new tax increases proposed by Washington politicians.

Thanks for your support!

clean_body: If it’s a day that ends in Y, Washington politicians are probably trying to raise your taxes. | | | Is this email not displaying correctly? . ---|--- | | | Friend, First, politicians wasted your taxpayer dollars and irresponsibly spent their way into a massive, multi-billion-dollar shortfall. Then, they tried to implement a brand-new, untested, and potentially unconstitutional wealth tax--despite major concerns from some of our region's largest job creators. Now, far-left politicians are trying to raise every tax they can imagine. They want to: INCREASE the capital gains tax INCREASE business taxes Create a NEW sales tax on services INCREASE sin taxes INCREASE surcharges on companies I could go on, but here's the deal--they just can't help themselves. If it's a day ending in "Y," far-left politicians in Olympia and Seattle are probably trying to raise your taxes. I sometimes feel like the lone voice of sanity in our region, calling on local and state governments to prove they can spend responsibly before increasing the cost of living for Washington residents. I'm fighting every day against these irresponsible tax increases--but I could sure use your help. ** \---------- \---------- Every dollar we raise from this email will go directly to my campaign, where I am focused on stopping this insane--and seemingly never-ending--list of new tax increases proposed by Washington politicians. Thanks for your support! Reagan Dunn | | | | Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn P.O. Box 40417 Bellevue, WA 98015 Email: mailto:info@reagandunn.com | |

Up. Meals out? Up. Milk? Hope you weren’t planning on cereal this week. And what’s worse — this might just be the _beginning._ Trump’s tariffs aren’t even on the books right now. But once they are? Trump promised he’d help “working Americans,” but his policies are helping exactly no one who actually punches a clock or budgets for a family. He’s busy hitting the green while we’re working to keep our bank accounts out of the red.
